name: The Democratic Party
subject: Good evening, Derek
body:
Please don’t scroll past this short read.
---
Good evening, Derek — we hope you won’t scroll past this short read. It’s Sunday, and we’re sure your inbox is crowded, so we’ll get straight to the point: [**We’re asking you to make a $3 contribution to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250720_3978_fr&refcode2=3978_22930333_0kpVj6&akid=3978%2E22930333%2E0kpVj6) Congressional Republicans recently voted to rip health care away from 17 million people. Which means it’s more important now than ever that we show strong opposition to their disastrous agenda. Here at the DNC, we’re fighting back: Investing in every single state party. Launching our “Organizing Summer” initiative to register voters _now._ Taking the Trump administration to court. This work is essential, but it takes a huge number of resources to keep running. If everyone reading this email pitched in $3 to help fund it, we’d have the resources we need to power all of the work we’re doing. And that’s important — because Republicans are going to spend millions of dollars trying to drown our opposition out. Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the scale of the work we are doing makes our goals that much higher. So we’re relying on people who understand how important these early contributions are to chip in to support the DNC today. Our average online contribution this month is $27. Some give more, some give less. All that matters is you’re choosing to chip in. [**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats up and down the ballot is worth $3 to you, that’s the contribution we’re asking you to make today, if you can:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250720_3978_fr&refcode2=3978_22930333_0kpVj6&akid=3978%2E22930333%2E0kpVj6) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250720_3978_fr&refcode2=3978_22930333_0kpVj6&akid=3978%2E22930333%2E0kpVj6)**

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: All eyes on us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=535%2E181023%2EnHdHHY)
Hey there, it’s Jocelyn.
I know your inbox is probably full of political emails — trust me, mine is too. So the fact you even opened this one means a lot, and I hope you’ll bear with me for a minute.
My team and I are up against a critical public filing deadline tonight at midnight. It’s the first public report of our campaign. Once it’s filed, everyone, including the press, our opponents, and the national Republican establishment, will be watching to see exactly where we stand.
That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your support today.
What we raise before midnight tonight will set the tone for the rest of this campaign. Top GOP names, both in DC and right here in Michigan, are watching closely. They know that if we build early momentum, we can win. And they’ll do, say, or spend anything it takes to stop us.
This is one of the most competitive governor's races in the country, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. I’m running to defend and strengthen public education, lower costs for working families, and protect our fundamental freedoms — but I can’t do it alone.
I’m not relying on corporate PACs or wealthy mega donors. My campaign is powered by folks like you who believe in leadership that puts the people first.
[**So, what do you say? Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can before midnight tonight to help us crush this goal?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM2_V1_S1&amount=10&t=2&akid=535%2E181023%2EnHdHHY)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q32025._u867d&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM2_V1_S1&t=3&akid=535%2E181023%2EnHdHHY)

| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q32025.koEtbW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM2_V1_S1&t=5&akid=535%2E181023%2EnHdHHY)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q32025.z9_9cy&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM2_V1_S1&t=6&akid=535%2E181023%2EnHdHHY)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q32025.Z1Qyci&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM2_V1_S1&t=7&akid=535%2E181023%2EnHdHHY)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM2_V1_S1&t=8&akid=535%2E181023%2EnHdHHY)

Thanks for being part of this, and thanks for taking the time to read this message.
— Jocelyn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Voter Action Project
subject: We must do everything possible for voter registration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Whether you live somewhere with elections in 2025 or not, voter registration is critical work to protect our democracy. We have to do everything we can to bring in new voters, lapsed voters, and voters who have moved and make sure their voice is heard in the next election.
Make a difference for our country and RUSH $24 or more for our voter registration efforts right now >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]
2025 may be an "off year" election as far as Congress goes, but that doesn't mean we don't have important elections this year or we can take a break with our voter registration work, folks.
Voter registration is open in New Jersey until October 14th -- and early voting starts on October 25th. Control of their state legislature hangs in the balance, while it's also an open race for governor as the current governor is term-limited.
Voters can register in Virginia until October 24th , with early voting starting on September 19th. Virginia's legislature is also up for grabs, plus the opportunity to replace the current vote-suppressing governor (who is term-limited) with someone who will protect voting in the commonwealth again.
Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
It costs us roughly $3 to register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=15.00&tknfa=FUGj2FgMaqI6544UNiigiYBQ4Z_ENJ1To5rVYMN-1Wc=&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=25.00&tknfa=FUGj2FgMaqI6544UNiigiYBQ4Z_ENJ1To5rVYMN-1Wc=&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=50.00&tknfa=FUGj2FgMaqI6544UNiigiYBQ4Z_ENJ1To5rVYMN-1Wc=&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=FUGj2FgMaqI6544UNiigiYBQ4Z_ENJ1To5rVYMN-1Wc=&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=250.00&tknfa=FUGj2FgMaqI6544UNiigiYBQ4Z_ENJ1To5rVYMN-1Wc=&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]
Yes, there have been a few special elections to fill vacancies, but these elections are our first real opportunity to fight back against the widespread efforts to dismantle our democracy. The results will determine whether our country stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and keep working toward a better future.
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming states nationwide with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- will absolutely tip the scales of these elections towards justice. Please pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters this year! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=wCCrTdD+IilSjbWWrZ90LubrbMql1EnrEcCo8pnMPiUqtmWsGjiPMFYzLCq/C2U3sqqteq+NFtynsghJ6uACNQHcr3Qs6IbWoRrF4f6ZI/M=]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

United States

Virginia's legislature is also up for grabs, plus the opportunity to replace the current vote-suppressing governor (who is term-limited) with someone who will protect voting in the commonwealth again. Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help . It costs us roughly $3 to register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [=] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] Yes, there have been a few special elections to fill vacancies, but these elections are our first real opportunity to fight back against the widespread efforts to dismantle our democracy. The results will determine whether our country stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and keep working toward a better future. Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming states nationwide with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years. New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- will absolutely tip the scales of these elections towards justice. Please pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters this year! >> [=] Thank you, Voter Action Project's Registration Team = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

subject: New bill = more fire risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111831684/558526324/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250720_FR_BBB_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_Wildfires&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzI3MzA1NS1jNjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_WnNUnlILIOkcH4kUJs9TK-wf7r2aI-zaHnekAq4kE=&emci=d245fc4e-c665-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4c273055-c665-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

The President's partisan reconciliation law doesn’t just repeal climate progress, it also puts our communities at risk.

By rolling back key parts of the Inflation Reduction Act, this bill will increase U.S. greenhouse gas emissions by nearly 310 million metric tons in just a decade. That means more carbon output, drier forests, more destructive wildfires, and less funding for the very programs that protect communities like ours.

Here in California’s 19th Congressional District, we’ve seen firsthand how climate change is escalating the scale and speed of wildfire threats. But instead of investing in prevention and resilience, the Administration is gutting safeguards and undoing decades of work.

**_[If you’re with me in standing up to these reckless decisions and pushing for a safer, cleaner future, please chip in $10 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111831685/558526325/182852633?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250720_FR_BBB_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_Wildfires&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzI3MzA1NS1jNjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_WnNUnlILIOkcH4kUJs9TK-wf7r2aI-zaHnekAq4kE=)_** | [DONATE TO DEFEND OUR FUTURE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111831686/558526326/182852633?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250720_FR_BBB_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_Wildfires&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzI3MzA1NS1jNjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_WnNUnlILIOkcH4kUJs9TK-wf7r2aI-zaHnekAq4kE=)

clean_body: We’re feeling the summer slump after missing our mid-month target last week. | | = Hi, it’s Melanie, Marlene’s Finance Director — and I need to be honest: July is a tough fundraising month so far. We’re feeling the summer slump after missing our mid-month target last week. Here’s why closing our $5,000 gap is so important: Donald Trump has a $600 million war chest that he’s ready to spend to re-elect far-right loyalists like David Schweikert in AZ-01. With Cook Political Report rating AZ-01 as a toss-up, Trump and his GOP allies in Arizona will spare no expense to hold this seat and their narrow House majority. But we can replace Schweikert with Marlene and flip the House blue— if we stay on track in our fundraising efforts. = | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for helping us pull ahead in this competitive race! name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: all eyes on GEORGIA - the stakes could NOT be higher! >>>
body:
BREAKING OUT OF GEORGIA:
Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.
This isn’t just about one race. It’s about control of the Senate, and whether Trump and his allies can bulldoze their way back to unchecked power.
Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.
We set a goal to raise $60,000 by the end of this month to power organizing in Georgia and defend other vulnerable Senate seats. But we’re still $13,638 behind, and the deadline is in just TWO DAYS. Will you rush a donation of any amount so we can help keep Georgia blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072025_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=072025_4&amount=5]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072025_4&amount=25]
If we don’t raise the resources to fight back now, we’re handing Georgia — and the Senate — to Trump on a silver platter.
Don’t let that happen. Pitch in whatever you can today to keep Georgia blue and block the MAGA agenda in its tracks:
👉 Donate now to help defend Georgia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072025_4]

| | Peter,

When I voted **NO** on Trump’s Big Ugly Bill, **I did it because I refused to risk the 22,000 Californians in our district who stand to lose healthcare.** Those are our families, our neighbors, and our communities on the line.

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Live with Terry Moran
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250720&t=1001&akid=1888%2E1088799%2EY9jODz ]Rob Bonta

Last week I went
live with Terry Moran to talk about the Trump administration, our lawsuits
against it, and what it’s like to battle Trump in the
courts.

We ended up talking about much more, and I want to share some thoughts
with you from our conversation. (You can also watch our whole discussion
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/966?t=1002&akid=1888%2E1088799%2EY9jODz ]here.)

Since Trump was inaugurated in January, I’ve sued him more than once a
week. I didn’t set out to do that — I’ve done it because that’s how often
this administration has blatantly violated the law and trampled on the
rights and freedoms of its own people, and I’ll keep doing it if that’s
what’s required to hold Trump accountable to the law.

This moment is a challenging one for California and America. Many people
feel disheartened, demoralized, and frightened, and I understand. But I
urge you not to feel hopeless — because we’re not helpless.

History has shown that people power is the most potent power there is:
from the civil rights movement to the farm worker movement to the
restoration of democracy in countries around the world. People will have
the first and the last word in the story of this state and this country —
but we have to continue standing up and speaking out.

Standing up for what we've built as a country over the past two centuries,
speaking out to protect the fundamental principles our nation was built
on: the rule of law, democracy, freedom, human and civil rights.

Our Constitution was built for a moment like this — it was designed to
protect against kings and tyrants. As Attorney General, I will do my part
and remain unapologetic and resolute in my commitment to defend the
Constitution.

But I do need you by my side, because people power requires ALL of us. So
I’m asking you today: [ https://act.robbonta.com/go/967?refcode=em20250720-1888&t=1003&akid=1888%2E1088799%2EY9jODz ]Will you support my re-election campaign so we
can keep up the grassroots fight for justice, freedom, and democracy for
all?

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/967?refcode=em20250720-1888&amount=5&t=1022&akid=1888%2E1088799%2EY9jODz ]Donate $5 »

We have each other, and that’s a powerful thing.

I’m grateful for your support in this work, and I’ll keep updating you as
we continue our fight against this administration’s flagrant violations of
the law and the Constitution.

Thanks for reading.

-Rob

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1023&akid=1888%2E1088799%2EY9jODz
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=1888%2E1088799%2EY9jODz

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

clean_body: | Hi Peter, I know some folks in Washington would rather I keep quiet and fall in line. But when a bill threatens to take health care from working families, seniors, and children —I will always speak up. That’s why I voted no on the “Big, Beautiful Bill.” Because I’ve seen what happens when people are left behind. But now, well-funded opponents are targeting this campaign. They want to flip this seat and replace me with someone who will rubber-stamp Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. We’re just $2,471 short of our mid-month goal. = | | = I’m not backing down. And with you in this fight, I know that we will prevail. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. = = = = = Be well, Ami Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States **

| Hi there, it’s Camille, Finance Director at the California Democratic Party. We’re getting serious about scaling our Forever Organizing voter contact programs. But before we open more regional offices, launch more canvasses, or schedule more phonebanks — there’s one critical thing we need to do first: **Hire Congressional Field Directors.** These individuals will shape everything we do between now and Election Day. They’ll manage our field plans, guide our volunteer teams, and help us reach the voters who will determine control of the U.S. House. _But we’re still short of the budget we need to bring them on._ **[Will you rush a donation right now so we can hire Congressional Field Directors who will take the lead on our organizing strategy in swing districts across our state? name: Troy Downing
subject: Hide & seek with the Grim Reaper.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
They’re coming for me, Peter. This is my Hail Mary.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcyMV9CMC1FQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzI2MzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MjFfQjAtRUIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjcyNjM5LTI4OTkifQ/PKtea_ShJBw3APKuEFHuiw)Hide & seek with the Grim Reaper.
I'm sending you this text today in hopes of a miracle.
After reaching out 3 times and hearing nothing, I'm deeply concerned about what will happen if this doesn't work.
I've had my back against the wall before – I know how to stay calm under pressure.
**My name is Troy Downing. Just a guy from Montana who is taking a huge leap of faith.**
Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran, a God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.
I’m fighting against the Deep State in Congress and advancing President Trump’s MAGA agenda.
**__But I've just learned that Democrats in key battleground districts have amassed a staggering war chest, each with an average of over $1 million in cash.__**
The Democrat Political Machine is aiming to annihilate me & every other red-blooded American who opposes their radical agenda so they can retake our conservative House Majority.
They're putting my campaign on the chopping block.
**[I hate to do this, but could I humbly ask you to help me out by chipping in just a few bucks today? ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcyMV9CMC1FQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzI2MzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MjFfQjAtRUIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjcyNjM5LTI4OTkifQ/WHHU36rO2p5wwS5dN-jvNQ)**[RUSH REINFORCEMENTS
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcyMV9CMC1FQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzI2MzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MjFfQjAtRUIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjcyNjM5LTI4OTkifQ/_UrWraMMCdBQ65NIEfPfpg)I'll be upfront with you – this is a Hail Mary pass, but I believe God led me to this moment for a reason.
I give you my word as a veteran and as an American: I'll never let you down.
My candidacy is in your hands. Will you help out an old combat vet?
Thank you.
**Troy Downing** _Conservative Veteran in Congress_|
* * *
JULY END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE COUNTDOWNThe July end-of-month deadline is bearing down on me, and this may be our final shot to get back on track. I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. A small donation from every Patriot will keep my campaign in the air. Will you stand with me and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat war machine? [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[Rush your gift to my campaign to defend this critical House seat.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[RUSH IMMEDIATE SUPPORT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._Au8w)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

name: The Flyover
subject: Scheffler Wins The Open, Emperor-Poisoner, and Stolen Fire Truck
body:
U.S. golfer Scottie Scheffler won the [British Open](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQBeDTQAeyZxf_FC7S0G3alAjMeJnI2MgeLdrbR6TIBVKORnpP3_t6TI-ZIqXn57yj45CnhGeNyIxlqn7DECKWk1LlDfOBCfcDywQChk7oDuS0zhTf071dXUAEvLXopB5uwsKgoN1ckEEZr_USEAARpDFiGbwQUq3GKNWSu9KEBimFsCB7VN4aK42BZZV6sc1d4EqcS_-dKfGGIb7zC0vv895GtzEftbl9NDA2MJ7n2afFX4rr38BYj1y4NjA-cwzX7TMzYfen65ZCTHXrLl9XfJpBWqNtW9x6nBQjVaWbu3juM8XfUv7XUi8HPwEAAP__Q4x9zg) Sunday at Royal Portrush in Northern Ireland, securing his second major of the year and the fourth of his career, leaving only the U.S. Open to complete a career grand slam.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1u4yAUxfGnwbtY3Gsb8ILFSCPPYpRUrSJ1aYG5xLT4Q5gG5e2r9BW6_52z-L-fx7MJMay3i1lIZ7-NK5UjUs6UxmOayftIqYT1yDNtO6207JRG5NiduDwhjM6E-BjbymlPhNRUpEF2De-xE1jNuhNGdkoZ44WRjqDn0DoQZKVqhLe2Cvr5xiUCcN4j1CSmXvWgFFoH0vas5eRC3lL9sYU1z-TjY7tTqqdtqaKec94P1vxhODAcSil1SdNnWG2MT8FwwH-gAF5RMByuzeWta_8_cTMcXxZY8_c6vFRJu72EGMMhJGv5bTHhZ17lX1W5a_wOAAD__04uczg) | |
# Monday, July 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1861, the First Battle of Bull Run [marked the first major clash of the Civil War](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFyhCAUANDTYKcDX12koEhjt2lTOiif9e-gOPgj4-0zyRVygVe8r-f0dBRpf326DS2HNO1YzojMmKdzWTGEiLnQfvKK6cAdtwPzBBL6Wuoa1OQdxXvqKm8DImBboVW6b6WB_gHVajsv9eyGZZlbF2QfTC9xgK5HY5yXg67I_mpSg1JSGlANPhYzGDUMMHulZyM6iZ445eadaOcVQ7zThblZ0lZFuzIfp2g_BIwCxlJKE9PSvNIlYCTGTcDIybu7pr1e6eSUbwHj-zveNSgBY5WtPwrFSOdDi06-Nkfxz-Z_hVwWfgIAAP__Rrl0Rw), ending in a chaotic Confederate victory near Manassas, Virginia. The bloody encounter shattered hopes of a quick Union triumph and signaled a long, grueling conflict ahead. Jake “Papa Jake” Larson, a World War II veteran who stormed Omaha Beach and later became a [beloved TikTok storyteller](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3u3CAUxE9jd1jw_AEUFGncbdqUFtjP67eLwQKyaG8fOVf4dzMaaTTz-_NYHpY8hedve6Ipe1wC1uyxFExLXg_cd4-pUsjlwHhhwPPCtACHkXHJQCybJf9dhnYzOyJg36IRcuy5hnGC9jBCy32Uo1Qat3ESo9YotZ2cc65XTmFL5m7jEoTgXIPocFq10kIpcJuQTjcDx41KTN0rUigH7v4bP5i6NZ6tN0cpV276Xw3MDcy11i649X5x5w3Mt2xgjo7KX5sIb3PZy7KXfSPzNuUYWK3APlgw2cAKvUt8s40ws7QGC0KrQbXJbFcl7ylPshn487Tk_08oP-L2MfAvAAD__1Hagtk), has died at age 102. As we remember his remarkable life and digital legacy, we’re wondering: Do you use social media? What do you use it for? Let us know by replying to this email. We're sponsored today by [Grounded Footwear](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1u4yAUxfGnwbtY3Gsb8ILFSCPPYpRUrSJ1aYG5xLT4Q5gG5e2r9BW6_52z-L-fx7MJMay3i1lIZ7-NK5UjUs6UxmOayftIqYT1yDNtO6207JRG5NiduDwhjM6E-BjbymlPhNRUpEF2De-xE1jNuhNGdkoZ44WRjqDn0DoQZKVqhLe2Cvr5xiUCcN4j1CSmXvWgFFoH0vas5eRC3lL9sYU1z-TjY7tTqqdtqaKec94P1vxhODAcSil1SdNnWG2MT8FwwH-gAF5RMByuzeWta_8_cTMcXxZY8_c6vFRJu72EGMMhJGv5bTHhZ17lX1W5a_wOAAD__04uczg), the barefoot shoe that can improve your fitness and health.
|
---
## Drone Strikes Shut All Moscow Airports
Moscow temporarily [shut down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL-G6miQK9uSChUOAgEpLkVSXCmsyZW1OYoUlswx-vtA-YV0gxngAfPe3-Y35MDx9R03GsuS5kg1ByqFZM5upWUJJJVjLiulnSJtO8kMBm7adBrs7JHDMV8bPy5EQG1Do-1urRngdodmHZ1FIPRPHPr2iYh0g_vSeyAHvQEHDY8nzXRgrTED2Avd3dAPtu_h6W33HNTVkOeS5PIrcSwrLeFInyQXl7YmjGspe1btQ8GkYKq1XrYcz03BRFH_CWeLojF67VJcAruSFUwbBy4oxxlTdqlqZNmTlKwLbXsSFA6HdiFl8hqXQqJ_fwhyJO0lRdJYCrqPk4WiHw_77f3x-qHaKTn2qv365dRKNf8k2RsZ_V45BM73Tl3Na0MO_w6U_7L-OcLfAAAA__9F0ppp) all four of its international airports this weekend in response to a sustained drone attack from Ukraine, with Russian officials saying they downed more than 230 drones. The attack came as Ukrainian President Zelensky proposed [further peace talks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SpCAcB59GM6bg7wcaEFxiNpdeaKH8HDkRKGDGnbffmn2Fzbu6uvrffb5r66x__NUnVNnC7HFlh1KQ5rzu2DaHdFmfy44Q4XFGpJk4dYxLRmI22rr33NZGbQChqaGE7Bo-UtdTvaveoJNb141NT4KGpu1XuYyNWRY0Ug-6tupj45KE4HwkcUO_jsMohoEWI-QyVi2HsSWk2_9gfdmxuXd4Id3WcNZO7aXEXDV_Kpoqmo63fVlvEOENfPkwFU3PI2nrwWIKMWRk5nGxFJ7esLCxCL2CFe2OzC5bdpaeOVvNPL4Ku4CjoqlOysTLOmdzL6uWP05t3U9B-dW2l6LvAAAA__-XMoQP) with Russia, and Russian President Putin spoke with Turkish officials about hosting a third round of negotiations in Istanbul. Meanwhile, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov insisted Sunday that Russia would continue working to achieve its [goals in Ukraine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdF7Zw_LjwsVGEVKKmybFLZHBA0xibOQxi-7bR-QVUh_p6PvO58f44ShQXH-6HW1Z0hjx4oClYB553nBZAuaLIpcN04ER9wPzCAoaqToJevSOwtf4rLxdEAHrCq3umloZaFqoNjv73vdza1qj6qZB07Q4eeh6aHz39G6qyN421YHWShnQD2xn0xvd9zB53U1GPBV6Kik_fieKZcMlfKU35sec9irYrZSDRf0SMAgYrut67BxvJmDAKE8WMNynbphy8AKGfDKTkxSZuLBMUbp5I3xTXOX5JzuKKNfkAkuPfFBBWfK5HyzPUGh35bzdLsvXS__4ZJ9FPaSZvKi_f7tT4sW_MB9Vtv64KATithNPte6Owr_R5b9Kvy38DQAA__8VGJVz), despite threats from President Trump to increase sanctions if no ceasefire is reached within 50 days. Russia also performed [airstrikes in Ukraine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu2yAYhZ8Gb0TwkwR7YKhUWepwu3a0MBxsGgwRcG_kPn2VvkLnIx193_frY_mwMcW8_bQHTA9lyXi1hN5Rl-Z2hJBQXzG3vqM8kXE8URcSdONCc5KLtzGdy3XwJgAENcBIfVNiotudht04COi7VgpKOie1F-uorQsa07hOsEM07zehSUohJpIX3N00TnIcafVSrxO7CvjYS738LjH3HSGd5Qv14soxJLP3_mxMfWM0M5rt6t4Gl628Z0bzj9xRs-2xZJsYzZ-PamOONnNfS0bjtnfrHvwozZUX_4OE3B7nydvntqH1xkNF27mDbQixgtHceqknU3P0TH2XpCYhSemhGv98xZRiu2t2FdthY_oH2f-r7JehvwEAAP__u9SP1Q) over the weekend, killing at least two, as the nations exchanged major drone attacks, which experts predict will continue to escalate.
## Colbert Show Ax Sparks Political Blowback
Paramount's decision to cancel _The Late Show with Stephen Colbert_ is [facing blowback from the Writers Guild](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OtiAUhK8GO9_A8QcoKL7G7v3aLQ3iQc8GwSCr8e437l7CtjPJk5nn4z2-LQWKy3-7oSk-jRGvI2ApmMfDreh9wHxRPMqKaceI2455BA5dzWUNYpwthXtsq9l4RMCmQiNk13ANXQ_Vapz0XQta9Vx6VHyaG6uV7rTtXDP5TlZkHhqXIATnGsQLe6eVFkrBNAs5adZynKmk_PpMFMuKPtzpxPxyaauCWUvZD9b8YzAwGE6bCcv9dAyGh8xgKCeD4TnGYLgyFcxHvXxRmOsp04T5rimeeBRabKEUa5fChLnUzkaHIfyGApq-7VslFYOhymbeLwqBjl6yli-bpfAzqPzJ4mngOwAA___EPYZY) and some Democrats, who claim the timing suggests political interference. The union has asked New York's attorney general to investigate whether the move was linked to a recent $16 million settlement with President Trump, which Colbert criticized on air just days before the cancellation. Senators Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, and Adam Schiff warned that the cancellation could threaten press freedom. President Trump [cheered the decision online](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuS4yAURL8GZbjg6oEUEGyizJtuqAJxMdfLQ4UYu_z3U5pfmLiru-ucf_ftbihSfvw1CXXzZcv4PiO2hnU794DeR6xvymcLWA7MmA6sGwgYuVAc5OYMxc82dE57RMC-Qy3V2IsFxgm6oP2kxAhqHE0Pvsdd2mGR0ltl58G7pe9IX2tCgZRCLCBvOO3LvMh5BuuksgsbBDpqpd6ehXIL6OOnvLDe9pK6qENrx8n6PwxWBmsLGCjGK2OwhpLwAmKwJnRkGKzjIIWQE3clm-h4q1_p4E9K6cP_U0oY-dnwCJj5XqLF2vhur35XtTveFCOdk2KDeCRDPzdd-5W3l4bvAAAA__-eW4H2), adding that _" Jimmy Kimmel is next."_ Paramount says the choice was driven by financial pressures, citing a [steep drop in late-night ad revenue](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM-q3SAYxJ_G7DzoZ_4uXJxSAqXcbkrpMmj8kliMBv1uwnn7kvMKdzUwwwzD7-_H9GF88HH9ZXbUtKQp4lUCEmGeyrzhsgTMl4-FNkwHRtwPzBMIaLjoOMjJGR9eU105vSACqgq17BolBmhaqDbdNtapuhYKlYPaGKuklHNne2NBoGkqr-810YGUQgwgH9jOQz_IvgfrZGcHVgt0nlJ-_Es-0oZLeKUT82NOexX0RnQUpp4MRgbjdV2PvcQ7YzBi5Kt9K2Em4-OOkRiMdDIY5xQsZuK-8GAIC_HZlE8T6MXT8rZ49OtGnM7CF-OQp8-7bDJ_PuWPPz-PxNSYZu-Y-v7tZohX-Y35qLJ2x-VD8KXtWC3W3fjwfktfQnxq-B8AAP__VxGRvA), though critics point out _The Late Show_ remained the top-rated program in its slot.
## Scottie Scheffler Wins British Open
U.S. golfer Scottie Scheffler won the [The Open Championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQBeDTQAeyZxf_FC7S0G3alAjMeJnI2MgeLdrbR6TIBVKORnpP3_t6TI-ZIqXn57yj45CnhGeNyIxlqn7DECKWk1LlDfOBCfcDywQChk7oDuS0zhTf071dXUAEvLXopB5uwsKgoN1ckEEZr_USEAARpDFiGbwQUq3GKNWSu9KEBimFsCB7VN4aK42BZZV6sc1d4EqcS_-dKfGGIb7zC0vv895GtzEftbl9NDA2MJ7n2afFX4rr38BYj1y4NjA-cwzX7TMzYfen65ZCTHXrLl9XfJpBWqNtW9x6nBQjVaWbu3juM8XfUv7XUi8HPwEAAP__Q4x9zg) at Royal Portrush in Northern Ireland on Sunday, securing his second major of the year and the fourth of his career, leaving only the U.S. Open to complete a career grand slam. Going into Sunday's final round with a four‐stroke lead, Scheffler made birdie on the first hole, then closed with a 3‐under‐68. Despite a double bogey on the eighth, he recovered to win by four shots at 17‐under par. The victory cements [Scheffler's status as world No. 1](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ_GdEb28uvCRRq6S5sSgb3gjQxG9upO9_YRKfIC6aaYGc03X4_5sVCkc_9cDrS8pfnEV4nIjHkuLuC2RcwvOgsHTBeeeFyYZ1DQSTVI0LNfKL7ntvJ2QwRsKrR66BploOuhClb7FrHvTOf8uPYGtB83p8Bp47RuUFVk7zY1gNZKGdA19s6MRo8jrF4PqxGtQk-ccv2d6OSAW3ynJ-bapaOKNjBfRTQfAiYBU7lS5lK_l5DSbRAw7SluAqYlM7mIAqY1E1MJ8uaRxSVmQvkHK6nIFV066NzlIu_0rSLueHqph2ZUY9ubOvARq2z99aIYqfSDaNV-LBR_d_G_znxa-AkAAP__c4qKMg), following his five‐stroke win at the PGA Championship and wins at the Masters in 2022 and 2024.

clean_body: U.S. golfer Scottie Scheffler won the Sunday at Royal Portrush in Northern Ireland, securing his second major of the year and the fourth of his career, leaving only the U.S. Open to complete a career grand slam. | | | | | | Monday, July 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1861, the First Battle of Bull Run , ending in a chaotic Confederate victory near Manassas, Virginia. The bloody encounter shattered hopes of a quick Union triumph and signaled a long, grueling conflict ahead. Jake “Papa Jake” Larson, a World War II veteran who stormed Omaha Beach and later became a , has died at age 102. As we remember his remarkable life and digital legacy, we’re wondering: Do you use social media? What do you use it for? Let us know by replying to this email. We're sponsored today by , the barefoot shoe that can improve your fitness and health. | Drone Strikes Shut All Moscow Airports Moscow temporarily all four of its international airports this weekend in response to a sustained drone attack from Ukraine, with Russian officials saying they downed more than 230 drones. The attack came as Ukrainian President Zelensky proposed with Russia, and Russian President Putin spoke with Turkish officials about hosting a third round of negotiations in Istanbul. Meanwhile, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov insisted Sunday that Russia would continue working to achieve its , despite threats from President Trump to increase sanctions if no ceasefire is reached within 50 days. Russia also performed over the weekend, killing at least two, as the nations exchanged major drone attacks, which experts predict will continue to escalate. Colbert Show Ax Sparks Political Blowback Paramount's decision to cancel The Late Show with Stephen Colbert is and some Democrats, who claim the timing suggests political interference. The union has asked New York's attorney general to investigate whether the move was linked to a recent $16 million settlement with President Trump, which Colbert criticized on air just days before the cancellation. Senators Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, and Adam Schiff warned that the cancellation could threaten press freedom. President Trump , adding that " Jimmy Kimmel is next." Paramount says the choice was driven by financial pressures, citing a , though critics point out The Late Show remained the top-rated program in its slot. Scottie Scheffler Wins British Open U.S. golfer Scottie Scheffler won the at Royal Portrush in Northern Ireland on Sunday, securing his second major of the year and the fourth of his career, leaving only the U.S. Open to complete a career grand slam. Going into Sunday's final round with a four‐stroke lead, Scheffler made birdie on the first hole, then closed with a 3‐under‐68. Despite a double bogey on the eighth, he recovered to win by four shots at 17‐under par. The victory cements , following his five‐stroke win at the PGA Championship and wins at the Masters in 2022 and 2024. ## 3 Missing from Kerr County Floods
Kerr County officials announced Saturday that the [number of people missing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3uozAQBfDTQGdkjD-gcLENXbbdEpl4DFYMRp4hJLdfJbs3-NejeXq_9-c23VxMcV9-uw0svUKedrgwARGUqdsiYtyXuD-glHs-d3rPgEST4EIxbphoJ-9iek-y9nbmfmhrsK1RHR-U1rxeba87PRgDd2lCJwcxSz0bPSvVc925TtXRfsK4EW3bcq50w5WXoZctVxJ06GUlOfhIuTS0AsHLYUjv_ITS3PNWJ7sSHVh1vyoxVmK8rqsJ-fVRfO6VGE-sxPj9Y_8IbHMPQLaeC7Dz8I6A_YeyAwrmHVmKSMwFgsJCytmzLSOxkM_dM3QB6mL9ccWUImpTSb5sLqZvH_rZik8r_gYAAP__8siJTA) from the deadly July 4 flash floods is three, down from an initial estimate of 161 that was revised to 97 last week. Dozens of people reported missing are safe, and 107 victims have been identified. Over the weekend, Gov. Greg Abbott announced that Hamilton and Travis counties [have been approved](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAMhp_G3mRIsmz5Bg1dsl3XjgYdUQ5RRTQknnN5-yJp36DzR_DH9_36XD-BMpX9J9wxyHfiteCjZRTBuo53ao3KTuU31nrlryLPDZvIarWdlPbKmjUC5efq-hg2HT9Mj8H4adQf0zzr_hZgS24xzqdx88Zv1i9LnHSyCedlmkfdU3g9094aY7Se5kFP0aXFGT05nNPiOqcxknAd5IaC39BSfvKJdbjyvc_hJnK0bvzR2UtnLzufw_to2Pns7OWl09nLwU3-UqyFq4JtYxEFpfBXuWJTcByVT8iKk0oYsUJWkRo0waqgNWoC5YoqcVXyYAUxkhAXyOo9p955CJtKnDM_qOz_QMrMkcre1xCPB-VMbfad0_sdKL8d5P_Kn8H-CQAA__8T1J4Z) for federal aid to address damaged infrastructure and public facilities. Today, the Texas legislature convenes for a 30-day special session to address several flood-related issues. State Sen. Paul Bettencourt (R-Houston) said he is working on legislation that would [fund warning sirens](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGOpDAMhp8GuoxCCCQUFNfQ7bVXIpMYxpqQoMQ7zLz9iam23876LX_Wp__f1_wFFChuf2HHkV9rmiOeJSAz5rndqRSKG8UH5uzSd-T3goV5VlJ1QhqhmtkDhfesaz8u0g9NjWNjulYOXd_L-j46uYLroTPKDNZro_zQmnbwUmvrrDc1jRdMGtU0jZRdf5Od16vVjew09qvVlZboiVO-8R0ZX1DW8E5PzDeX9jqMd-ajVO2fSk2Vms7zvD2e33gtKzVBZnIBKzVdXpWajhSIyV0jxUIexY_kQ_8Z4BNFOdARBFGwFEpRFAZGUTACpyzwdQSgWMQaUvIiYwBGLwJuVALwdRDg3OGBuQiXPi8zxa1Sk7JGLA0abc0qej8oob3tBPR2EXYZusYqB9INdR79cVIIVHpTabntQOEjz7-r7Dmq_wEAAP__4oKtfQ) along the Guadalupe River that are connected to Starlink satellites. In the past two weeks, first responders from [Mexico](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp_GdI7MYPNTUGxDd7fdEg32OFjX4MgeQvL2K7L7Brc8M9KRzvfna_7CEMN-_40bjfzyad7pLJGYKc_NFkoJ-z3s35SzTcfO74UK8wwKjFSdhHp2GOJ71pUbF-WGuqKx7kyjBtO2qlrHntDabnGmIey0HgxoIq09GIShb7oqjJdMdVDXtVKmvSnjtO91rYym1vdaaEUucMo3XonphcXHd3pSvtm0VXFcmR9FNL8ETAKm8zxv32s6rqeACTMHG0nAdHUJmAojX_gRyf_Hf-BjSk7AtNErWNxlpmIPkky4yUKY7SrvBzqMx4NkDk_KAibojWyosV7rVrYLOamtbyV6GmRNDvyCjeqVqvLoHmeIMZS2E1rdNwzxU8A_2_05wt8AAAD__-uulv8) and the [Czech Republic](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-SqyAUh59GO5wDImhBcRu73HZLB-EYmUXIwElM9ul3klfY_vdnvu_rslxsiCFd_9sDDT23vCQ8a0QiLEt_hFpDuob0jaW4fE_0WrESLQLEwEAzwRdvQ3wtsvVmBT_xFg3XQw_ToBS0u9EjnyanlRoF9LZHRLE6XKXrVysl6jaY9xhowTkHGFQHg5fbKDkMEtU2ykYC-kC5dLQj4dPWLb7yA0vn8tFGsxPdatP_a8TciPk8z27LT23vlUJ6Rxoxv5kaMX_KbIs5e-Z-0O2soi1uZzZ5VrC6O7bF-NsZYgxV6UbC9bAhfo7ob3oeRvwGAAD__6iNew8) have traveled to Kerr County to help with search and recovery efforts. ## Panhandle Getting Power Boost
Xcel Energy, a Minneapolis utility company that provides power to much of the Panhandle, announced Friday that it will [add more than 5,000 megawatts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAMQL_GdM7YwphQUFzjbq-9kjFYJJo1dsbWBvj7G_IL22o0eu_p39f05SlSevz1G458rHlKuNeIzFimdqNaKT0ofWMpS_5JfM5YmSdQ0EnVS9BT8BTPyTRhnFUYdIOj7rtWDZ21qnmO89zadQmrgtUsVs-DGQY9t73tvdaLHhoar2OqB621Up29qS6Y9W606gza9W6EURiIc7nxExkPX9d45jeW25K3Jo5P5lcV7R8BToDb9_3mN18oxnwtCHCVczkFuKtMgLtwApzqBTh9F-COBaPEhOVxyj2X7yo5yw2RZaErX_4wReJTBtx8CpKS_GjIl09Pn0JEeY0T7nLDg5YswN076LW1Sn0wTRnDa6cYqdpeGPXYPMWPPv_u6e8R_gcAAP__XWCVcg) of capacity in Texas and New Mexico by 2030 to meet a projected 40% increase in electricity demand in the region. The portfolio includes [17 new generation projects](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb8Gd1jAGDNTUKRxt2lTWtg88EswzwJ2Pf77yFH-YMsrHV3de359zB8OE-b40-1g2zvQnOGsCVqDMj92rBVzxPwHSlnpM7drgdrarITSXBiu5OwdpmseOm8X4V-yAyuNfoiXHkfRbXZZtFLGSC-ChmDUcx3Vy7ngZRidkdChvcuEUVJKIfTYC-2H8Byk0AOM4TmwQYDHRqVvGzR4uxrSRV9Q-pX2LtmttaOyxw-mJqam8zz7_dowbkdymOsNMTXdr5iaEq0u8f_hvULikKHEi7uc6TOvUPlBpQVKSJzCTfKDTij8KPQb1lZ5I75BOniBiJRd4rHQiTlyD7vLnqmpK9YfJ6aEdTRsEHF3mP6Nbd9T_GXV3wAAAP__mmyU-g) and three expanded natural gas plants, two of which are in Texas. The company plans to add 3,200 megawatts of dispatchable energy and storage and 1,968 megawatts of new wind and solar power capacity. Population growth and industrial expansion, particularly the rapid proliferation of AI data centers, are fueling the anticipated increase in demand, which ERCOT has predicted could [double within the next five years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwQ5zAYWZguJv7OZvtzQOXvRmEQywo779ZuYVtj7Jd3LO12N8TBQoLv-nDW09fRojHiVgrZhHtVEpFBeK35izSz-xXk8stY4SZM_BcCnGeaJwjV0z2yfMd9GgFaZXcO-1hma1Ho12T-E9CAUCAI3SSiL2dyUQtGrIvjEwUggB0OsW-rnzt05A36H2t451gDPVlNu6YsVzKj5c6YW5dWlrgl1r3QtT_5gcmByO42jdmlN8p0wO7zlMDlOu5AIyOZwOA8eIebn4R-MRD77hSS5xPPcpFkqRSzBGA5h2X_cm23k_KAQq2rAOlm2i8Gmvf_vsZeVvAAAA___lyYC3). "_This portfolio is about more than just adding power_ ," said Adrian Rodriguez, Xcel’s regional president. "_We’re working to build a stronger, modern, and more resilient energy system that our customers can count on_."
## Professors Discover Ancient Royal Tomb
University of Houston professors Arlen and Diane Chase recently [discovered the 1,700-year-old tomb](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOqO1YwwULq5Jl2uvRAavw-qMHdmbEN7-xL3C3400mtHM9-cxPxxFSs_fbkfL35DnhEeNyIxlvu1UK6Unpb9Yyprfic8FK_OsQPUCBqHk7B3Fc9attwv4SbZo5dDfYOqNgXazwxikX5cRJJhlVUabdYDFT2HCftTOtWSvMhiUlBKgNx30XodRS-g1mjDqRgN64lw63pDx62qIZ_5g6da8t9FuzK_a3H416t6o-3EcXcjf68XlN-rOxX0wXuLKiu1dF5e8OCigYHS7CJR8Fa9CK0asVZR8uig474sIFCN6IQcAcaIrIkcvuKCr74K1Lda_DoqRqhkaDc_dUfy_in_G8mPVvwAAAP___6GLrg) of Mayan king Te' K’ab Chaak at the Caracol archaeological site in Belize. The university announced the discovery earlier this month. Te' K’ab Chaak was the ancient city's first ruler and the founder of its royal dynasty, which endured until the ninth century. His tomb, the [first royal tomb](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOpDAQhk8DWbVsA4YOCDYhm003RAWUoTR-jOzqodnTr9grTPw_pO_78zF_IHuO-28MNMrbpTnSWTyJUJ6bwKVw3Dl-Us5rekW5Fiois1GmA9WD0fOG7K-5rbdxUdtT1zTqvmvUs7NW1cfYrzQ4re1qrVaLQ2yU6xaFhtZm67ul5vE-U73RWivV2YfqttYNrVZdS9YNbdUq2lhSfshBQm8szl_pm_JjTaH24yHyVarmV2WmykzneT5KYDlKiowx4H7XKjOVgFngpqvMhHk9kJJPOxcp8IqEWQ6QTFhemcCx97SBpLDAQj7dDnaQBHLcYS4CnzGdEfLLU4bkACHghbCyXMDxHvFfAj2o52CfvanMVOdx-zrZey62r1q1B2T_n0F-Zv57NP8CAAD__2QMnDc) to be found at the site, was filled with pottery, carved bones, shells, and jadeite jewelry, including a death mask made of the precious gemstone. The finding shows the king’s great wealth and demonstrates that the society [engaged in long-distance trade](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAURp8GO80FAceCYhu72XZLg3BVMvwYYMbx7Tezr7Dll3w5OTk_9_munXdx-9YBVX2vaY54Fo-1Yp774EpxcXPxgTmb9Iz1WrDUOjNgooWhZXS22vlr5o1VC9iRNqjoIHoYhZTQ7KpfB0QYFuhHyUcYBDOLhX60VGiJljdOfWAwMEopgJAdCMvXG6cgOMr1xgkHtK6m3NUdK751Wf2VXpg7k0Lj1V7rUUj_RdhE2HSeZ3ek4-l1Dmh2HZ0pnyNhUzEOo0HCJp3NrjH5tF2fJUV_g5GOhE1BX7o1OmuTfPtwcWtrCgthU5OVPU7nvStyIBy2oJ3_M6j_6_ZS7DcAAP__9JOB1Q) with other cultures. Te' K’ab Chaak was 5-foot-7 and died at an advanced age.

Panhandle Getting Power Boost Xcel Energy, a Minneapolis utility company that provides power to much of the Panhandle, announced Friday that it will of capacity in Texas and New Mexico by 2030 to meet a projected 40% increase in electricity demand in the region. The portfolio includes and three expanded natural gas plants, two of which are in Texas. The company plans to add 3,200 megawatts of dispatchable energy and storage and 1,968 megawatts of new wind and solar power capacity. Population growth and industrial expansion, particularly the rapid proliferation of AI data centers, are fueling the anticipated increase in demand, which ERCOT has predicted could . "This portfolio is about more than just adding power ," said Adrian Rodriguez, Xcel’s regional president. "We’re working to build a stronger, modern, and more resilient energy system that our customers can count on." Professors Discover Ancient Royal Tomb University of Houston professors Arlen and Diane Chase recently of Mayan king Te' K’ab Chaak at the Caracol archaeological site in Belize. The university announced the discovery earlier this month. Te' K’ab Chaak was the ancient city's first ruler and the founder of its royal dynasty, which endured until the ninth century. His tomb, the to be found at the site, was filled with pottery, carved bones, shells, and jadeite jewelry, including a death mask made of the precious gemstone. The finding shows the king’s great wealth and demonstrates that the society with other cultures. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Maine’s Unsolved Murders Haunt Survivors, As Unknown Killers Are Walking Free
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Maine’s Unsolved Murders Haunt Survivors, As Unknown Killers Are Walking Free (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=2aa0927917&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Jul 21, 2025 06:41 am
Fifty years ago the body of a 19-year-old woman was dumped in a culvert on Sherman Lake in Newcastle. Florence E. Lauze’s killer to this day has never been identified and without a miracle never will be. As tragic as her death is, she’s just one of 69 Maine victims on the Maine State Police [...]

The post Maine’s Unsolved Murders Haunt Survivors, As Unknown Killers Are Walking Free (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=fdd87ed411&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=a6893a17e7&e=f093fa355c) .
Read the full story » (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=2be48f03fe&e=f093fa355c)

** ‘Maine Has Worst Infrastructure Nationwide As Gov. Mills Furiously Attempts A Fix:’ CNBC (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=15bbce8b48&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Jul 21, 2025 06:23 am
A shocking new national survey of states’ public utilities shows Maine ranks the worst of all 50, earning it an embarrassing grade of “F.” That’s according to CNBC’S annual measure of “top states for business.” The survey includes reviews of each state’s roads, bridges, ports, airports, utilities, connectivity and sustainability. “The Pine Tree State has [...]

The post ‘Maine Has Worst Infrastructure Nationwide As Gov. Mills Furiously Attempts A Fix:’ CNBC (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=63ea5c1d0d&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=3e2178a128&e=f093fa355c) .
Read the full story » (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=61c5804ad4&e=f093fa355c)

** More Whistleblowers Want To Speak Out On Anti-Trump Plot That Began Under Obama, Tulsi Gabbard Says (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=e4ee5f00c9&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------

name: Scott Presler
subject: I haven’t reached out in a while
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
I’ve been working on something big

| | | | |
---
Hey it’s Scott Presler, I haven't reached out in a while because I’ve been working on something big.
**_[See it here](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPZE/?__vbtrk=MzA0NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
After our resounding victory in Pennsylvania in the 2024 election, Early Vote Action is doubling down on our proven voter registration strategy. We have hired more staffers in PA, and we are registering new Republican voters in New Jersey every day ahead of their November 2025 election.
We have a chance to shock the political landscape, and all signs are pointing towards a huge Republican turnout in November.
New Jersey is our next chance to win a major election and now is the time to kick into overdrive. The enthusiasm and opportunity is here, we just need to execute on the mission at hand.
That’s why I reached out to you.

name: Christian
subject: MAGA is gutting PBS, the tool that taught me English
body:
That means no more Big Bird. No more “Reading Rainbow.” No more lifeline for millions of kids learning to speak, read, and dream. I know, because I was one of them.
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZzGniJo9Xw354fhgimz9saNPTtmKmEfcVcljr3-wEUolPvJD5LnpivCEd_d34AW9RCb8tQOEarY8ELb-3IPWCZNkprHIiMVBf5vj1Z2OkLyaXc8cd43bZ0ii-R88syy9GjW8R2F5J_s2TOEAB03QHk5QRxpj-k7c3L2TW8nmOqI5eMPkAi6lvzNDjarHL0im8trIHKYKta_2yjKquI7wWghg5KSmFogDLIQ4bs6NojI=&c=-XbojwIOpdgj8sEtHW1BRjAvyaIRIcui983qMoxX6oLnGekJtQ9g_A==&ch=AuSIN2RzV_V8YlVhIYPs_8n5ExaM5_-6CX1McU39QotFa2Gp771h5Q==)
---
| | | | Peter,
MAGA just gutted funding for PBS and NPR. That means no more Big Bird. No more "Reading Rainbow." No more lifeline for millions of kids learning to speak, read, and dream. I know, because I was one of them.
English wasn't my 1st language -- it was my 2nd. My parents were immigrants from Mexico and Spain. We didn't have tutors. But we had PBS. I sat cross-legged on our living room floor every day and learned English from the Count, Bert, Ernie, and the gang on Sesame Street.
---
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZzGniJo9Xw354fhgimz9saNPTtmKmEfcVcljr3-wEUolPvJD5LnpivCEd_d34AW9RCb8tQOEarY8ELb-3IPWCZNkprHIiMVBf5vj1Z2OkLyaXc8cd43bZ0ii-R88syy9GjW8R2F5J_s2TOEAB03QHk5QRxpj-k7c3L2TW8nmOqI5eMPkAi6lvzNDjarHL0im8trIHKYKta_2yjKquI7wWk_x1NOx0l6flBoTtBQm3h4=&c=-XbojwIOpdgj8sEtHW1BRjAvyaIRIcui983qMoxX6oLnGekJtQ9g_A==&ch=AuSIN2RzV_V8YlVhIYPs_8n5ExaM5_-6CX1McU39QotFa2Gp771h5Q==)
---
| | | | That's the America I believe in: one that helps kids get a fair shot. But MAGA's America? Billionaires get tax breaks. People are kidnapped off the street by masked agents. And the kids? They get nothing.
That's why I'm in this fight. I'm a 1st generation American. I learned English on public TV. I fought for human rights as a lawyer. I served my country as a captain in the National Guard. Now I'm running for Congress -- to take on a rigged system and build something better. But I can't do it alone.
---
| | | | [Can I count on your support with a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us continue rapidly growing this campaign?](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZzGniJo9Xw354fhgimz9saNPTtmKmEfcVcljr3-wEUolPvJD5LnpivCEd_d34AW9ZK7nrmeUQLRVOLAnhReiMfRc2R7uyqGZ5bYAwiYj8FgKz-dOjoS2Dbsa9B-goPKh2YRPWMoneUheQQnRKyYQ1hKPlQDpOu6AL1r7ycGR6N6P3K4EihulY51xnY-MyQ9ZxoSAVJ1n9P83Kh3wgSBgjIGTDKgUPWPbrr_0L_P1hzI=&c=-XbojwIOpdgj8sEtHW1BRjAvyaIRIcui983qMoxX6oLnGekJtQ9g_A==&ch=AuSIN2RzV_V8YlVhIYPs_8n5ExaM5_-6CX1McU39QotFa2Gp771h5Q==)

clean_body: That means no more Big Bird. No more “Reading Rainbow.” No more lifeline for millions of kids learning to speak, read, and dream. I know, because I was one of them. | | | | | == | | | | Peter, MAGA just gutted funding for PBS and NPR. That means no more Big Bird. No more "Reading Rainbow." No more lifeline for millions of kids learning to speak, read, and dream. I know, because I was one of them. English wasn't my 1st language -- it was my 2nd. My parents were immigrants from Mexico and Spain. We didn't have tutors. But we had PBS. I sat cross-legged on our living room floor every day and learned English from the Count, Bert, Ernie, and the gang on Sesame Street. | | | | | == | | | | That's the America I believe in: one that helps kids get a fair shot. But MAGA's America? Billionaires get tax breaks. People are kidnapped off the street by masked agents. And the kids? They get nothing. That's why I'm in this fight. I'm a 1st generation American. I learned English on public TV. I fought for human rights as a lawyer. I served my country as a captain in the National Guard. Now I'm running for Congress -- to take on a rigged system and build something better. But I can't do it alone. | | | | == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | This campaign is for all of us who never had a head start, but never stopped fighting. Thanks for being in this with me. Christian Urrutia Democrat for NH-01 | | | | | == | | | | Christian Urrutia is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: Urrutia for New Hampshire PO Box 4521 Manchester, NH 03108 | | | | | == | | | | Urrutia for NH | PO Box 4521 | Manchester, NH 03108 US | |

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z37rdudqedja0s12cpbr0rqql9ulfaa01o0oids8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chi6eoj6cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z31pvirgn37g99r6cvluj3n6bch2fjgu86jhrc7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chi6eoj6cth2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4sftkrspmcctatc3q8j3p3q5if4b9o683per0ug_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chi6eoj6cth2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaq4vv6sedq8amdqqpm2ui9ctg0a7n06lm6sjmf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chi6eoj6cth2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi41h151dao81k4vqrqldgfvfci5ocnf7vc27i5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chi6eoj6cth2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

subject: Retaliation is the MAGA Machine’s M.O.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| The MAGA Machine doesn’t know how to govern — **they just know how to retaliate.** When Californians held demonstrations against Trump’s mass deportation operation last week, he spent hundreds of millions of dollars. Kristi Noem arrested Rep. LaMonica McIver and detained Sen. Alex Padilla because they dared speak out against her and the DHS. **In true authoritarian fashion, this administration continues to raise the stakes of speaking out against them. But I’ve been the target of their retribution before, and I’m not afraid to continue holding their feet to the fire to demand accountability now.** [**Friend, our path to taking down Trump goes _directly_ through the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees. And as one of the senior-most Democrats on both, I’m ready to go toe-to-toe with MAGA. If you’re ready to help us take down Trump once and for all, split a donation between me and Seth Moulton so we can be ready for any and all attacks they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111849160/558590431/265156787?refcode=250720_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTYwZWUwYy0zMzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCmHh_iU1LeIdU6r1itTc_AkEGWqvLWQDhJXpHVPi3Q=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111849164/558590433/-288956247?refcode=250720_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTYwZWUwYy0zMzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCmHh_iU1LeIdU6r1itTc_AkEGWqvLWQDhJXpHVPi3Q=) I’ve been kicked off the House Intelligence Committee for my investigations into Trump’s role in instigating January 6. **I’ve been placed on FBI Director Kash Patel’s “hit list” for my work holding corrupt Republicans accountable. name: Surprise attack
subject: A MAGA win in this sleepy 2025 race changes everything
body:
Most Pennsylvania Democratic voters don't know there is a critical election this year. We are one of the only organizations ringing an alarm bell about this race.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PE5CGggrlmdv_I1ODYD8YSoksZN0VYnoTZw6ZW7V7rR627G7AFOFBgBL_VQsifNYjBmVbFOBeNNMrBCVB2nZGfZyOsNbY0pY7nNIENAh1jWpjqNIafqyGGbrZxPgI2vfzRQ7GwsovMLu85SYC6u1AJ7lSRs6iyKo9X287voKJWI8d4BtzhuMKxYsvyVMWcgwf9EJ0y-feCNyV-a0SiVcAM9samRPwgHz&c=iY0Eok_KphjSX7yrJ3JNmVo94DzV4lO9syQgkTzAK5yr6bCH5xmxNA==&ch=DmNNQQGLAyKu6armZUmNbpyM2FQdLGn51jn_rhi_D77fRj7zfPo5VA==)
---
| Peter,
The phrase "judicial retention election" evokes the image of a boring parochial municipal election.
Unfortunately for Democrats, the stakes of the upcoming 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Judicial Retention election couldn't be higher and no one is talking about it.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PE5CGggrlmdv_I1ODYD8YSoksZN0VYnoTZw6ZW7V7rR627G7AFOFBgBL_VQsifNYjBmVbFOBeNNMrBCVB2nZGfZyOsNbY0pY7nNIENAh1jWpjqNIafqyGGbrZxPgI2vfzRQ7GwsovMLu85SYC6u1AJ7lSRs6iyKo9X287voKJWI8d4BtzhuMKxYsvyVMWcgwf9EJ0y-feCNyV-a0SiVcACf3dnFiwoEN&c=iY0Eok_KphjSX7yrJ3JNmVo94DzV4lO9syQgkTzAK5yr6bCH5xmxNA==&ch=DmNNQQGLAyKu6armZUmNbpyM2FQdLGn51jn_rhi_D77fRj7zfPo5VA==)
---
| "Unusually aggressive" is an understatement. The GOP is preparing to spend presidential type election money, in the tens if not hundreds of millions, in this often overlooked judicial election.
---
|
MAGA is laser focused on this election, but Democrats, rightfully focused on flipping the House, have sadly forgotten about this race and we are sleepwalking into disaster. If the GOP takes the PA supreme court majority it will spell doom for Dems in PA and across the nation.
A red PA Supreme Court will help the GOP to grow their House majority by engineering safe blue House seats into new red ones through gerrymandering. It will also ensure that there is no judicial oversight body to challenge MAGA election rigging schemes in the 2026 midterms and in the 2028 presidential election.
We are screaming from the rooftops that we cannot sleep on this race. Democrats can win here and retain our Supreme Court majority but only if we get the word out.
Most Pennsylvania Democratic voters don't know there is a critical election this year and that's where Defend our Courts comes in. We are one of the only organizations ringing an alarm bell about this race, we're doing everything we can (ads, mail, canvassing, etc) to get out the vote and avoid a catastrophic defeat for democrats here.
[Can we count on you to chip in anything to help Democrats defend our courts from the massive red wave that is about to descend on Pennsylvania? We can't afford to let MAGA steal this critical court.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PE5CGggrlmdv_I1ODYD8YSoksZN0VYnoTZw6ZW7V7rR627G7AFOFBgBL_VQsifNYjBmVbFOBeNNMrBCVB2nZGfZyOsNbY0pY7nNIENAh1jWpjqNIafqyGGbrZxPgI2vfzRQ7GwsovMLu85SYC6u1AJ7lSRs6iyKo9X287voKJWI8d4BtzhuMKxYsvyVMWcgwf9EJ0y-feCNyV-a0SiVcAKz_mwICB01T&c=iY0Eok_KphjSX7yrJ3JNmVo94DzV4lO9syQgkTzAK5yr6bCH5xmxNA==&ch=DmNNQQGLAyKu6armZUmNbpyM2FQdLGn51jn_rhi_D77fRj7zfPo5VA==)

clean_body: Most Pennsylvania Democratic voters don't know there is a critical election this year. We are one of the only organizations ringing an alarm bell about this race. | | | | | == | Peter, The phrase "judicial retention election" evokes the image of a boring parochial municipal election. Unfortunately for Democrats, the stakes of the upcoming 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Judicial Retention election couldn't be higher and no one is talking about it. | | == | "Unusually aggressive" is an understatement. The GOP is preparing to spend presidential type election money, in the tens if not hundreds of millions, in this often overlooked judicial election. | MAGA is laser focused on this election, but Democrats, rightfully focused on flipping the House, have sadly forgotten about this race and we are sleepwalking into disaster. If the GOP takes the PA supreme court majority it will spell doom for Dems in PA and across the nation. A red PA Supreme Court will help the GOP to grow their House majority by engineering safe blue House seats into new red ones through gerrymandering. It will also ensure that there is no judicial oversight body to challenge MAGA election rigging schemes in the 2026 midterms and in the 2028 presidential election. We are screaming from the rooftops that we cannot sleep on this race. Democrats can win here and retain our Supreme Court majority but only if we get the word out. Most Pennsylvania Democratic voters don't know there is a critical election this year and that's where Defend our Courts comes in. We are one of the only organizations ringing an alarm bell about this race, we're doing everything we can (ads, mail, canvassing, etc) to get out the vote and avoid a catastrophic defeat for democrats here. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == A MAGA surprise attack is coming and we have a rapidly closing window to brace for impact. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: There are still over 100 nominees waiting!
body:
Tell the Senate to pass the Rescissions Act NOW!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** ******Pending Nominations**
We've had a lot of wins in Congress lately and it's been amazing to see! Between the One, Big, Beautiful Bill and the rescission package both passing, we're taking the right steps to get America back on track! However, there is still a looming issue that the Senate _ must address,_ and that is the backlog of Trump administration nominations that are still waiting for a floor vote.
**ACTION:** Tell the Republican-run Senate that it is past time for them to confirm _all_ of the Trump appointees, so that our country can run effectively! Use our **[action page](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acc0db1a/1edb9794acc020ca "https://action.teapartypatriots.org/petition/trump-nominees")** to call your senators and urge them to get to work and confirm Trump's nominees!But that's not all we need to do! ****

Vice President JD Vance **[visited a Pennsylvania diner to meet with locals](https://substack.com/redirect/7751bd01-6080-4bba-a86b-d93c82a21222?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** last week, and the raw, unscripted moment will show you who Vance really is beneath the surface.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7751bd01-6080-4bba-a86b-d93c82a21222?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7751bd01-6080-4bba-a86b-d93c82a21222?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Vance walked into the humble establishment, and ordered some food for himself and his wife before greeting every single patron in the place. He eventually made his way to the back of the restaurant where a table of older veterans were sitting. One gentlemen, a Korean War veteran, had 2 Purple Hearts.
"You were in the Marines?" the old timer asked Vance.
"I was, Semper Fi!" Vance answered back with a big smile.
Watch the incredible MAGA moment here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7751bd01-6080-4bba-a86b-d93c82a21222?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**Together with Goldco**
# [What's behind the silver surge?](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce12200-063d-4565-8b49-1035622a8cf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Could Elon Musk Be Eyeing Silver?**
Musk knows how to spot opportunities. He sees the trends. The patterns. The moments others miss. And now, some experts suggest silver might be in his sights. Here's what's happening: Silver demand is surging, driven by trade wars, tech and clean energy innovation. Supply chains are tightening, creating scarcity that could reshape markets.
But if silver is the next big move, what does that mean for your savings? There's a story unfolding here. One you don't want to miss. So if you're interested in that? Get your free report **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce12200-063d-4565-8b49-1035622a8cf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce12200-063d-4565-8b49-1035622a8cf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# Buttigieg's DEI disaster exposed! How a woke Biden hack screwed up America's flights
Pete Buttigieg prioritized DEI initiatives while failing to modernize outdated air-traffic-control systems during his tenure as Transportation Secretary, **[with industry sources claiming](https://substack.com/redirect/e499d48b-1671-47b0-ab32-b6ae9b3b24d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he told executives that upgrades would just allow more flights and wasn't in his interest, while showing "little to no interest" in modernization efforts.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e499d48b-1671-47b0-ab32-b6ae9b3b24d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The Department of Transportation under Buttigieg prioritized DEI initiatives over infrastructure** , spending more than $80 billion on roughly 400 diversity, equity and inclusion grants over four years--at least half of DOT's typical annual budget--compared to just 60 DEI grants worth a few billion under the previous administration.
* **The FAA remains chronically understaffed with only 80% of target controller levels** , leading to flight delays and the first nationwide grounding since 9/11 in January 2023 due to system outages, with industry officials warning it could take 90 years to reach proper staffing at current hiring rates.
* **Buttigieg frequently blamed airlines rather than addressing systemic FAA problems** , implementing consumer protection rules like automatic refunds and up to $1,000 compensation for delays, while industry officials argued he was more focused on being "good on TV" than fixing archaic systems dating to the Carter administration.
* **Republicans have now approved $12.5 billion for new Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy** to revamp FAA systems through Trump's recent legislation, with aviation experts calling Duffy "exceedingly attentive" compared to previous administrations and predicting he'll "stand out for decades as one of the most engaged secretaries."

# Gabbard threatens to release more details on Obama/Russiagate "conspiracy"
Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard announced more details will be released about **[alleged efforts by Barack Obama's administration to create false intelligence narratives](https://substack.com/redirect/3dd66ee7-8695-48fc-9c09-2642c41b9e32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about Russian interference in the 2016 election, calling it a "treasonous conspiracy" to undermine Trump's first term.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3dd66ee7-8695-48fc-9c09-2642c41b9e32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Gabbard claims Obama directed intelligence officials to "create" a new assessment in December 2016** that contradicted prior analyses and then used media allies to push the narrative that Russia "intervened to hack the election in Trump's favor," releasing 100 documents as evidence on Friday.
* **Gabbard's team is referring all records to the DOJ and FBI for criminal referral** , with Gabbard stating that Obama's actions "subvert[ed] the will of the American people" and amounted to "a years-long coup against President Trump, who was duly elected by the American people."
* **Democrats have dismissed Gabbard's claims** , with Rep. Jim Himes saying DOJ won't take action because "the howls of laughter from that court will be heard in four time zones," while Gabbard maintains intelligence community whistleblowers are coming forward and she expects prosecutions and indictments.

* * *
# Illegal alien who shot officer in face was previously released by Biden: DHS report
An illegal alien who **[was previously released by the Biden administration](https://substack.com/redirect/d027b99e-e18e-4767-8d83-678d05efb068?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** was allegedly involved in shooting a CBP officer during an attempted robbery in Manhattan's Fort Washington Park on Saturday night, with the officer currently hospitalized in stable condition after being shot in the face and arm.
* **The suspect, Miguel Francisco Mora Nunez from the Dominican Republic, had extensive criminal history** including prior arrests for felony assault, a deportation order from 2003, and an outstanding kidnapping warrant from Massachusetts when he was released by the Biden administration in April 2023.
* **Nunez was apprehended crossing the border illegally near San Luis, Arizona on April 4, 2023** but was released into the country despite his criminal background and existing deportation order, highlighting failures in the immigration enforcement system.
* **DHS released[surveillance footage showing two suspects on a motorcycle](https://substack.com/redirect/c191a99d-6cd3-4ec6-bad5-3f2b452fca97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/c191a99d-6cd3-4ec6-bad5-3f2b452fca97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)ambushing the off-duty CBP officer near a body of water, with one suspect getting off the bike and opening fire before both fled the scene, while NYPD continues investigating the incident.

body:
"Is it safe?" - Former Nazi Concentration Camp Dentist, Christian Szell, "Marathon Man"

# [Donald Trump, Jeffrey Epstein, and the Billionaire Protection Racket](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168858071&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4ODU4MDcxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxMDY1NjMsImV4cCI6MTc1NTY5ODU2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AufZxkb84VpjooZtmsm7BJmdg1dWir7pzTQE39tI9PM)
### Unpacking how Trump's Epstein coverup reveals a deeper rot in our politics--and why Americans are finally waking up.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Jul 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168858071&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4ODU4MDcxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzEwNjU2MywiZXhwIjoxNzU1Njk4NTYzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GvHpCk0k86g554kjJ5njed9T2SW0lRQYusggmpQ-IrE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168858071&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4ODU4MDcxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxMDY1NjMsImV4cCI6MTc1NTY5ODU2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AufZxkb84VpjooZtmsm7BJmdg1dWir7pzTQE39tI9PM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
