| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/donald-trump-jeffrey-epstein-and?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The two-week political crisis Donald Trump and the MAGA movement are facing over the Epstein cover-up is just a symptom of the deeper rot in this administration. The White House and Republican-led Congress operate like a protection and enrichment racket for corrupt billionaires and criminals.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..F_b8CoX0SuL-Mmp6RmW2tXxPnO7WV3uZC4mh7FxoQm0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168858071)
The same motivation that drove Trump to push a budget cutting 20 million Americans off Medicaid and taking food away from poor kids to fund billionaire tax breaks is the same motivation behind his effort--along with Pam Bondi and the rest of his cronies--to keep you from knowing who's in the Epstein files and who was on those flight logs.
Trump only cares about enriching himself and protecting his corrupt friends. That enrichment isn't just financial--it's about shielding them from consequences, whether it's white-collar fraud or pardoning the cop beaters from the January 6th riot to exploiting young girls on Epstein's island. It's disgusting. And it's everything that most Americans--including myself--despise about our politics. The rich and powerful are almost never held accountable.
During the 2008 financial crisis, tens of millions of Americans lost their homes and had their lives upended. No one responsible paid the price. As much as I admire Barack Obama--and I'm proud I dropped out of college to work for him--I hold him accountable for failing to bring justice to those who wrecked our economy. Whether it's the banks, Diddy, or whatever the hell happened to Epstein, it's the same story: the rich get away with it, again and again, while working people get crushed.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..F_b8CoX0SuL-Mmp6RmW2tXxPnO7WV3uZC4mh7FxoQm0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168858071)
But here's the good news: Americans are waking up. A new CBS poll just showed Trump's approval in free fall. Slowly, yes--but it's happening. He's gone from above 50% when he took office--when people were willing to give him a shot on real issues like grocery prices, housing, the border, and Ukraine--to now hovering in the low 40s. He is squandering every bit of goodwill he had.
And there are still millions of Americans--frustrated, hurting--who haven't fully turned on him yet, but are on the edge. They're holding out hope that someone will fix what's broken in their lives. I know he won't. And more people are starting to see that. Every day he focuses on circus politics, covers for sex traffickers, and lines the pockets of his rich friends, more Americans are going to realize they've been conned. And they're going to get angry.
That's when we have to be ready. Not to dunk on them. Not to shame them. But to reach out, meet them where they are, and have real conversations. These folks won't become Democrats overnight--let's be clear about that--but they _can_ come back to reality. And if they do, we can start rowing in the same direction again--toward a justice system that holds the powerful accountable, toward a government that actually builds things, provides health care, and helps people live with dignity.
This is a moment for the Democratic Party to reclaim its identity: the party of working people. The party of justice. The only party that gives a damn whether you can retire with dignity, raise a family, and live a life of purpose.
So yes--dig into the Epstein case. Call out the distraction politics Trump is running (like his ridiculous calls to jail Barack Obama and Adam Schiff.) But more importantly, use this moment to tell the truth about the system itself. Our politics are broken. Our government is broken. But it doesn't have to stay that way.
People are waking up. Let's meet them where they are--and show them there's a better way forward.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..F_b8CoX0SuL-Mmp6RmW2tXxPnO7WV3uZC4mh7FxoQm0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168858071)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._
_You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription._

clean_body: Unpacking how Trump's Epstein coverup reveals a deeper rot in our politics--and why Americans are finally waking up. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Unpacking how Trump's Epstein coverup reveals a deeper rot in our politics--and why Americans are finally waking up. | | | Jul 21 | | | | | | | | | | | | The two-week political crisis Donald Trump and the MAGA movement are facing over the Epstein cover-up is just a symptom of the deeper rot in this administration. The White House and Republican-led Congress operate like a protection and enrichment racket for corrupt billionaires and criminals. I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber. The same motivation that drove Trump to push a budget cutting 20 million Americans off Medicaid and taking food away from poor kids to fund billionaire tax breaks is the same motivation behind his effort--along with Pam Bondi and the rest of his cronies--to keep you from knowing who's in the Epstein files and who was on those flight logs. Trump only cares about enriching himself and protecting his corrupt friends. That enrichment isn't just financial--it's about shielding them from consequences, whether it's white-collar fraud or pardoning the cop beaters from the January 6th riot to exploiting young girls on Epstein's island. It's disgusting. And it's everything that most Americans--including myself--despise about our politics. The rich and powerful are almost never held accountable. During the 2008 financial crisis, tens of millions of Americans lost their homes and had their lives upended. No one responsible paid the price. As much as I admire Barack Obama--and I'm proud I dropped out of college to work for him--I hold him accountable for failing to bring justice to those who wrecked our economy. Whether it's the banks, Diddy, or whatever the hell happened to Epstein, it's the same story: the rich get away with it, again and again, while working people get crushed. I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber. But here's the good news: Americans are waking up. A new CBS poll just showed Trump's approval in free fall. Slowly, yes--but it's happening. He's gone from above 50% when he took office--when people were willing to give him a shot on real issues like grocery prices, housing, the border, and Ukraine--to now hovering in the low 40s. He is squandering every bit of goodwill he had. And there are still millions of Americans--frustrated, hurting--who haven't fully turned on him yet, but are on the edge. They're holding out hope that someone will fix what's broken in their lives. I know he won't. And more people are starting to see that. Every day he focuses on circus politics, covers for sex traffickers, and lines the pockets of his rich friends, more Americans are going to realize they've been conned. And they're going to get angry. That's when we have to be ready. Not to dunk on them. Not to shame them. But to reach out, meet them where they are, and have real conversations. These folks won't become Democrats overnight--let's be clear about that--but they can come back to reality. And if they do, we can start rowing in the same direction again--toward a justice system that holds the powerful accountable, toward a government that actually builds things, provides health care, and helps people live with dignity. This is a moment for the Democratic Party to reclaim its identity: the party of working people. The party of justice. The only party that gives a damn whether you can retire with dignity, raise a family, and live a life of purpose. So yes--dig into the Epstein case. Call out the distraction politics Trump is running (like his ridiculous calls to jail Barack Obama and Adam Schiff.) But more importantly, use this moment to tell the truth about the system itself. Our politics are broken. Our government is broken. But it doesn't have to stay that way. People are waking up. Let's meet them where they are--and show them there's a better way forward. I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Quick note from me on the latest polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I won’t take up too much of your time, but I needed to reach out.
Hey Peter, I won’t take up too much of your time, but I needed to reach out.
The fact is, three polls have now come out showing me with only a razor-thin lead over my opponent Jack Ciattarelli — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the race in his direction.
Even worse, the latest poll found that the constant lies being spread about me by Ciattarelli’s super PAC _actually work_ , Peter. When enough voters hear these false attacks — and the attacks go unanswered — the data shows that Ciattarelli can pull ahead.
Here’s what this all means:
**1) We don’t need to panic.** I’ve spent my life running toward tough fights — and I’ve spent my career in public service winning one tough race after another. I’m ready for this challenge.
**2) We can’t get complacent.** We need to reach out to every voter we possibly can and make sure they know the truth about my record and my vision for New Jersey’s future. And we need to make sure folks know my opponent’s agenda, which is to support every single move Donald Trump makes no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families.
**Peter, I’m going to be honest with you: fighting back against the attacks we’re facing, holding our opponent accountable for his record,_and_ spreading our positive vision for the future will all take resources — more resources than we currently have.**
**[So that’s why I HAVE to reach out to this grassroots team and ask for support. We’re locked in an incredibly competitive race, and the data is black-and-white that if we sit back and let Ciattarelli’s MAGA backers attack us without fighting back, we may lose this race. Can I count on you to split in a few dollars between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help power our fight and win this election?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92129?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92130?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92130?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92130?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92130?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92130?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92130?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92129?refcode=em20250721-9130&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9130%2E614464%2EGYzgMu)

Friend,
Governor Abbott is attempting to silence Black and Brown voters by redistricting the 18th Congressional District — the historic seat once held by legends like Barbara Jordan and Mickey Leland.
Amanda Edwards is taking a stand.
She’s calling on the people of TX-18 to rise up, get organized, and fight back. Her campaign is mobilizing residents across the district to demand fair representation and hold leaders accountable. TX-18 won’t be silenced.
From phone banking to hearings and a press conference, join her on the trail and be part of the fight for fair representation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gGBiXHgNike1vLlv3r92fw2]

subject: Tennessee's Black Legislative Leaders Are Shaping the Nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
body:
From Nashville to Washington: Black Leadership Rising
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K0PKPC4XXVHZXH15NH791CZ0_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K0PKPC4XXVHZXH15NH791CZ0_1)
---
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K0PKPC4XXVHZXH15NH791CZ0_2)
---
| Dear Peter, In a historic moment for Tennessee and the nation, two of our own have ascended to the highest ranks of the National Black Caucus of State Legislators (NBCSL):
* **State Representative Harold Love, Jr.** has been sworn in as NBCSL’s 16th President.
* **State Senator Raumesh Akbari** has been elected as President-Elect.

These trailblazers are not only representing Tennessee—they're setting the agenda for Black legislators across America. The Tennessee Legislative Black Caucus (TLBC) continues to lead on critical issues:
* Advocating for equitable education and healthcare access.
* Pushing for criminal justice reform and economic empowerment.
* Standing against voter suppression and discriminatory policies.**[nbcsl.org](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K0PKPC4XXVHZXH15NH791CZ0_3)**

Your support empowers TLBC members to fight for justice and equality.
---
| | [ Donate now to support Black leadership in Tennessee ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K0PKPC4XXVHZXH15NH791CZ0_4)
---
| Together, we can ensure that the voices of Black Tennesseans are heard and heeded. In solidarity, **T****ennessee House Democratic Caucus**

[**WHY DO YOU FIGHT FOR REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111858093/558615170/781210114?sourceid=1150811&utm_campaign=26emcge-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZhMDkyNi0zYjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34cLK2cnoq1VyrHwN_H_BnWLMV-Ql2UJ_kjOLIKRid4=&emci=5d98905e-6563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9b6a0926-3b66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) Peter,

Everyone deserves control over their body, their future, and their life. That's why we'll never stop fighting for reproductive freedom.

[**But your energy powers this movement. So tell us: why do you fight?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111858094/558615171/781210114?sourceid=1150811&utm_campaign=26emcge-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZhMDkyNi0zYjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34cLK2cnoq1VyrHwN_H_BnWLMV-Ql2UJ_kjOLIKRid4=&emci=5d98905e-6563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9b6a0926-3b66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111858096/558615172/781210114?sourceid=1150811&utm_campaign=26emcge-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZhMDkyNi0zYjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34cLK2cnoq1VyrHwN_H_BnWLMV-Ql2UJ_kjOLIKRid4=&emci=5d98905e-6563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9b6a0926-3b66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [**SHARE YOUR STORY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111858098/558615173/781210114?sourceid=1150811&utm_campaign=26emcge-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZhMDkyNi0zYjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34cLK2cnoq1VyrHwN_H_BnWLMV-Ql2UJ_kjOLIKRid4=&emci=5d98905e-6563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9b6a0926-3b66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "SHARE YOUR STORY")
---
Maybe it’s a personal experience. Maybe it’s what you believe in. Whatever it is, your voice matters. [**In dark times, your story can be someone's spark of hope.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111858099/558615174/781210114?sourceid=1150811&utm_campaign=26emcge-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZhMDkyNi0zYjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34cLK2cnoq1VyrHwN_H_BnWLMV-Ql2UJ_kjOLIKRid4=&emci=5d98905e-6563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9b6a0926-3b66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

We know a better future is possible—where reproductive rights are rightfully recognized as basic human rights. [**Until then, tell us what keeps you going.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111858100/558615175/781210114?sourceid=1150811&utm_campaign=26emcge-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZhMDkyNi0zYjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34cLK2cnoq1VyrHwN_H_BnWLMV-Ql2UJ_kjOLIKRid4=&emci=5d98905e-6563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9b6a0926-3b66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Onward,

Center for Reproductive Rights

That's why we'll never stop fighting for reproductive freedom. | "SHARE YOUR STORY" Maybe it’s a personal experience. Maybe it’s what you believe in. Whatever it is, your voice matters. We know a better future is possible—where reproductive rights are rightfully recognized as basic human rights. Onward, Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. body:
Your donations help us keep the fight going.
#

Team — we just marked the halfway point for the year, and we wanted to give you a sneak peek into our fundraising so far:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250721-1-b&t=1&akid=10690%2E3935704%2EDwBjzM)
This is the first number we see when we log into ActBlue. While the gun lobby relies on far-right billionaires to cut them fat checks, our average donation is just $21.84 — powered by grassroots supporters like you, ready for change.
We set a goal of raising $225,000 before the end of the month. Hitting this goal is critical to electing more gun safety leaders in 2025 and 2026.
We are slightly behind where we need to be for the week, which is why we’re hoping you can help us catch up today.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250721-1-b&t=2&akid=10690%2E3935704%2EDwBjzM)
[**So, can we count on you to chip in $21.84 — or whatever you can afford — before midnight to help GIFFORDS PAC hit our fundraising goal?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250721-1-b&t=3&akid=10690%2E3935704%2EDwBjzM)

name: Team Schiff
subject: Trump’s obsession with Adam Schiff just escalated -
body:
Peter —
Donald Trump is continuing to spiral. He just called for Adam to be prosecuted on Truth Social.
We cannot let this attack go unanswered. Will you rush a split donation between Real Texas PAC and Adam so we can fight back against these baseless accusations? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2]
It’s right out of the authoritarian playbook. It’s an attempt to silence the people who hold him accountable. It’s not just a rant. It’s a calculated smear campaign, designed to distract from Trump’s own failures.
Let’s be clear: Adam led Trump’s first impeachment. He’s called out Trump’s lies time and again. He’s never back down. And Trump can’t stand it.
So instead of offering solutions while Americans face sky-high costs and healthcare chaos, Trump is lashing out on Truth Social with desperate attacks and conspiracy-laced nonsense.
It’s not just unhinged. It’s dangerous.
But Adam isn’t backing down. He’s never backed down. Not when he led Trump’s first impeachment, and not now as a U.S. Senator holding Trump and his Administration accountable every day.
But Trump’s base is watching. They’re fired up. And they want revenge.
We need your help to respond — fast. Will you help us stand up to Trump’s continued attacks by chipping in a split donation between Adam and Real Texas PAC ? While Adam is working to deliver for working families, we need to respond to these insults and lies about his record. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_2&amount=5]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=071825_2&amount=25]
Thanks for your support.
Team Schiff

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you take a look at my resume?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials |

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c8caecb902534701ad1d56d6e797fa63&_e=NC3cDc7MVWjFcfuA74OFqHwGo0V_RMsgG8I3wHZ9SsvXga-X63eValAxAqJl2QfV-NvtaX08zpOEWnVDa9i-PrNTPHOLbJyeCH77y7h9NXBskylOWK9SeXE85F9N8xtPBwtSltXpxEGE3P7hVHC28Tz4m6CuWtUaAGRvUdxyBRb2Yx38687h3OfW9LzSzYcRdLTcCZh61c1_AcZSDSPhG9B5opuqEhu4BLJ9N6c2hcp1Rsh8h9Z_-611dt_6127P6iQ4XO_STSkTueKtogwXO03grqYzM1rEJ6Ul8igpgtaoXA2nE6tkW5e-hvz2490Mj5rhvLcxysmY5fiCPT51KEDinh5ecwgP4_H3WwlB_TtQnVQokpvJlndO-wOxJdbo7vrWHdul0lcP45WbnsDttfNlLiVWzSR5nJZZtyQ_obSsM0CcFV8ALWNy5NqWJ_AWa5csCukCTEF_KUZjNkD6-EUmWWec_JfOU44gaO9MX1fiA_p1lpHCwm43QDV7iNjv_KWvQXJQIcEfG54DlaitA7hacsOEo7agL2Uu2wcsNReTDexv2iZ51yOYYYPzmvX3e4s8_JhSeOSmn1pJPc5iEIYh5OUx1GI7J-x-QGjxRBToyUHklA7qY0PQB9vLtGDJzwCS8J5hijcexDzSy6n53grzzoqs8iCqmWov_puk3EwqmC6uAgqAb9gKG2hsNAos8jsW9LLOHf94uXLMlKVpDTPqKgQ05NH3uDVv_ZIeSaQIYfNsYTOmjdQOVp54fF50KmqthQDxLuTKqw7hHpP63kY6PKFt2BO74mpDZ2y7_W8%3D)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c8caecb902534701ad1d56d6e797fa63&_e=NC3cDc7MVWjFcfuA74OFqHwGo0V_RMsgG8I3wHZ9SsvXga-X63eValAxAqJl2QfV-NvtaX08zpOEWnVDa9i-PrNTPHOLbJyeCH77y7h9NXBskylOWK9SeXE85F9N8xtPBwtSltXpxEGE3P7hVHC28Tz4m6CuWtUaAGRvUdxyBRb2Yx38687h3OfW9LzSzYcRdLTcCZh61c1_AcZSDSPhG9B5opuqEhu4BLJ9N6c2hcp1Rsh8h9Z_-611dt_6127P6iQ4XO_STSkTueKtogwXO03grqYzM1rEJ6Ul8igpgtaMNFjB-ySQdyw6muaEM_y9FQI8qrQLR85Z0a92zL-8rqyM_VRWoCQCT07J4IA8A2RH7NOVKBFyirlq_zpDIHWG5hgQgw_MHTCZ1-s0zNdfiI0A2iFlhxjhR8DXWJFuLLuzx1OyMMjU6c4WO5xR4Z_6TK8eMW5kA40Wnhl8skUf78V1uWoJN8-CeN1zvEuLKBevusKbpI1CmBV4iB8u2AWF2uD8ryyfcM9uQtSz-Y1Fwq9SW-LqiVjEr9_2-qCNLPITVlM8-6dHQPv1aPkFHlQMdSgCWuazxU0geFWkE1CCLqsjm96LxjylaC1TuUIiGqma96Ej5RzmdCHYrwiuvPaoeyj8fqNay9jkj9CqyhBvFKPcbmSgXUYWsDWQzUKr5LL3YgQY8GytkZw33dw0baUgbXUroE0qb7u6pAxcvMwxDnsVCQ8bc4Hy7rwrWWFbvsqvKJJhYq300MpM8CdxUdHlFv2_57PN5ar3FKFuuJYlYrlKyID_3XDB4UqwuHPwmYQ%3D)**.

clean_body: I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: The Antimonopolist
subject: Big Cities vs. Chain Store Monopolies
body:
Hi there! I am pretty thrilled this morning, as an oped I wrote was just published by the New York Times: The essay was inspired by Zohran Mamdani winning the NYC mayoral primary on a grocery platform right after I saw Stacy Mitchell, who runs the Institute for Local Self-Reliance, give a great presentation about a critical grocery store policy we abandoned in the early 1980s. We've got to start building democracy from the ground up, and cities have a lot of unused power. In the oped, I talk | | | | [](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/d5b9422a?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---
[The Antimonopolist](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/3c76ca40?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
| [Big Cities vs. Chain Store Monopolies](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/e337e06b?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---
| By Zephyr Teachout • 21 Jul 2025 | [View in browser](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/28868523?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---|---
[View in browser](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/8cb9da02?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
| | | Hi there! I am pretty thrilled this morning, as an oped I wrote was just published by the New York Times:The essay was inspired by Zohran Mamdani winning the NYC mayoral primary on a grocery platform right after I saw [Stacy Mitchell](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/4c56639e?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21), who runs the Institute for Local Self-Reliance, give a great presentation about a critical grocery store policy we abandoned in the early 1980s. We've got to start building democracy from the ground up, and cities have a lot of unused power. In the oped, I talk about four things big cities (and states to take on the stranglehold of big chain grocery stores and big distributors/suppliers:
* Banning suppliers from giving sweetheart deals to big chain stores
* Enforcing city price gouging laws against suppliers
* Public investment in infrastructure that supports small farmers
* City level prohibitions against exclusive contracts that shut out small suppliers.

There's more! If Zohran does set up city owned grocery stores, they will actually serve a really important purpose that hasn't gotten talked about enough. Those grocery stores will be in a great position to expose the pricing games that big suppliers play, whether its with gouging or violating existing federal law against price discrimination. Most independent grocery stores are understandably scared of suing their suppliers even if there's a violation, because of fear of retaliation, but a city-owned store wouldn't face the same threat. And Mamdani has shown he's pretty good with bullies. I was really happy to get to write it because it joined two things we need more of- decentralized economic power and decentralized political power. Hope you enjoy,Zephyr[Support this newsletter](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/8c31e461?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21). Thanks!
---
| [ Comment ](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/84608d79?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---

name: DNC HQ
subject: This isn’t normal, Derek:
body:
---
Derek, Donald Trump and congressional Republicans just passed a _massively_ unpopular budget that slashes health care for regular Americans to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. Trump keeps raising prices with his chaotic trade war every day. And the GOP and his administration try to rewrite campaign finance laws to benefit themselves in the next election. As a cherry on top, Donald Trump spent the weekend finding excuses for why he hasn’t kept his promise to release the Epstein files. **None of this is normal.** What Donald Trump and Republicans are doing is threatening the lives and livelihoods of millions of Americans and the very foundation of our democracy. But we’re not powerless, and together we can chart a new path. Millions of Americans voted against Trump and MAGA Republicans, and they’re doing it again now. Democrats are overperforming in special elections, as people across the country use their votes to show how furious they are about Donald Trump and Republicans serving the ultra-wealthy over the American people. **Derek, every Democrat we elect is one more Democrat checking Trump’s power.** [**The DNC is the organization best positioned to move resources to the places they’re needed most, this year and beyond, so if holding Trump accountable and electing Democrats at every level matters to you, we’re asking you to join our fight and chip in $3 today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250721_4003_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4003_22930333_aG0HR0&akid=4003%2E22930333%2EaG0HR0) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250721_4003_fr&refcode2=4003_22930333_aG0HR0&akid=4003%2E22930333%2EaG0HR0)**

What Donald Trump and Republicans are doing is threatening the lives and livelihoods of millions of Americans and the very foundation of our democracy. But we’re not powerless, and together we can chart a new path. Millions of Americans voted against Trump and MAGA Republicans, and they’re doing it again now. Democrats are overperforming in special elections, as people across the country use their votes to show how furious they are about Donald Trump and Republicans serving the ultra-wealthy over the American people. Derek, every Democrat we elect is one more Democrat checking Trump’s power. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for standing with us, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

She's going to fight for Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. She's going to defend a woman's right to choose. And she will _always_ look out for Pennsylvanians. After kicking off a campaign event with her, I'm reaching out because you should know that she and her extremist opponent, Congressman Scott Perry, are facing off again in what just might be **the most competitive House race** in the country. She's got a real shot at winning PA-10! **[But it's going to take all of us doing our part to protect our democracy. Will you pitch in just a few dollars today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111862174/558627163/1797168669?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_072125_Shapiro_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTlmMTRlNjUtNDM2Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=az5wWaRT4rhvX6ZqXDgMwiPkrtGs2IkuCDwuo3o2Xrs=)** | | [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111862181/558627169/1797168669?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_072125_Shapiro_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTlmMTRlNjUtNDM2Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=az5wWaRT4rhvX6ZqXDgMwiPkrtGs2IkuCDwuo3o2Xrs=)

While the federal government is targeting seniors, veterans, and working families, Scott Perry has done absolutely nothing to stand up for Pennsylvanians. Instead, voted to support a budget that will kick millions off their healthcare plans, increase insurance premiums, give tax cuts to people who don’t need it, and increase the federal deficit by $3.4 trillion.
**_Scott Perry's time is up._**
But with all eyes on Pennsylvania right now, GOP dark money groups are about to start pouring millions of dollars into our battleground state to protect Scott Perry's vulnerable seat.
**The path to a House majority lies through PA-10** , and it's up to us to fight back today if we want to replace Scott Perry with a leader who will protect our reproductive rights, defend our democracy, and defeat extremism once and for all.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi team, it's Governor Josh Shapiro from Pennsylvania. My good friend Janelle Stelson just announced that she's running for Congress again, and I'm proud to give her my full endorsement. She's a decent, honorable person who respects the rule of law and respects you. She's going to fight for Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. She's going to defend a woman's right to choose. And she will always look out for Pennsylvanians. After kicking off a campaign event with her, I'm reaching out because you should know that she and her extremist opponent, Congressman Scott Perry, are facing off again in what just might be the most competitive House race in the country. She's got a real shot at winning PA-10! = | | = While the federal government is targeting seniors, veterans, and working families, Scott Perry has done absolutely nothing to stand up for Pennsylvanians. Instead, voted to support a budget that will kick millions off their healthcare plans, increase insurance premiums, give tax cuts to people who don’t need it, and increase the federal deficit by $3.4 trillion. Scott Perry's time is up. But with all eyes on Pennsylvania right now, GOP dark money groups are about to start pouring millions of dollars into our battleground state to protect Scott Perry's vulnerable seat. The path to a House majority lies through PA-10 , and it's up to us to fight back today if we want to replace Scott Perry with a leader who will protect our reproductive rights, defend our democracy, and defeat extremism once and for all. Jamie Raskin’s Democracy Summer fellows, who helped our campaign knock THOUSANDS of doors!** ****[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6Ga_--4zVWj6DqJv8SzKwqC0b1ZG9osKK1YpYpn16xAjTh7SmrJc1pKT5Mf4qJfSp-zMmq8odNWcKP8G-YRLTW-GMuKSJa_Ero6eRsLXxrll0ilV8sFMrLdMLDuq73wkf9ZkRiqFEf4b8fY5ZPkXqgao_8iqv7UzbVwkqhN8-ohEe7VDjZjjLD0gIGKED1lcxNJfQkCB1JrZTmQZgSI8X6k/4id/0CixtpcKRcen4_2CQc5vkA/h0/h001.h_dyy6O4MxF5p1UH0N-hjCDWsfzzEjJtvCZvs5LLesE)[**Republicans want to end Democratic control of the Virginia House of Delegates this November, but we won’t let them. Show Trump Republicans that we’re FIGHTING BACK by donating today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviDLsjkl4W45eYlyK1IsPmVDFmEpg-g7jdexP5HrvpLqGVajEjCZg-xUN3_AlYzYtAmgEynv2agU45PV9FbK48eQ4_T8SXxRbEBggrFr2TfX_sbXT0Ta1zoqvHUe4nQ-z768wVwQTELwFKyXwXEHb_8DIRouCdHLCLLvCwRMS4M8tXjw-XdjLEjk7Qim87b7zLTKeag0bJVYl4MJcyIZ2V7A/4id/0CixtpcKRcen4_2CQc5vkA/h1/h001.A0rypnLrNttTl63sshjpWkVtlFQDkhI7-5GRoMmMTNo)

* * *
After Donald Trump was elected in 2016, I ran for office to fight back, becoming the first immigrant Latina in the Virginia House of Delegates. I didn’t win by myself - it took tens of thousands of grassroots donations and tens of thousands of doorknocks to defeat an eight-term Republican incumbent. **Now, I’m running to return to the House of Delegates against a vulnerable Republican incumbent.** Our volunteers and I are out every day of the week, talking to persuadable voters one on one. **We can’t stay out there without backup from grassroots donors like you.** Your donations help us buy canvassing supplies like literature and snacks. And, you’ll help us counter an upcoming barrage of misleading negative ads. [**The more we raise online, the more time we can spend on the doors. body:
YOUR 2025 NRCC MEMBERSHIP CARD IS READY

Friend,
We just checked our records -- and we still don't see your name on the official NRCC Membership List for 2025.
That's a missed opportunity.
Our conservative House Majority is dedicated to stopping the radical left's dangerous agenda, but we can't do it alone. We depend on grassroots patriots like you to help us hold the line and fuel our fight.
When you activate your 2025 NRCC Membership Card today, you're doing more than joining a team. You're standing for freedom, fiscal responsibility, and the future of our great nation.
This exclusive card represents your commitment to conservative values -- and we need every top supporter on board before our next report deadline.

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=168671512&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjcxNTEyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxMTA0NzIsImV4cCI6MTc1NTcwMjQ3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Y5At11B6PPtjTS2yHmOcled-EpR1l1l9LlFDh48w7b0)
---
| | [](https://substack..0Jnu1-OpKRhTqSDrci_tmnAqTE0q8DoXkq2EfqLbTV4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/the-death-of-partying?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

An article came out recently that Americans aren't partying as much as we used to. My friend Derek Thompson has been cataloguing this in what he calls the [Anti-Social Century](https://substack.com/redirect/696ca944-f1a5-4144-89c2-366509b53efe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The latest American Time Use Survey last month had some jarring facts:
1\. Between 2003 and 2024, the amount of time that Americans spent attending or hosting a social event declined by 50 percent.
2\. Among young people ages 15 to 24, they spent 70 percent less time attending or hosting parties in 2024 than in 2003.
3\. Men who watch television now spend 7 hours doing so for every hour they spend hanging out with another person outside the house.
4\. The average female pet owner spends more time with her pet than all humans put together.
I was 28 years old in 2003. At that time, I was a party promoter in Manhattan. Yes, that's partially how I spent my twenties. I threw parties under the name "Ignition NYC" with a couple of partners. I did it for a few reasons as a young aspiring entrepreneur, but those years comprise some of my fondest memories of young adulthood. Did I meet Evelyn at one of those parties? No I did not. But that's not the point.
Apparently we are just about half as social now as we were back then.
This makes me sad on any number of levels. What are the causes? Of course screens are a major factor - you used to have to go out to see people or communicate with them. That's what bars were for. Now, you can sit in your bedroom and like and comment. There are dating apps to meet people. COVID changed our culture these past several years. Young people drink a lot less alcohol, which isn't something you'd generally point out as a problem.
I think a lot of it, personally, has to do with average prosperity. Let's say I move into a nice new apartment at 25 years old with a friend. Maybe we have a little housewarming party. I meet somebody. We date for a while and get engaged. We throw an engagement party to celebrate. We get married. Then we buy a starter house as a couple when we're 30. We invite our friends and family over to see the house. We have couples over for dinner. Then we have a baby shower.
That's at least six parties right there.
But today, maybe instead of an apartment you're in your parents' spare bedroom - not exactly an ideal environment to have someone over. Maybe you have multiple roommates. There's no housewarming party because there's no house. Parties are often used to celebrate a new stage. Every stage is harder now.
Throwing a party is an optimistic act. You need a place to throw said party. You need the time to plan it. You need to have the confidence that people will come. Maybe you need some money to buy the food and drink. Your friends need to have the time and ability to attend.
Related - I remember going to concerts for $25 or $30 back in 2003. Today, those tickets might cost 5 times as much.
A thought experiment for you - if everyone received $1,000 a month in Universal Basic Income, would there be more partying? Sources say yes.
A prosperous society parties more. A sad, lonely society parties less.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a8b84a6-ab8e-4674-a121-42c5282c895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As you can see, I am distressed by this new normal. So a few months ago I threw a no-phones Offline Party in Manhattan. I booked a venue and had my friend [Conrad Taylor](https://substack.com/redirect/81ac2c46-fe97-482c-8da1-cf484adca875?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) DJ. Over 350 people showed up. Finally, my 7-figure social media following paid off! At our next party, 700 people showed up. Apparently, word had spread that the first one was a great time. This past week we took Offline on the road to Los Angeles, and 400 people showed up. That's over 1,000 people coming out, making memories and having a good time. Who knows, maybe someone met someone. Evelyn has been joking that now she knows what it was like to date me in my twenties.
I'm someone who pursues both bottom-up and top-down solutions. On this one, it's something we can do in our own lives.
This might sound ridiculous, but if you have the ability to do so, invite people over to do something. Maybe host a barbecue or a game night. When you're on the fence of going out to someone else's thing, get off your ass and go out. You'll be glad you did. Netflix will still be there the next day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a8b84a6-ab8e-4674-a121-42c5282c895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's take matters into our own hands. Put down your phone. It's time to [Make America Party Again](https://substack.com/redirect/5a8b84a6-ab8e-4674-a121-42c5282c895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
To join the Offline Party list click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/5a8b84a6-ab8e-4674-a121-42c5282c895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - we will be heading back to New York, then to Boston, the Bay Area, Austin and Chicago. To see what we are doing at Forward click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/9d764355-773b-4b8f-96f9-6f89f374e8eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). My friends Ali Partovi and Claire Shorall have started [Sway](https://substack.com/redirect/9a16f1be-48d0-496c-8a09-81daa2915cc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a new platform to empower civic activism. For my interview with them, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/22ecae49-c7e1-475c-a8e7-b5f4e25bc21c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If you've ever wanted to get people behind you to make a change in your community, [Sway](https://substack.com/redirect/9a16f1be-48d0-496c-8a09-81daa2915cc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) makes it a lot easier!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe31c07-6c38-42c5-b0e1-3e4f1469c080?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

body:
YES! 🔥
| **Pete Buttigieg is NOT backing down!!!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92264?t=6&akid=20669%2E878179%2EaU362A) [**But now, Trump and his minions are trying to SILENCE Buttigieg — he’s one of their top targets! So we need 2,000 Democrats to sign our letter THANKING Pete Buttigieg, and you’re the first one we’ve selected »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92264?t=7&akid=20669%2E878179%2EaU362A) | [**THANK PETE BUTTIGIEG: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92264?t=8&akid=20669%2E878179%2EaU362A)
---
TO: Pete Buttigieg
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Pete Buttigieg,

**THANK YOU for being a consistently strong voice against Donald Trump’s MAGA regime!**

I know that Trump has put a huge target on your back for speaking up — so it means the world that you aren’t backing down even a little bit.

**You’re absolutely right. Republicans deserve to lose power, so I’m doing everything I can to help flip the House and Senate in 2026!**

If Democrats band together with leaders like you, I know we have what it takes to crush the GOP’s fragile majorities, SAVE Social Security and Medicare, _and get this country back on track!_

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to stand up to Trump! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92264?t=9&akid=20669%2E878179%2EaU362A) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92264?t=10&akid=20669%2E878179%2EaU362A)

**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20669%2E878179%2EaU362A). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20669%2E878179%2EaU362A).**

name: Voter Research // Voter Action Project
subject: Voter poll: Just another suppression tactic?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=a3jzPiHLXHVI/natSmK3GTaJ/6YAEn+6vKqwD1qpdBjXCkpU5z9E1H7uZ4BK3lZ0x89AOwe+TMpJu7mZ6Jpy7EQ8hwqW1YL61quFp/9gdrc=]
Fox News: NC Supreme Court rejects voter ID law, state electoral map, claiming 'racially motivated purpose' [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Fox_NC_VoterID.png]
We want to hear from likely voters in your area about the Voter ID laws under consideration in several states. Will you take our one-question poll right away?

Keep the Flame of Liberty Burning Bright!

subject: The heartland is next

body:
My fight won’t be won with tweets or press releases. I need you on my side to get this done. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4548ec8a59b94b5d92b04f3b365a6c58&_e=io6sUyaNoIq2ePkWoqwHBCNKNe1SN14ei_AxfAkudSP6UtC_lv5Ky5BJPjcd723E9JFbIxtEOFa_h91MwQXr3L73eURkTS7F4-gLB4oL9uWRvVlihn6VtgzbvcmDfrS2E05k7E8kJISr0O_ctxrh_Ob4Bm9rsUQzo08eHnHK3_XH99VeZZZHhjS1HkjQ_T850V3BRm8UKX5U1K58E3PFVJbkFpclKAUi6vwccR4nku_SALARxOLAPPflvl27s55YwEggFFm7MzrWnpV7UANeiMtGrWts0IbGIltDpmZ8WM98Mw9oFcAT7LRQ3Ng5QbdKKBNQngIgHTvrHxrfoYNF4hL2DYb9TJSt6vkVDu6FXKwKbP377wjMlArWcgHuthPjD3vecTAC9yt1rXibahtIXRtj0PxhE1KMnZb2pfZEhsqlVzEsbo-4TdUA6YyzaunDgX6JHiytnfW5_fByEJi9hd-SyfnAxw2XdpEqSa7oVXRAUEm_vjiP7BRGeh-_W-cRSenHy4V7nYFTt_9SPTE6iZKb-ujePUuHHF5Ev0i6tE3obEtqLf92p0U0mnDW3sewuuLvk7qPpeLVPXCA6hPtTxqiBThnWBMuqQz4-NWvd1erDd2SQHeVnHpNeboFvD4aVdapI3Dznu7qgOlea7n9SACjO5qetQx8kDlTia4hb2oGGr8dL21LvVt1b8NHiu5K-9wKncEvvaJ9lvbp-Yn0uJ6Xb5TveUAO7Q931PyHi8U99bYE2jg2Rum0S7QxU19m7hDNJ_aBHnuNP1OZGhumF7QWUED6ZewDZNwndSRIZcvqyBJd7qBKceT62BAcV1lRnSfp8gEABlvglEb_ifuUVx0jlfVgJav18p4HJ6dYa55yaj0swUeeDeFlg24gzn0E-0E7sdvd7r6PqG4qsfEqjoTN0FR5o6C6DtB9V7IAxIKRGUdjUVTyoVH0KO7LK8cHDqfNA7N15qTIzT2VJt7yBw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out.

I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today?

Hear me out.

I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender.

_**And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading.
**_
In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left.

The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota.

[**ENLIST WITH ME TO SAVE AMERICA →**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4548ec8a59b94b5d92b04f3b365a6c58&_e=io6sUyaNoIq2ePkWoqwHBCNKNe1SN14ei_AxfAkudSP6UtC_lv5Ky5BJPjcd723E9JFbIxtEOFa_h91MwQXr3L73eURkTS7F4-gLB4oL9uWRvVlihn6VtgzbvcmDfrS2E05k7E8kJISr0O_ctxrh_Ob4Bm9rsUQzo08eHnHK3_XH99VeZZZHhjS1HkjQ_T850V3BRm8UKX5U1K58E3PFVJbkFpclKAUi6vwccR4nku_SALARxOLAPPflvl27s55YwEggFFm7MzrWnpV7UANeiMtGrWts0IbGIltDpmZ8WM98Mw9oFcAT7LRQ3Ng5QbdKKBNQngIgHTvrHxrfoYNF4hL2DYb9TJSt6vkVDu6FXKwKbP377wjMlArWcgHuthPjdMp4sdWC6O57k7gDxcLCIZNsegKYqnxGwrEXsPS4lg3_j4c4O-peR40az3O1mWYVEzETDDVA2PN7Q_aN5vYJExcyAmTDbDFf0sTQPkPdOYcmv3OkWs8HvNtN8G1-KMSSpBYtFdWbTIyPm2JID_1f1fPH1j7RB6_vFa1fNTnWtWX3Yi99t_eVyzaX09lw31d21eismng0SnND116q0FixmcTssng7VzjjVrrLLXY3tpnS-UEc9YWUJNrKDCZhtI3ZbAZGpdJIgf1yIQ-OHA3Qmoz9PNyYD0Tr3Vpk81ysJa8kUnLnJsi0NGVFu0KYZLIIJA72_YCH9gDjwjQ7xgQJQFqRlajAZFHgeHvrVkRfbVNv7CYGC1oTrspQn3Spu5PbUZhG0EyKLTTDHjbdEiTpKtcsOtdNORhKn8rjxa36slXbziZy1x8aAZylBiyJuR-jgwL0nsc366SjBRvvYJ2mL9UnnqbKwBgyzRBCWdwAen4jICuS2eMO9hPlx5kGgM2fUriwl76Ub4lHmhnpa3JIdaxT8mcs-gxCQvfMGUnafymLlZo2xL7HkB0YvUCjvT-3hIUIuGYDews2XE_A0jLfIw%3D%3D)

As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I know how to be a part of a team and manage one.

I am confident that much more can be accomplished when the unit works together.**[That’s why I’m asking for you to join me and my team today, while it’s early in the election cycle, so that we can formulate the best plan of action to win this seat and hold the Senate majority.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4548ec8a59b94b5d92b04f3b365a6c58&_e=io6sUyaNoIq2ePkWoqwHBCNKNe1SN14ei_AxfAkudSP6UtC_lv5Ky5BJPjcd723E9JFbIxtEOFa_h91MwQXr3L73eURkTS7F4-gLB4oL9uWRvVlihn6VtgzbvcmDfrS2E05k7E8kJISr0O_ctxrh_Ob4Bm9rsUQzo08eHnHK3_XH99VeZZZHhjS1HkjQ_T850V3BRm8UKX5U1K58E3PFVJbkFpclKAUi6vwccR4nku_SALARxOLAPPflvl27s55YwEggFFm7MzrWnpV7UANeiMtGrWts0IbGIltDpmZ8WM98Mw9oFcAT7LRQ3Ng5QbdKKBNQngIgHTvrHxrfoYNF4hL2DYb9TJSt6vkVDu6FXKwKbP377wjMlArWcgHuthPj9O4g9HJG4GAV-X9Vn3PMmQl-LPZzcqYO8tXC9kRhFV3_FuuwKazrZpFJ8SJ0Zgh2UJgbV51CZAReERqngvrCEaZblTuxx87blmXu2-OD3W4wQ6McfjlT12f5gaqXxqIPC5k8igRwYmuASZiNnvxECMR80faF_7tiidVe0eCKp0S5sOey1TsSq9pGzbdRrb3-7uoYyslny9jlPFa1o9cI8JxazV1uCEke-CdxvKtzRUv4Kfl5MaqOss1-qx1nzGvYPGKtYwJDhQZXxfkOHBz6oDKO_n1HerrJ4QYhhY7y62fvTZzOwqNA0Bt5q039M1vm4hDDXjRPbXTlQmXLBtyh2Mx7tg7Bd1-YIO-8__NznkrGqG_uY47iA6Pyu8mTEZF928hQyZ7huNvBEvU0OxVeo63AQO2j-YX_X0v8droISBWwajr8bxrXe2dfYD8-I6Xcq1ny1n-EpOP2YOh9gpacrPkQIgAp4rqgTbuqd1O-wgiJZIQ-UIgeDTdAG1dHFdZCy1cT3udGsEoXXVGcHWYuLSt0nOBoa7hcKLipk-PlX2dHwn9n6UU7qJWG2PeEkV-Ig9b8GQZTKQp0PmWZrE6KnQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: My fight won’t be won with tweets or press releases. I need you on my side to get this done. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out. I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today? Hear me out. I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender. And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading. In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left. The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota. As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I know how to be a part of a team and manage one. I am confident that much more can be accomplished when the unit works together. We’ve already built early momentum, and thousands of grassroots conservatives have joined our ranks. But now we’re entering a critical phase. We need grassroots strength to keep this mission alive — to fuel ads, organize events, and push back against the far-left machine. You don’t have to give anything, but if you believe America is still worth defending, For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| Working people deserve better than Trump and his MAGA billionaire administration. With Trump's relentless attack on working people across the country, it's more important than ever that we stand with workers' rights. His billionaire buddies are doing everything to reap their profit while attacking working people and stripping away their rights. But Peter, workers have been first to fight for earning better wages, safer working conditions, and putting people first instead of profit. [Will you add your name in support of working people's rights before midnight tonight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb179cb56-f340-438c-a9ca-fc77253bb6c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90b94289-53aa-4ddb-b9f2-baf96a69a075/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey Peter, it’s Jon. _This just in:_ A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive **__$5 million_**_ ad buy attacking me.
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250721-1-f&t=1&akid=567%2E5691347%2EvHeX0I)
If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-july25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250721-1-f&t=2&akid=567%2E5691347%2EvHeX0I)
Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today.
This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Peter. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me.
Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — _they lock it in for the long-term._
With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law.
So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message:
Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid, and defunds hospitals and nursing homes.
We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights.
And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history.
I will fight, and I _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone.
[**So please, make a donation of $10 — or whatever you are in a place to give — to my re-election campaign today to help me fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250721-1-f&t=3&akid=567%2E5691347%2EvHeX0I)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250721-1-f&t=4&akid=567%2E5691347%2EvHeX0I)**
Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.
And come next November, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you — for everything.
— Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=567%2E5691347%2EvHeX0I) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=567%2E5691347%2EvHeX0I) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Marc Elias
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias.

For years, I've gone to court to stop Trump and defend democracy -- and I've won 64 times. **Now, working with the DSCC, we're doing our part to safeguard voting rights, uphold the rule of law, and protect your freedom.**

But I won't lie: Trump's actions put all that work at risk -- and we need to fight back NOW. [**Support from grassroots Democrats like you is what powers the fight to flip the Senate so Democrats can put a stop to Trump's extremism. Will you give $5 to the DSCC to help us stop Trump's allies by winning back a Democratic Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=20804%2E9716520%2EPHUIKo)

Let me explain further:

Donald Trump is ignoring due process and openly mocking the courts. He's threatening the very foundation of our democracy by attacking fair, free, and secure elections. And he's going after voting rights -- the very bedrock of our democracy.

Worst of all, Trump has a seemingly **endless** supply of fools and cowards in the Republican Party who are willing to help him.

But the DSCC and I are fighting back: The _moment_ Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten voting rights, we filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats nationwide. And the good news is, we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over yet. Donald Trump is an aspiring despot -- not just for a single day -- and despots _never_ willingly give up their power. We have to take it from them.**

Winning the Senate is the first step, and Democrats need to flip just four seats to claim the majority and wrest power away from the GOP.

**As I've said before, the fight for democracy is the fight of our generation.[Right now, the best thing YOU can do is chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand in this fight with me to unseat Senate Republicans and elect a Democratic Senate majority the first chance we get >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=20804%2E9716520%2EPHUIKo)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=20804%2E9716520%2EPHUIKo)

---
| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=9&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250721-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=20804%2E9716520%2EPHUIKo)

name: Dinesh =?UTF-8?Q?D=E2=80=99Souza?=
subject: I need you to know something very important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6qingu04d3t8q42ii7u4rr95n24abn8jnsc8re8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chh66oj4cph2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsg99jjj83d4imtesbvqemn8dqkvr77l7efsv6r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chh66oj4cph2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfbtcklpaau2srt8gd2r8k73kdpq8jadmqt37t60_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chh66oj4cph2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfm8n0hkq03armlpnglh3q96ae6bbe5u2uqcadfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chh66oj4cph2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza
---
|
---

---

Friend,

The Supreme Court just stepped aside and gave Donald Trump permission to do whatever he wants with no explanation and no accountability. Just a quiet order giving Trump the green light to fire over 1,300 people from the Department of Education.

That’s right, the Supreme Court essentially gave Trump the go-ahead to gut the very agency that protects civil rights in our schools, supports students with disabilities, enforces Title IX, and ensures states are actually doing right by our kids.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 7/21/2025
body:
What’s really in Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”? We break it down—and why it matters for Colorado families.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**July 21, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
****There’s been a lot of noise about President Trump’s**“One Big Beautiful Bill”** —from media spin to partisan meltdowns—but we’re here to cut through the chaos and tell you the truth.

This bill is a game-changer.

Signed earlier this month, the OBBB (Officially: the [Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)) delivers major wins for working families, energy producers, and taxpayers. It makes the 2017 Trump tax cuts permanent, eliminates income tax on tips and overtime, slashes federal deficits by $1.5 trillion, and reintroduces oil and gas leasing on federal lands—creating jobs and energy security. [[Read my full breakdown of the bill here.]](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

It also includes conservative reforms that Democrats in Colorado have refused to touch—like eligibility checks and minimum work requirements for Medicaid, and $50 billion to support struggling rural hospitals. While our state legislature spends millions on DEI consultants and wolves, Colorado’s working class has been taxed into exhaustion. The Big Beautiful Bill puts working Americans first again.

And it’s striking a chord here in Colorado. So much so that there's a [special session on the horizon](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

For Colorado families, the bill offers real promise—especially when it comes to education. Tucked into the legislation is the [Educational Choice for Children Act (ECCA)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), offering a $1,700 federal tax credit to individuals who donate to approved Scholarship Granting Organizations, which can fund private, religious, or homeschool education. While the money is private—not tax dollars—and designed to avoid government strings, each state must opt in, and how the rules apply to homeschoolers will depend on future implementation.

Parents—frustrated with progressive overreach in public schools—are turning to homeschooling in record numbers, growing [51% in the last decade](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). New polling shows that [safety](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), not religion, is now the #1 reason families are leaving the system. In a state where [school boards keep doubling down](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) on radical curricula and [gender politics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), it’s no wonder parents are seeking new options. Whether Colorado opts in to the ECCA remains to be seen, but the message is clear: choice is on the rise, and the homeschool movement is gaining traction at exactly the right time.

This is the beginning of something bigger. ****
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
