---
**[Behind closed doors: Leaked memos reveal how Durango 9-R Schools avoided a DEI lawsuit—until now](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Durango School District 9-R changed its hiring policy this spring without a public announcement—but the move didn’t go unnoticed. According to a new federal civil rights complaint filed by Mountain States Legal Foundation (MSLF) and authored by its general counsel, William Trachman, the district had for years pushed a race-conscious hiring agenda, encouraged by internal equity committees and shielded by carefully worded legal guidance.
**[Ganahl: What’s inside the ‘Big Beautiful Bill’—and why it’s a game-changer for families and freedom](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) They’re calling it the “Big Beautiful Bill”—and whether you love it or hate it, it’s the boldest shakeup to our tax and spending system since Trump’s 2017 tax cuts. Officially titled the Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act, this legislation does a lot: extends the Trump tax cuts, rewrites how safety net programs work, beefs up border and defense spending, and trims down the green energy handouts.

**[Gaines: Bureaucrats are making the rules—and you’re paying for it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rulemaking is the process by which our legislature delegates the task of regulating specific actions and behaviors. In a rough sense it works like this. Say the legislature wants to make a law so that building owners don’t scrimp on elevator expenses to the detriment of public safety. The legislature, rather than directly telling landlords what to do, will task an executive agency with a general set of constraints, telling the agency to come up with rules and regulations that “protect the public safety” or other such phrases. The executive agency then sets the actual policy: what does safety look like for elevators, how is it checked?
|

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado had the third highest rent and fifth highest home prices in 2023, according to a first-of-its-kind analysis from a zoning group. Compiled by a group called National Zoning Atlas, the analysis examined zoning codes in all 334 of Colorado’s jurisdictions to assess how zoning affects housing affordability in the state.
**[Colorado Sues Trump Admin Over Withheld Funds Due to “Failure to Deliver”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado has joined 23 other states and Washington, D.C., in suing the Trump administration over its decision to freeze $6.8 billion in grant funding that helps school districts across the country operate after-school programs, train teachers, and boost resources and support for kids with significant learning needs.

**[Lake Powell Power Crisis: Hydropower Threatened as Water Levels Plunge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Federal officials reported Tuesday that the water level in Lake Powell, one of the main water storage reservoirs for the Colorado River Basin, could fall low enough to stop hydropower generation at the reservoir by December 2026.

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Each year, children continue to arrive at the southern border without anyone to look after them. They’re officially called unaccompanied alien children—or UACs—but behind that label are thousands of kids trying to navigate an immigration system meant for adults.

**[Weaponized DOJ? FBI Launched ‘Grand Conspiracy’ Case Against Trump After Dropping Clinton Foundation Investigations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The FBI has quietly launched an investigation into a decade of Democratic party and deep-state antics from Russia collusion to Jack Smith, opening the door for the appointment of a special prosecutor to examine whether the well-documented episodes amount to a criminal conspiracy to meddle in three U.S. elections to the benefit of Democrats and the detriment of President Donald Trump, Just the News has learned.

**[Marketing group CEO rejects $20M offer to stage anti-Trump protests: ‘Didn’t want to be involved’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[POST MILLENNIAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The CEO of “Crowds on Demand” has said that he rejected an offer of $20 million to organize the “Good Trouble Lives On” protests taking place on July 17. The CEO of Crowds on Demand Adam Stewart told reporters at News Nation, “We rejected an offer that probably is worth around $20 million ... The value of the contract would have been worth around that amount nationwide to organize huge demonstrations around the country. But personally, I just don’t think it’s effective.”

**[Denver sues to keep federal funds while limiting ICE cooperation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

__
**[Denver City Council Eyes Risky Shift to Ranked-Choice Voting for Local Elections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[AXIOS DENVER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) If Denver’s current municipal election system isn’t broken, why fix it? The big picture: It’s a refrain from Denver City Council members opposing a bill that would change city elections to ranked choice voting. Yes, but: Despite reservations, they advanced the bill Tuesday to the full council. __

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In this ninth chapter of The COvid Chronicles, summer arrived—but sanity didn’t. __
**[Devotional: The darkroom where truth becomes life](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _There was something sacred about that small darkroom in my father’s house. During those custody visits with my dad, I recall slipping into a mysterious room filled with the faint scent of chemicals, the dim red glow, and the quiet hum of transformation. It wasn’t just a room — it was a portal where blurry, black-and-white film strips turned into full-color memories._

clean_body: Chris is focused on what really matters. | | | Big news: Another Republican just entered the primary for New Hampshire's Senate seat. He's another Trump rubber stamp — he even refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. That means Scott Brown and the growing GOP field will be facing off to see who can appease the MAGA loyalists the most and earn Donald Trump's endorsement in this race. While the Republicans wade through their messy primary, Chris Pappas is focused on what really matters — standing up for Granite Staters and fighting for our future. Chris has won competitive elections in New Hampshire four times in a row. But he can't win this fight alone. He is relying on the support of this grassroots team to make sure we can defeat whichever MAGA clone the Republicans decide to nominate against him. = = Thank you, Team Pappas | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Quick note from me on the latest polling
body:
I won’t take up too much of your time, but I needed to reach out.
Hey Peter, I won’t take up too much of your time, but I needed to reach out.
The fact is, three polls have now come out showing me with only a razor-thin lead over my opponent Jack Ciattarelli — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the race in his direction.
Even worse, the latest poll found that the constant lies being spread about me by Ciattarelli’s super PAC _actually work_ , Peter. When enough voters hear these false attacks — and the attacks go unanswered — the data shows that Ciattarelli can pull ahead.
Here’s what this all means:
**1) We don’t need to panic.** I’ve spent my life running toward tough fights — and I’ve spent my career in public service winning one tough race after another. I’m ready for this challenge.
**2) We can’t get complacent.** We need to reach out to every voter we possibly can and make sure they know the truth about my record and my vision for New Jersey’s future. And we need to make sure folks know my opponent’s agenda, which is to support every single move Donald Trump makes no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families.
**Peter, I’m going to be honest with you: fighting back against the attacks we’re facing, holding our opponent accountable for his record,_and_ spreading our positive vision for the future will all take resources — more resources than we currently have.**
**[So that’s why I HAVE to reach out to this grassroots team and ask for support. We’re locked in an incredibly competitive race, and the data is black-and-white that if we sit back and let Ciattarelli’s MAGA backers attack us without fighting back, we may lose this race. Can I count on you to split in a few dollars between my campaign and Wes Moore to help power our fight and win this election?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250721-1?refcode=em-20250721-1&refcode2=338_1086043_dkujb5&akid=338%2E1086043%2Edkujb5)**
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250721-1?amount=10&refcode=em-20250721-1&refcode2=338_1086043_dkujb5&akid=338%2E1086043%2Edkujb5)**
Thank you,
Mikie Sherrill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250721-1&t=1&refcode2=338_1086043_dkujb5&akid=338%2E1086043%2Edkujb5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=338%2E1086043%2Edkujb5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=338%2E1086043%2Edkujb5)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

body:
Hi team,
Earlier this month, Republicans in Congress passed a bill that will rip healthcare away from 16 million people, take food off the table for 40 million people, raise costs for working families, and eliminate jobs .
House Republicans are pushing to cut millions of Americans off of programs like Medicaid and food stamps, while New Dems are standing up for the people who need them most – working families, seniors, and children.
While House Republicans give more tax breaks to the ultra-rich, we’re fighting for a fair economy that works for every American.
Republicans are enabling Trump to undermine the rule of law to push a partisan agenda, New Dems are focused on uniting Americans around the common cause to defend our democracy.
This cruel bill only makes us more committed to fighting for working families, a strong economy, and safe communities.

name: Team ODP
subject: Six months of Husted selling out Ohio to Trump, dark money, and billionaire donors
disclaimer_text: paid for by the billionaire class and the MAGA elite
body:
Corruption, cruelty, and cover-ups
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111869111/558647628/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250721_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2EwZDU3MC00ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hR8TGYiaBoYCqeaZjRqPlhrFh28Ie0X7CamF3zbVjUg=) Team,

It’s been six months since Jon Husted was handed a Senate seat by Mike DeWine — and in that time, he’s done exactly what was expected of him: **_sold out Ohio to billionaires, dark-money donors, and the Trump machine._**

Let’s check his report card:

**Voted for Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill.”** This law slashes $1 trillion from Medicaid and $186 billion from food assistance, while handing massive tax cuts to the richest 1%. Husted bragged it was “pro-family” while laughing with corporate lobbyists. He posted it. Then deleted it. **He knows it’s a _lie_.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111869112/558647629/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250721_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2EwZDU3MC00ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hR8TGYiaBoYCqeaZjRqPlhrFh28Ie0X7CamF3zbVjUg=) **Sided with extremists to make abortion harder to afford.** In one of his first moves as senator, Husted backed a bill to make the Hyde Amendment permanent — banning federal funds from covering abortion and even limiting some birth control coverage. It’s exactly the kind of extreme, anti-choice agenda Ohioans rejected when we passed an amendment enshrining the right to an abortion in our state constitution, but Husted doesn’t care — he’s doing what the far-right wants, not what Ohio voted for.

That’s his record. What’s your verdict? Do you think Senator Husted has represented the best interests of Ohioans during his first six months? | [YES ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111869113/558647630/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250721_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2EwZDU3MC00ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hR8TGYiaBoYCqeaZjRqPlhrFh28Ie0X7CamF3zbVjUg=) | [NO ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111869114/558647631/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250721_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2EwZDU3MC00ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hR8TGYiaBoYCqeaZjRqPlhrFh28Ie0X7CamF3zbVjUg=)
---|---

He’s endorsed by Trump, parroting MAGA talking points, and propped up by billionaire donors — all while turning his back on Ohio’s working families. If we don’t act now, it’s only going to get worse.

[**_Ohioans deserve better than a senator bought and paid for by the billionaire class and the MAGA elite. Let’s make this his _only_ term. Help us defeat Jon Husted at the ballot box in 2026 — and take back the Senate._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111869115/558647632/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250721_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2EwZDU3MC00ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hR8TGYiaBoYCqeaZjRqPlhrFh28Ie0X7CamF3zbVjUg=)

Thank you,

Ohio Dems
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111869116/558647633/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250721_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2EwZDU3MC00ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hR8TGYiaBoYCqeaZjRqPlhrFh28Ie0X7CamF3zbVjUg=)**

name: Phil Izon
subject: I have signed the new petition to repeal RCV, I recommend you do too.
body:
Please share with friends and family | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=687e670b0b6ef6669e74956c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D687e6673a7a38f281bb17ed4%26ss_email_id%3D687e670b0b6ef6669e74956c%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%2Bhave%2Bsigned%2Bthe%2Bnew%2Bpetition%2Bto%2Brepeal%2BRCV%252C%2BI%2Brecommend%2Byou%2Bdo%2Btoo.%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-07-21T16%253A13%253A21Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_687e6673a7a38f281bb17ed4&l=en-US&s=3ORNYN0-mPQW-v13pW_TpsOenMw%3D)
---
|
#### **I have signed the new petition to Repeal Ranked Choice Voting in Alaska. I recommend everyone sign the new petition. I am not affiliated with the new petition, but the elimination of RCV is too vital to the future of Alaska to play politics.**
---
## **907Honest** **=** **Tropic Tundra**
---
#### [**“Scott Kendall-backed group settles, pays $50K in legal fees to 2024 ranked-choice repeal sponsors” ~ Must Read Alaska**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=687e670b0b6ef6669e74956c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fscott-kendall-backed-group-settles-pays-50k-in-legal-fees-to-2024-ranked-choice-repeal-sponsors%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_687e6673a7a38f281bb17ed4&l=en-US&s=o1SufAqT0wDH8ewlFlx53l7jd-I%3D)

### **Breaking: Court deals final blow to Kendall lawsuit over ranked-choice voting repeal petition**
---
---
| [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=687e670b0b6ef6669e74956c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fbreaking-court-deals-final-blow-to-kendall-lawsuit-over-ranked-choice-voting-repeal-petition%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_687e6673a7a38f281bb17ed4&l=en-US&s=YylKU32AtMVO7d-11cTmF-m3j4Q%3D)
---
**A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week.**
---
### The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission
When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote **three books** and created a **30-part animated video series** to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, **RCValert.org** and **RemoveRCV.com** , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over **700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers**. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over **42,000 signatures** —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering **one hundred to one** , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly **$150 million** between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.**Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America.**
---

name: Team Schiff
subject: Trump just said Adam “should be prosecuted” and “pay the price of prison”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Last
week, Trump went after Adam again and again, spreading lies and seeking
retribution against his favorite enemy.

He just doubled down,
Derek, once again calling for Adam
to be prosecuted and imprisoned.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Adam Schiff is a THIEF! He should be prosecuted, just like they tried
to prosecute me, and everyone else — the only difference is, WE WERE
TOTALLY INNOCENT, IT WAS ALL A GIANT HOAX!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Adam “Shifty” Schiff is in BIG TROUBLE! He falsified Loan Documents. He
once said my son would go to prison on a SCAM that Schiff, along with
other Crooked Dems, illegally “manufactured” in order to stage an actual
coup. My son did nothing wrong, knew nothing about the fictional story. It
was an American Tragedy! Now Shifty should pay the price of prison for a
real crime, not one made up by the corrupt accusers!

We need your help to respond to these lies — fast. Because they most
definitely aren’t the last ones. And they’re likely going to grow
stronger.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Chip in to stand with Adam and stand up to Trump’s continued attacks on
Adam’s name. While Adam is working to deliver for working families, we
need to respond to these insults and lies about his record.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]DONATE

Thanks, and read more about the latest Trump attacks in Adam’s recent
message.

— Schiff HQ

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: July 15, 2025
Subject: This morning, Trump called for me to be prosecuted

Derek —

Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.

Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him
accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just
Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived
enemies.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Trump on Truth Social: I have always suspected Shifty Adam Shiff was a
scam artist. And now I learn that Fannie Mae's Financial Crimes Division
have concluded that Adam Schiff has engaged in a sustained pattern of
possible Mortgage Fraud. Adam Schiff said that his primary residence was
in MARYLAND to get a cheaper mortgage and rip off America, when he must
LIVE in CALIFORNIA because he was a Congressman from CALIFORNIA. I always
knew Adam Schiff was a Crook. The FRAUD began with the refinance of his
Maryland property on February 6, 2009, and continued through multiple
transactions until the Maryland property was correctly designated as a
second home on October 13, 2020. Mortgage Fraud is very serious, and
CROOKED Adam Schiff (now a Senator) needs to be brought to justice.

Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of
reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless
attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him
accountable — not by a long shot.

I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his
standards, this one’s weak. And much as Trump may hope, this latest smear
will not distract from his Epstein files problem.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: Rush a donation to
help me fight back and keep holding Trump accountable.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q32025_abs_em.yMOq2I&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q32025_abs_em.Buknaj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q32025_abs_em.uHcj1U&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q32025_abs_em.JaOjw6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q32025_abs_em.9BFHaA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures,
the big ugly bill, or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over
his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same
tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.

But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job — not now, not
ever.

Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs,
or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at
those who tell the truth.

He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down — and with you
in my corner, I never will.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Please, rush a donation to help me fight back today.

Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from
fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.

Thank you for standing with me,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5307?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q32025_abs_em.t2juW7&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=8803%2E5257348%2Ec4pFFY ]DONATE MONTHLY

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I’m starting with nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

clean_body: Will you rush a 3X-matched $7 gift right now to help hit our end-of-month fundraising goal to elect state Dems and show MAGA Republicans that we’re NOT backing down? | | | | | ---|--- We’ve been in awe of how organizers and supporters like you have rallied behind our democratic values, our collective goals, and our shared future. We want to thank supporters like you who have powered our movement to elect state Democrats who will stand up in the face of division, fear, and authoritarianism. You’ve shown up for our party, so we want to do a little something to stand with you: A coalition of donors has agreed to match all gifts to the DLCC Victory Fund THREE times. That means by working together, every grassroots contribution will be 3X as impactful through our end-of-month deadline. The stakes in the states are high, and they’ll continue to rise ahead of this fall’s consequential elections in Virginia. State Democrats are competing in ultra-competitive races in the coming months, and we need to be ready to compete and win nationwide. We fell short of our fundraising goals all last quarter – but if we work together, we can hit our $150,000 EOM goal to power Democrats to victory and show the GOP we’re not backing down. Don’t miss this opportunity to optimize your gift to the DLCC. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | If we fall short of our goal again , we may not have the resources in place to beat our extreme opponents in upcoming elections. Our future is worth standing up for, and it starts with folks like you taking action today. Together. name: Tim Kaine
subject: A personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-scott [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-scott]
Derek,
We’ve talked a lot about winning in Virginia this November — what it will mean for folks across the Commonwealth, the clear rebuke to this lawless and chaotic Administration, and the foundation it will lay for Democratic victories in 2026.
We haven’t yet talked about how exactly we’re going to do it. That’s why I’m writing to you today. My good friend Don Scott is Speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates, and he’s at the helm of all of our efforts to hold onto our razor-thin majority this year.
I know Don and his team are already working around the clock to support our Democratic candidates all across Virginia and to prepare for victory — but they can’t do it alone.
Winning the House is so important — without a Democratic majority there, we can’t pass legislation to make people’s lives easier, and we can’t block bad legislation that curtails our rights.
The current balance of power is 51 Democrats to 49 Republicans. If we lose even one race, we could risk our majority.
So I’m asking you today: Will you donate whatever you can to my friend Don Scott’s efforts to win the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-scott]
These races matter a lot, and Don’s work to lead Democrats to victory is going to rely on support from folks like you who can pitch in and lend a hand.
I’ll be emailing you over the next few months about Don’s efforts and about battleground races in Virginia. I’d appreciate it if you stay up-to-date and please consider giving whatever you can between now and November.
Together, I know we can secure Democratic wins up and down the ticket!
Thanks for your support.
-Tim
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-scott [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-scott]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-scott]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

| | Dear Friend of Liberty,

**You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: **

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/zU5pAeSwpqSqE0h2SM5CVO-oXWgwI4Lad1SJdhctxB4gS-8eqKX33KxdjOYPSjUduPC2Ee8w295BlnK4FiKsumbQ9Z40vtEUR45r5MrYVwhf-zh2XDQYFJgYYwd5VqesZ7ba4HaIrMgNVLJl68vtIIb8T4Zi73Bnb0-DpQDV_satYW_ALKzsZRL3y187_d-F0-sD8rvV_cmwqqlFowaPJaqNboO4-uZG0WQc3oDUm1YwU_bQ3XkfUtO0g1LDtWIRk2JxtPeAbRzMNsFalHPCVuMxllm1fajTeNIaM__9ocOZC2nZREw-Rx4ZzpH5TupHjh8ghHvwQjwylzCcn5rTeKgc9rCv-bI2BlXWZ_dWpBzVMEBBK5yQREyqhqAMkylELt4eycqhRlZNgthhKvUAdXk7lzoGTWWWAW9zEHKN9jJxcBZZiiaet6bCWVf-omKAkFqyh2cbCnnUb8tErcH54nE2STkurq0Gym7IPVft16ZZQw4-exQNxBGqoUoKaOiEjY6kqZMZgshSo2_dbL06k-PU48X2EG-BjOBxk0RBWHEwP5L-avEpeorA26-ZbX6G_up9ZyMqsLBp1Y-BWAXceGw5XEqWQnOtekA95odnUMVvnPr4HLPf0ag6k8-FiF4EtX9h28aDE_0nL42jV3LjpgB06gk-UnY3xCpmP50ILHZGlSwNlxnH_sF7tKvYYnhotAZ0cBWxkQS3OqFTe-ZVPwPk5QwB_BM/KJVFwelMuE2oHEcanPHTdKDkNc5SIdJ3/11)

With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.

A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.

Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include...
* Banning ICE agents from city limits

* Establishing city-owned grocery stores

* Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage

* Replacing the police with social workers

**In short, this candidate will bring _real, unapologetic socialism_ to America.**

**Why did this happen? **

For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.

For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.

This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. **So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated!**

In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever.**

By responding to **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism**, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution.

If you agree, please represent your state and take **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism** today.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/087SJgubj_Pu9y6DJnVJRXiZMyGtdyjL7tjRpuixUgEdPWhk-paptYIxlvszxor8U-GL5dUnjQJpw_kJ_0FBn9VR34HZ6Xn-Hn5rQaxXENk8LkB4ANoI35EDMDaYtjGoJg9UmceFlGODzd7jmB75rVqFRZLny8zpXfkR_pximkBWRcVF7HPrcp8c8yQcPoTXJyO7l6IWVgGTPtO9EX2NKuRAGhHxSHBlZJiK3GOB4DWrPllwTz1-vvUNf8rETpi_oZATH6m3o-S6Qf_7EmejjVJ7kTwB7O1M2-_mjENda5Q-mPpjUtayp7hcCIlLUl8GevMEyDHIlMlQdpdsvrmTPsvXlHZkOHdG1w5qwTGCUdoTcpMae3Zy_dRGIse0Fa1AMRF1fwK40t4vT4uZWmt7Ge71d4hjJdeDfjG1QqEZs9pC9KHnk1ppYa43NytrN6N17-OmqTBo5N27fsEKyl5P5bZIBwzd9KeDqKGx9gtUgnfokFakDhXxUjTqXRQK4CmkbYQJNSLDD1Op_1ntVxzsYFVaHut0yIDN7-Q8K45egX-IJ_nA_1cCkdEOnizZ0BW5ubdTGW3urGb-Aaa9WJGLJRDSxL5hO5ZmYiVpQhEOzVgqIHJlBUF3ucFLkz0i6IlXT4KbcaQQ8LXM4v6PfhpGDPo-ZiGpSwUmCLuQgIV8oftRkleiGOBaLNk4cn5L88X9FwyTGPuUamStWNiFc10qswpm4g5iic0/bfC5yo2eHh92gPFOIeBik6kbrAJaN4iG/11)

In the face of socialism's recent success, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**

You can easily make your gift after completing the **National Survey on Socialism**, which you can access at this secure link:

clean_body: You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on Socialism. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Dear Friend of Liberty, You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders. A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections. Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include... Banning ICE agents from city limits Establishing city-owned grocery stores Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage Replacing the police with social workers In short, this candidate will bring real, unapologetic socialism to America. Why did this happen? For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom. This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated! In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever. By responding to Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution. If you agree, please represent your state and take Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism today. In the face of socialism's recent success, we must remember: it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education. You can easily make your gift after completing the National Survey on Socialism, which you can access at this secure link: Warm regards, Labin Duke, Th.M. Associate Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | |

As Democrats, we work tirelessly to ensure every voice is heard at the decision-making table. I can’t think of many people who have done more to further those values than Congressman Clyburn.
Jim often says that we need to make America’s greatness accessible and affordable to all, and he has dedicated much of his life to doing just that. As a leading figure in our country’s Civil Rights Movement, Jim blazed a path for justice and equality for all.
As former House Majority Whip and Assistant Democratic Leader, Jim has been an indispensable advocate for voting rights, affordable health care, broadband expansion, and gun safety.
He’s continuing that work today -- fighting to protect our communities from the daily assaults from the Trump administration, offering ways we can all push back against the GOP’s reckless actions, and traveling around the country to elect Democrats nationwide.

name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: BREAKING: Senate Republicans just DOUBLED their previous fundraising record
body:
The GOP is worried about the Senate 👀 |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111871777/558656656/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE742_20250721_SenateGOP_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056627&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzRmNjFjZS01MjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QnxHgj44tGtV7pLOlseVDMOuuy-LeCb6TBq5mqSJrE=) Peter,

**The top Senate Republican super PAC just raised a staggering $85 MILLION to expand their anti-choice majority** — more than _doubling_ their previous fundraising record. That kind of spending makes clear: The GOP knows their candidates are wildly unpopular after passing Trump's big ugly bill and they know taking health care away from millions is a HUGE liability heading into 2026.

This is the kind of money that could flood the airwaves with attack ads against EMILYs List women and destroy our hopes of flipping key seats next year.

You need to make a critical choice: We can either let Republicans buy their way into keeping power so they can help their billionaires instead of working people _OR_ we can stick together, outraise MAGA mega-donors, and take back power.

We're going with the second option. Peter, are you with us?

Democratic pro-choice women will be the key to securing the next Senate majority, and here at EMILYs List, we're laying the groundwork to make that happen.

We don't have billionaires bankrolling us. What we have is this grassroots community — and right now, we need you. ****[**So, please, donate now to help beat back these billionaires and send anti-choice Senate Republicans packing:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111871780/558656662/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE742_20250721_SenateGOP_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056627&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzRmNjFjZS01MjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QnxHgj44tGtV7pLOlseVDMOuuy-LeCb6TBq5mqSJrE=)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111871783/558656666/-140265690?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE742_20250721_SenateGOP_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056627&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzRmNjFjZS01MjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QnxHgj44tGtV7pLOlseVDMOuuy-LeCb6TBq5mqSJrE=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111871784/558656667/-140265690?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFE742_20250721_SenateGOP_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056627&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzRmNjFjZS01MjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QnxHgj44tGtV7pLOlseVDMOuuy-LeCb6TBq5mqSJrE=)

clean_body: The GOP is worried about the Senate 👀 | = Peter, The top Senate Republican super PAC just raised a staggering $85 MILLION to expand their anti-choice majority — more than doubling their previous fundraising record. That kind of spending makes clear: The GOP knows their candidates are wildly unpopular after passing Trump's big ugly bill and they know taking health care away from millions is a HUGE liability heading into 2026. This is the kind of money that could flood the airwaves with attack ads against EMILYs List women and destroy our hopes of flipping key seats next year. You need to make a critical choice: We can either let Republicans buy their way into keeping power so they can help their billionaires instead of working people OR we can stick together, outraise MAGA mega-donors, and take back power. We're going with the second option. Peter, are you with us? Democratic pro-choice women will be the key to securing the next Senate majority, and here at EMILYs List, we're laying the groundwork to make that happen. We don't have billionaires bankrolling us. What we have is this grassroots community — and right now, we need you. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over 24 cities. |
---

Fellow American,

You’re not gonna believe this...

**George Soros just dumped MILLIONS into Texas** to try and flip our state blue.

I wish I were kidding.

Soros is bankrolling a group called ****Texas Majority PAC**** , and they’ve teamed up with the Texas Democrats to launch a massive campaign—** _eight figures_** —to try and buy the 2026 elections.

They’re calling it “Blue Texas.”

I call it an absolute nightmare.

[**Before I continue, will you chip in an emergency contribution immediately to help stop George Soros and the radical left from turning Texas blue?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=32bd4a644335400d8822f0ee88f663f7&_e=X2ceEgdLzxjTNaT4M4AGkEMPIT5CfCC-Oit6kT12AOAWiGCuvRt1wpXSGWVtV5w_BY8kPtlQuyXpzPjzRBgR9bLsyaRnutr-l9z-aEkeWTauz1O0lTulL8mBoHGUvcTCbO5AvATH0mE2JIpZyC0pJSo6YgtLeHDdkWiUond67dMfMtldIRXcXJ_MthEU5sBH6ont4MWkrMbJqM93QEM0vQDyvB7HUWuPo1uJXJ66_FurNu5Hw9CSfJP91n7DUCtX0zUSFnQQzNCE_94bRs9_cARvG8yrDVD3-GG85VG6j5I8G9T1uLw596EOF_MladWLrYcm9I35-O1AaAX8wwy3gVTGpUeeGgL7cut-nz03fw4dRU88aepvIbliItu6Ou0arr0sVf70alkKnnN8Q-aRtuTq4qEh0f5gJqnbN87pX0NEjozxofjHHJ71UKR0zvk7R9Y5mt6S61eG9TDDWvKf25irxQShn6Nt88tBYgyORAwnwbIprVroUDhCeUr9ZS5hALHHxDJ7UfDc3nDg-h54-QAdosP-h0zo8r-i0fG3WRPELsseQa4IfSz_-B_MmzSCMsMApdlv71ufwKdEc8VaqBoOnJq_buS45nseM__hjn5u6KPMy7Pg2P84nMfogUG9fvppsdW26HX9J555m1h0NG8f9qzAPFVHz_las_898DRvxc_-LEwOyFz-zn-3BMPnCgkQw4HKXmtIM-8IoXOol3CuxHCSSHbi8LVnRnSdHRdOHwKHUWFBj7t-Sxd0-mm2)

They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over **24 cities**.

Look, Soros has spent years successfully destroying cities with soft-on-crime DAs and radical leftist prosecutors. And now he wants to bring that same chaos to every city across Texas?

_**Not on my watch.**_

I’ll tell you what this is really about:

The left knows they can’t win on ideas. So they’re trying to BUY power. They want to pump cash into every corner of our state and hope Texans don’t notice what’s happening.

Well, we noticed. And we’re not gonna sit back and let it happen.

[**I’m asking you—right now—to stand up and help me stop this madness. Peter,

I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat.

We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. _**Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense.**_

This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally.

The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. clean_body: I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat. | Peter, I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat. We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense. This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally. The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. Logistics and planning are the keys to a successful mission and a winning campaign. We’ll defeat Jon Ossoff by outworking him, so that means we must keep fuel in the truck and our team on the trail. Thank you, John King | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. name: Team Bonta
subject: ICYMI: The latest horrifying update on ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250721&t=1001&akid=1889%2E1088799%2E6NQ4RB ]Rob Bonta

We wanted to make sure you saw this update from
Friday:

It is illegal for the Trump administration to share the private, sensitive
data of Medicaid recipients with ICE — and Attorney General Bonta is
fighting back.

He’s already filed a lawsuit against the administration and is moving
quickly to secure a court order to block this unprecedented and unlawful
move.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250721-pet_fwd/?t=1002&akid=1889%2E1088799%2E6NQ4RB ]Please add your name to Rob’s petition today to stand against these
disturbing actions from Trump and ICE.

Thanks for your time,
Team Bonta

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rob Bonta <info@robbonta.com>
Date: Fri, Jul 18, 2025

The Associated Press is now reporting that the Trump administration is
illegally providing the personal data of Medicaid recipients to
Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

I’m deeply disturbed by this.

When we received early reports of illegal data sharing earlier in the
month, I took immediate action and filed a lawsuit against the
administration to stop them. Despite that, it appears that the Trump
administration has entered a new illegal data sharing agreement with ICE.
Trump is trying to use personal, private, and sensitive data to build a
mass deportation machine — we can’t allow it to continue.

This is horrifying, illegal, and a violation of our privacy. [ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250721-pet_fwd/?t=1003&akid=1889%2E1088799%2E6NQ4RB ]If you
agree we need to stop Trump from breaking the law to fuel his
anti-immigrant agenda, please add your name to my petition now.

ADD YOUR NAME

I just went on MSNBC to talk about this issue and make sure everyone knows
about this unprecedented move from the federal government — you can watch
the interview [ https://act.robbonta.com/go/771?t=1004&akid=1889%2E1088799%2E6NQ4RB ]here.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250721-pet_fwd/?t=1005&akid=1889%2E1088799%2E6NQ4RB ]AG Rob Bonta on MSNBC talking about the illegal data sharing agreement
between HHS and ICE

It’s devastating to think that people across California and the country
may be too afraid to seek the medical care they need out of fear that they
will be targeted by Trump and ICE.

We cannot allow this to continue. I’m moving as quickly as possible to
secure a court order blocking this unlawful and unprecedented data sharing
agreement with ICE. Updates to come.

Thanks for standing up and speaking out with me.

-Rob

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1006&akid=1889%2E1088799%2E6NQ4RB
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=1889%2E1088799%2E6NQ4RB

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

[PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]

body:

🔻 700 Marines

🔗 Mass arrests sweep L.A.
🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled.
❗ ❗ ❗ And now that the Big TERRIBLE Bill has become law, the ICE budget is set to increase by BILLIONS of dollars ❗ ❗ ❗
This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate.
And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out.

I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today?

Hear me out.

I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender.

_**And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading.
**_
In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left.

The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota.

[**ENLIST WITH ME TO SAVE AMERICA →**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=57b1259bbb1049a9a71bad3d699582f7&_e=ikhOvVFrPSvj0-sbjuEPWK30z2zkT89m-MQqsyEm6iIZ_MwcWv6p3zVIfSUsGmXLIQRA2kJjrrKG53CC-SHI6YfOikH6CJXz64yXxl1gGr7s1kM34VR9_Oygr1tqMrvngl7t9au4rjYe-Smn26gQVedqkH3GGFRL5FiktuuQJni6ojpHz45IH0Jo7nfSATQGR6ySZI67Xz3GXcB9zctS6Xl0pxOCFfGIxnLR8zI828I30-8if-e1kUscS3SG85kgzWlCvUSC1DTowBv_0TrS5A41Qoe63rH45c8JiVHd7JN1fOPra3qFYIKjNMGW7qhAppolDbhvWBsKLJArm2dRE2VsnN11z5rR8lh8N4zruN29ER07pN2ipW4pNYVR1H6nq9k1ODBQBmkjIKYcnPmokrVIfXhKaIe6hWC9WyFOBVYcxUE3Z90EelaPWxwsvxWSTYQ2QynnzB4VRg4kwPLEFlU9gxPfTAWYq-oeT78_Y40PKROHXPNTGBSaiMfInIgKBN3tTfe3mKPHkmRkDP9RtXWd1VfO9QgebTwxRWhcvAqXMw5my5O9-sHJg9-ExByNtsJykDj4nwLIk5IgtVcA9XcOqBDrva7wm3GuP0SNC6tRKFlmXEIAtJUGpDqAQfNTgDOc-fUrqc___f4qwutcKLhDe7uahuP7QzVMFrnLJMsSfpYJqO3VmgilKEsR173M9jHEPJ3L0XRIYuEFc6wy1wBxXJVNtPDInmevRXAvk8PD4hI6IK-4kgs1saJuXFM5-GJNdVRejl1k_f_FrdIimMV4YwVCEX5I_kzzk5nCz5xVMR-6TpQE3hBNYy-kH6D92ZYQhwA6dxInhighwrDnYGn5-qdNWdcmPfcKl58tN3Tc0u0w6nCnw6_uqtwowUbz5N599iCsKHwVYqyA1yVD8BRi8aBnEDhcXktWGDS4fuZl_SEUv4l4228pp7IMaPIZxeejiB3_G-NB4EOM-UgCyrKlQYEkr81a66sRMJ8Loqo%3D)

As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I know how to be a part of a team and manage one.

I am confident that much more can be accomplished when the unit works together.**[That’s why I’m asking for you to join me and my team today, while it’s early in the election cycle, so that we can formulate the best plan of action to win this seat and hold the Senate majority.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=57b1259bbb1049a9a71bad3d699582f7&_e=ikhOvVFrPSvj0-sbjuEPWK30z2zkT89m-MQqsyEm6iIZ_MwcWv6p3zVIfSUsGmXLIQRA2kJjrrKG53CC-SHI6YfOikH6CJXz64yXxl1gGr7s1kM34VR9_Oygr1tqMrvngl7t9au4rjYe-Smn26gQVedqkH3GGFRL5FiktuuQJni6ojpHz45IH0Jo7nfSATQGR6ySZI67Xz3GXcB9zctS6Xl0pxOCFfGIxnLR8zI828I30-8if-e1kUscS3SG85kgzWlCvUSC1DTowBv_0TrS5A41Qoe63rH45c8JiVHd7JN1fOPra3qFYIKjNMGW7qhAppolDbhvWBsKLJArm2dRE2VsnN11z5rR8lh8N4zruN29ER07pN2ipW4pNYVR1H6nPaBvcX-9WdYTICaRNxB5-ZaikUHx0CTKVA_bfkW8oKHBonEPyq_uBbvCSEmeJvmPp5TFpNnYiv7jNoEzs2fU5yRJDh5unIgz479k53nzpPtnSLWUDEbYPzBa_q6KcX9P7e6znlJvpscx25tG47HodVcTOSnpCIvAQfiu5F4Y72N7xvNbZsqaIR9Sz9N4h9uJ_LSDko61Z2cA8Cuc8a8C-V3PSRNLtAAvMhHtnLZoVFzu2ohLBl1LpPo_mAnx8x95AOkEUL6Muwu_qFLhyyD5bOxf5aHnwMzu-TxMz1Ci-CNDDGAheGwULXjlj-XQN6_ahU5R1Jx4UXJXo-T_sLrOJw5eDPCSj6BYXQy_x6yRwhnvCNqTUuQxM6Bd1FWKii045lpTVzkYPvYhra39TQ_BNVPnwd1Mtk2jy9vAKRZWlIhjEV5_DlmjnEhAweeGkPdWYVFupWvHUjPai9zfY-OdWJdUTob4D6dSb_4-gTiAlFInPoIVrCjKJak7mb4SRjsCl1ZYbcKob0VcPuGGh4WSZZ4HTNQ_D6Eri-4qi-Hlu5LGx7e47BprOmyd9rPnrDLAeuJpaPFhWfbiZb6eQ-IMdJNCJiSIfULjMS03MTZ2QLc%3D)**

We’ve already built early momentum, and thousands of grassroots conservatives have joined our ranks. But now we’re entering a critical phase. We need grassroots strength to keep this mission alive — to fuel ads, organize events, and push back against the far-left machine.

clean_body: You don’t have to give anything, but if you believe America is still worth defending, I hope you’ll enlist with me today. | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out. I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today? Hear me out. I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender. And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading. In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left. The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota. As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I know how to be a part of a team and manage one. I am confident that much more can be accomplished when the unit works together. We’ve already built early momentum, and thousands of grassroots conservatives have joined our ranks. But now we’re entering a critical phase. We need grassroots strength to keep this mission alive — to fuel ads, organize events, and push back against the far-left machine. You don’t have to give anything, but if you believe America is still worth defending, For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Wildfire Resilient Communities Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We need bold action and real investment to make our communities safer, our forests healthier, and our country more resilient.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111873766/558663856/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA0MWNkNy01NzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x3wf15FyjO1bpXTxYgAMimPhBz71jRkQ1ythaXChVWo=&emci=de8b8dd0-5766-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fa041cd7-5766-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Across the country, we're seeing the horrifying consequences of the climate crisis. From the devastating flash floods in Texas to the massive wildfires tearing through the West, it's clear that extreme weather events are becoming more frequent, more intense, and more deadly. Here in Oregon, we unfortunately know all too well the toll that catastrophic wildfires take on our homes, our forests, and our livelihoods. But instead of ramping up our efforts to protect communities, **the Trump administration is illegally cutting and withholding funding for wildfire mitigation projects.** **That's why I've teamed up with Representative Val Hoyle in OR-4 to introduce the Wildfire Resilient Communities Act.** This much-needed legislation would provide dedicated, long-term federal support for hazardous fuels reduction, forest restoration, and community preparedness — so we're not scrambling to respond after the fire starts. **Because the truth is: You can't get ready after disaster strikes.** Increasingly extreme wildfire seasons and flash floods are fueled by the climate crisis. This is not a distant threat — it's the new normal. We need bold action and real investment to make our communities safer, our forests healthier, and our country more resilient. I'll keep fighting for the resources Oregon needs to ensure no community is left behind when disaster hits. | | Hi Peter, it's Lt. Gov. Austin Davis. **Here in Pennsylvania, we know a thing or two about Democracy.** Since 1776, Pennsylvanians have answered the call to action, demanding freedom and fighting against injustice so that every American in this nation can chart their own course.
**We've carried this legacy for 249 years, and now, as we fight to preserve this country's foundation, all eyes are on us. **
Pennsylvania is the through-line to success in 2026. We are the battleground for the House, the Senate, and the Presidency, and we can't forget it for a second. **What we do here and now will impact the fate of the nation. **
**I will always fight for our Democracy, and I know Janelle will do the same.** That's why we need her in Congress. She will take a stand and fight for our values, our fellow Pennsylvanians, and our nation as a whole. This is our moment to stand with her on the road to victory.
We have the power to elect leaders who will expand access to healthcare, protect Social Security, and defend our democracy. [**Will you continue our legacy as Pennsylvanians and answer the call with a split contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111873870/558664418/2089644103?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_072125_JANELLE3_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDI3MWQ1MS01ODY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NBOR6edMwQrJHk3CwxMy7B_A3byxkaF4DPsl7O6FEnY=)

subject: Happy Pride 🌈

body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Happy Pride, Peter,
On Sunday, Portland came together for our Pride Parade, where we honored the legacy of the Stonewall Riots and celebrated our LGBTQ+ community.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act]
It was a day full of family, music, and meaning—a celebration of courage, love, and the beauty of being fully and freely your authentic self. Pride reminds us that joy is an act of resistance and that people-powered, grassroots movements are the only way we change the world.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act]
We also sent a message that hate is not welcome in Oregon , especially as the MAGA movement tries to turn back the clock and pit us against each other. That’s their MO—divide and conquer to hold onto power. The GOP will scapegoat anyone to distract from their schemes.
But we’re not falling for it, and we won’t go back. We know who we are and what we’re fighting for.
If you believe in a world where everyone can live and love as themselves, I hope you’ll chip in. Every donation helps keep this work going—and helps us all fight back, together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act]
ANYTHING HELPS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act]
Happy Pride,
Maxine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250721_Pride_act] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

name: Team Bennet
subject: Our winning coalition includes you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/julycommunityendorser [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/julycommunityendorser]
Hi team,
If there is one thing Michael knows about winning elections here in Colorado, it’s that you need a big, broad coalition that includes as many Coloradans as possible. Whether you live on the Front Range, Western Slope, Eastern Plains, or in the San Luis Valley you have a place in our campaign.
And you’re in good company. Our coalition already includes over 130 Colorado leaders , like:
- Senator John Hickenlooper
- Congressman Joe Neguse
- Congressman Jason Crow
- Denver Mayor Mike Johnston
- Speaker of the Colorado State House Julie McCluskie
- President of the Colorado Senate James Coleman
- Former Mayor Wellington Webb and First Lady Wilma Webb
- Former House Majority Leader Daneya Esgar
- Former Congresswoman Betsy Markey
- Former State Senate President Leroy Garcia
These leaders support Michael because they believe in his experience, his fight, and his vision for moving Colorado forward. You can find our full list of endorsements here. [https://www.michaelbennet.com/endorsements/]
We couldn’t be more honored to have so many outstanding leaders on board, strengthening our team. That said, as a people-powered campaign, we want one endorsement more than anyone's: yours.
Friend, our success counts on grassroots supporters like you. If you haven’t made it official yet, we’d love it if you became a Community Endorser for Michael today >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/julycommunityendorser]
ENDORSE MICHAEL [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/julycommunityendorser]
We’re proud to have over 150 Community Endorsers already on our team. You all are helping us keep up our momentum and build the broad coalition we’ll need to win this race.
If you’re ready, become one of our distinguished list of endorsers today. It would mean so much to Michael and everyone on Team Bennet. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/julycommunityendorser]
Thank you,
Team Bennet

name: Final email
subject: Better a few hours too soon than a minute too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Please read EVERY word carefully Patriot - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one shot! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW, the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing a CRUCIAL Mid-Month Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Fellow Patriot. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Fellow Patriot. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November!
