name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvvqsqoh1qhcntoulfe0odiicvpj5ldpem4v44eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)
[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6s3kbn4rs2uqa17l76t0h4unsguo8tgtuuklg80_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1tfd64c3mcokb6nj0ccnvtr3ihr95rpn4tq7ao0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zedassq5jg9949hb4526p1g94hj2nkg41oce9hno_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcj1vi11sa539s8vjk95ob4acvn18cetpnmrj8ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuekg8cq64poemru69o20mavu5m3l734iioft3j8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgsr53h2kmlj3ehiuvnod75sk1m0nhkqj5ia2230_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0p2m30665lp1epp58ptfk374dm5dpi5ohrlfrio_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsotiq38jagne666fedrap5hgtasicr6vdiso300_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfd393off149gt531prb0i5jorf0j4fjv39cdtk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl4q7duu1o2rlqnb02lk5olbhlaf4as8p0qa5tig_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1476f5ahekq83of53ddqpck31ti63232d4rp9so_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo21bp9ne0g1olv4psvip33912ur22mna6tcqnh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4bi292iie2iji2q9gkbjtfkmtc7jbiesj368s98_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmk5v96efr56s4ovmaja3qujqlai7m2jd8m8hrsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zes2ia1v9ims231depbtr5cupl121tih9kruqj6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg373r78hrt1sp97svi02o4r55tdb2m8vnuteplo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrq6p8p6n9apfar0ae721rq0oov8u33rgal24nr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6cob2clh2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

body:

Friend, **Did Trump just have the FBI arrest Obama?** _No_**.** But if you are one of Trump's 4 million followers on Truth Social you'd think the answer was yes. This morning via his Truth Social account President Trump shared a realistic video of FBI agents arresting former President Obama from a meeting at the oval office. It was an AI video but many of his supporters celebrated believing the former president had actually been arrested.

Although it was a stupid AI video today, Trump has already arrested numerous elected officials who have stood up to his administration including the Mayor of Newark, Congresswoman LaMonica McIver (D-NJ), and US Senator Alex Padilla (D-CA). It's clear he has no intention of stopping there and the only thing stopping him is the corresponding nosedive in public opinion he's seen after each public arrest of an elected official. With his approval amongst supporters in the toilet over Epstein he cannot afford this. In 2026 pollsters are projecting massive swaths of the MAGA base not coming out to vote over their frustration on medicaid cuts and the Trump-Epstein coverup. **Trump 's blunders are putting deep red rural districts in play and No Dem Left Behind is supporting candidates running for these seats. ** **[We need your help to keep putting pressure on these seats so we can flip them in 2026. name: Christian Alerts
subject: Mike Huckabee’s Message from Israel is DEVASTATING.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANTI-WOKE FUND
body:
Something extraordinary just happened.

| | | |
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/35A-aCkm1juZY7gOyGVnIg~~/AARclBA~/fbWwoL7rU7g1Ki7R8Rp5bhh9v0ByNHXkfoAUKGMux6Bpo8IUVlV3yhcYORyeRP4n3v43c0m1ljNQ7r3pDZaYbrTdUwWJVjuvch3CyCgdaUMLMN_1NnVve4rHwpXz6KW1OnLhpccUOO3N9Ow1QMoRYMFCzrfwJEW_XMqz77834Piih5YeHc88xgOJrytjqA4hTsz0_96AJWd8O2oT_AFjL4ZsL-BdWzBPBUM_nSxZH2LDU1Ko6-q9NudptSUy_snXfhNEg2dyM_yTj_6hwfOZFb61jm6FsN5xTVbZKLoJfjSzZ0TlgOD7Uh1-hX_tVpAJ9Ii97q8PdHUy6pGQH8dCT3XOGhCoZAWURjIJxyaG6mQ~)
Something **extraordinary** just happened. From the frontlines of Israel, U.S. Ambassador **Mike Huckabee** sent a personal message to **President Donald J. Trump** -- a message so powerful, so prophetic, that it's now been shared with the entire world. And let us be clear: **This is not just a political message.** It is a message rooted in **divine calling, spiritual warfare, and prophetic truth.** **_Here is what Ambassador Huckabee told President Trump:_** "Mr. President, God spared you in Butler, PA to be the most consequential President in a century--maybe ever. The decisions on your shoulders I would not want to be made by anyone else." "You have many voices speaking to you, Sir, but there is only ONE voice that matters. **HIS voice.** " "No President in my lifetime has been in a position like yours. Not since **Truman in 1945.** " "You did not seek this moment. **This moment sought YOU.** " "I will not abandon this post. Our flag will NOT come down." This is the kind of leadership America needs--**a calling, not a campaign.** A President **chosen** , not selected. Mike Huckabee's message was a thunderclap across a broken world--a reminder that **God is still at work** , and **America still has a leader strong enough to hear His voice.** While the Left mocks and the media distorts... While AOC and Ilhan Omar **cheer terror in the streets** and call for Israel to be erased... While Democrats kneel to radical mobs and turn their backs on God's people... **President Trump listens. He leads. He stands.** And today, we're asking YOU to stand with him--and with Ambassador Huckabee--at one of the most pivotal moments in modern history. This is not just about politics.
**This is about the soul of America.**
[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/35A-aCkm1juZY7gOyGVnIg~~/AARclBA~/fbWwoL7rU7g1Ki7R8Rp5bhh9v0ByNHXkfoAUKGMux6Bpo8IUVlV3yhcYORyeRP4n3v43c0m1ljNQ7r3pDZaYbrTdUwWJVjuvch3CyCgdaUMLMN_1NnVve4rHwpXz6KW1OnLhpccUOO3N9Ow1QMoRYMFCzrfwJEW_XMqz77834Piih5YeHc88xgOJrytjqA4hTsz0_96AJWd8O2oT_AFjL4ZsL-BdWzBPBUM_nSxZH2LDU1Ko6-q9NudptSUy_snXfhNEg2dyM_yTj_6hwfOZFb61jm6FsN5xTVbZKLoJfjSzZ0TlgOD7Uh1-hX_tVpAJ9Ii97q8PdHUy6pGQH8dCT3XOGhCoZAWURjIJxyaG6mQ~)
**Will you answer the call?**
[YES -- I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP AND MIKE HUCKABEE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/35A-aCkm1juZY7gOyGVnIg~~/AARclBA~/fbWwoL7rU7g1Ki7R8Rp5bhh9v0ByNHXkfoAUKGMux6Bpo8IUVlV3yhcYORyeRP4n3v43c0m1ljNQ7r3pDZaYbrTdUwWJVjuvch3CyCgdaUMLMN_1NnVve4rHwpXz6KW1OnLhpccUOO3N9Ow1QMoRYMFCzrfwJEW_XMqz77834Piih5YeHc88xgOJrytjqA4hTsz0_96AJWd8O2oT_AFjL4ZsL-BdWzBPBUM_nSxZH2LDU1Ko6-q9NudptSUy_snXfhNEg2dyM_yTj_6hwfOZFb61jm6FsN5xTVbZKLoJfjSzZ0TlgOD7Uh1-hX_tVpAJ9Ii97q8PdHUy6pGQH8dCT3XOGhCoZAWURjIJxyaG6mQ~)

body:

Join Team Elfreth in Virginia this Summer to help elect the Democratic nominee Abigail Spanberger as Governor and keep the Virginia General Assembly blue! In 2017, Virginia's results were so close that a coin toss decided which party controlled their government – that can't happen again.

name: JanePAC.com
subject: 3 ways Trump just made your life less safe and more expensive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
There's no way we're backing down from this fight.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111876168/558672699/1328794144?refcode=ea.e1c2f382-5d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e1c2f382-5d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxYzJmMzgyLTVkNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HsBjuSfYqy4jbTttHb15l00axHHPql3zPxj8TR2eXr4=&emci=9e0e1fcd-5666-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e1c2f382-5d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Let's be real: Trump's so-called _One Big Beautiful Bill Act_ is a gift to the ultra-wealthy, especially fossil fuel executives. For the rest of us, it’s a raw deal: higher costs, more pollution, and a climate crisis spiraling out of control. **Here are 3 ways Trump's “Big Beautiful” law will directly impact YOU:** | 📈 **ONE: Electricity Bills Are About to Skyrocket** The law slashes tax credits for clean energy projects, which powered **over 90% of new electricity** generation last year. Some states are looking at electricity price increases of **over 25% by 2029,** with the typical household facing a **7.3% spike in energy costs.** So much for Trump's promise to cut costs.
---
🌪️ **TWO: You're More Vulnerable When Disasters Strike** This law **slashes $150 million from weather forecasting and climate monitoring** — money that would've gone to NOAA scientists and life-saving early warning systems. Trump has already devastated many of the country's local weather service forecast offices by **cutting the staff needed for round-the-clock storm tracking.** He’s fired hundreds of **workers at NOAA and the National Weather Service,** and he’s pushing to dismantle FEMA entirely.
---
💰 **THREE: Your Health Is Now Secondary to Coal Company Profits** This law forces **4 million acres of public lands open** to coal mining. At a time when black lung disease is surging among miners and pollution is driving higher rates of asthma and heart disease nationwide, Trump is doubling down on the dirtiest energy source.
---
The message from Washington is loud and clear: Fossil fuel companies matter more than our well-being.
That’s why the team at JanePAC is working around the clock to elect bold climate champions — leaders who won’t back down in the face of fossil fuel greed and will deliver real, lasting solutions for our communities. **But at the end of the day, our success depends on committed supporters like you showing up at the polls and casting your vote for climate champions up and down the ballot.**
**[Will you represent our grassroots movement in Cresco today and take our pledge to vote for climate champions up and down the ballot in 2025 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111876170/558672701/895210909?refcode=ea.e1c2f382-5d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e1c2f382-5d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxYzJmMzgyLTVkNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HsBjuSfYqy4jbTttHb15l00axHHPql3zPxj8TR2eXr4=&emci=9e0e1fcd-5666-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e1c2f382-5d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: There's no way we're backing down from this fight. | Let's be real: Trump's so-called One Big Beautiful Bill Act is a gift to the ultra-wealthy, especially fossil fuel executives. For the rest of us, it’s a raw deal: higher costs, more pollution, and a climate crisis spiraling out of control. Here are 3 ways Trump's “Big Beautiful” law will directly impact YOU: | 📈 ONE: Electricity Bills Are About to Skyrocket The law slashes tax credits for clean energy projects, which powered over 90% of new electricity generation last year. Some states are looking at electricity price increases of over 25% by 2029, with the typical household facing a 7.3% spike in energy costs. So much for Trump's promise to cut costs. 🌪️ TWO: You're More Vulnerable When Disasters Strike This law slashes $150 million from weather forecasting and climate monitoring — money that would've gone to NOAA scientists and life-saving early warning systems. Trump has already devastated many of the country's local weather service forecast offices by cutting the staff needed for round-the-clock storm tracking. He’s fired hundreds of workers at NOAA and the National Weather Service, and he’s pushing to dismantle FEMA entirely. 💰 THREE: Your Health Is Now Secondary to Coal Company Profits This law forces 4 million acres of public lands open to coal mining. At a time when black lung disease is surging among miners and pollution is driving higher rates of asthma and heart disease nationwide, Trump is doubling down on the dirtiest energy source. The message from Washington is loud and clear: Fossil fuel companies matter more than our well-being. That’s why the team at JanePAC is working around the clock to elect bold climate champions — leaders who won’t back down in the face of fossil fuel greed and will deliver real, lasting solutions for our communities. But at the end of the day, our success depends on committed supporters like you showing up at the polls and casting your vote for climate champions up and down the ballot. – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

But as I learned as a CIA case officer, you have to know who your allies are to succeed in your mission. What do you say, Derek? **= Thank you, Abigail Spanberger | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE President to Testify before House Administration Committee on Tuesday
body:
Justin Riemer to testify in favor of upholding voter residency standards and proper voter list maintenance |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE President to Testify before House Administration Committee on Tuesday**
**(Washington, D.C.) –** Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (“RITE”), a non-profit organization that supports litigation to protect election security and integrity, today announced that RITE President Justin Riemer will testify to the U.S. House of Representatives Committee on House Administration in a hearing titled, [“Clean Rolls, Secure Elections: Reviewing Voter List Maintenance Standards,”](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=252ab8a869&e=ea91f782ea) on Tuesday, July 22, 2025. Riemer will draw from his experiences with RITE and as a Virginia state election official in testifying in favor of robust list maintenance practices and residency standards. All members of the media are invited and encouraged to attend.
**What: RITE’s Justin Riemer testifies in House Administration hearing**

**Prepared testimony[here](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=b8c29783f6&e=ea91f782ea).**

**When: Tuesday, July 22, 2025**
**10:30 a.m. EDT**

**Where:****1310 Longworth House Office Building**
**Washington, D.C.**

**Livestream**[**here**](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=604bbd3db7&e=ea91f782ea)**.**

###

subject: I’m Working for Nevadans Not the Swamp

body:

| | | | | [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irYT_y2PPwxQ4aTvwuqOsKD-PAZHmj1UXD3kTnghIYAO1HDEU4yVA3JwLCIxYhg5V0SFgM2CyapGswIhASu39JGUrI-I8iPY18F4k2gca5jJhU7d6AdrkrB9d2NkYe098cqdui3EC-m120y1Cc404yHbIBDTPAXW&c=CAV-P4nS8-5qGWvWmGMgYSG6PHoGeD70YZZtsXJP31IiIXaKMUJrpA==&ch=DHrFaDiyyAFIaoFtQUUG9J7p4CzhDv3qT08rGLrPRby2Uk9Gs_g6dw==)

| Peter,
---

It is no secret that Washington is broken. The lobbyists, consultants, and insiders have been calling the shots for too long, and it is HARD-WORKING Nevadans who pay the price!
I am not here to make friends in the swamp. I am here to fight for you.
When I launched this campaign, I made a promise. To put Nevadans first. Every time. No exceptions. And I have a history of doing just that. If you look at my voting record when I was in the Nevada Assembly, you will see that all of my votes were for YOU, the great people of Nevada. Not the Establishment, Special Interest Groups, or the Large Globalist Corporations.

---
|

✅ Keep our Border Secure ✅ Protect our jobs and small businesses ✅ Stop reckless spending ✅ Defend our constitutional rights And you better believe I will not be taking orders from the DC cocktail crowd or their billionaire buddies. This campaign belongs to the people of Nevada, and it always will. But I need your help to keep this fight going. The establishment is lining up to stop us because they know their days of backroom deals are numbered. Chip in today and help me deliver a victory for Nevada.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqf6j19j9m3gqbeqj9qt08v8u9ucq1m1jd800cgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2n2rgn3p653kt4l0s2db70h3onsfk0jppsar6s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2b97am4el9bo2a3r7snv6p4q3ff0sfo003earno_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm4kt2jdskdp2j21nqt44om92pskoevie11gs628_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1q7mcohso5j3gkdpe986u7kb9fgvii970ke5fc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0u088kucrgc94gfiahgjvkbl4emir29oom5rfh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk063435euect7jtqvdq857trc31hv21337hfpug_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs2luof5a6h6vm60m1jkgr1c4cs56rrm1bh94fl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4a7v9se013hut16230h6gfkvks0d4a07oer2dmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zha97blctjfbncnqa5reoq6ec9lffqvgdsos0ob8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4gur0i3n2450jmnp81je8hiotgpviip1l731oro_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztqe5pdub8ek9irm2rm8nqcj98runv89147ah0so_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zptijt0sr2jl9245op8ba09anisljj3s08o2h7f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh2jdose39ok8i0amk4g3m1pi88a3kt8u8tkpbvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zskuejssfshuhb2v96p50b1pr38iuef1g59o566o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq1p5vui41fg1lke30nqn9ft3cbck6gqcpgf6se8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh941ro8tegeel5021otchf3uce66d6oupiods4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbs3glre446a0jf9052f83fggd8n74ffnvvou4l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chj6eo34cdh2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Illegal Immigration Alerts
subject: Tom Homan Addresses Death Threats
body:
Did you read his powerful response?
| Peter,
---
This is sickening.
---
President Trump’s border czar Tom Homan has received **_death threats_** simply for enforcing our country’s immigration laws.
---
The Left is hoping these threats will break Homan into submission and force him to call off the deportations.
---
But Homan didn’t flinch. Here’s his response to these despicable threats:
---
**“I’M NOT GOING ANYWHERE.”** [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=96a73070d7cd4594bb8aea1c68c5a519&_e=wDFym-_gsozdLv477N4BLcLcIeLT9OVeUg42WsEILXuu-rDTto2LRpM7AZUmYE_BvV5deHgZwILPTn_xhgA49JC9GdIA6thlwnbPmvlVRGiAoGVXwrry0eEFJSSx4c_DKMW1kd2IbIuxY5nVeq4bgBtP95W-BDee_Gfa_p4YflCeCfcxHei6zRu-C9IJwmb_dA9Nfr6fSQTiNQWogcjCNX0URAnT7z3EilgGBdAtmAcHEolvN24DuF0bv922lka-CQplAJYCP1Pum-eqEKJ0nBHVi5UICZYCPA_doWOQcs0b7KAO1dSZYBTNSOUe8IJErsALncvJIpnONqBxVF56mFH8UseJaUYU90tJTmT9Z1FE-GXO6dXKJRsEuy0zz-GN2YVYK77_tK8m7g3RvsL3tlktkoZhPJxX4Dprzt1626feeWAG1OmAkwAH9a0FOlkyXEfJRuWt_4Kr4GWHoDhr2MXn4E1lz8ul1py9IfzK5GiJQdRmVd1-teCzoncjhwdlxe01Hjs22FWtC1BAXS0o2u2Hb2gu5mBKPM2-FnxI3X-I3QDZzeG7wmi-p1x_AhN6D9GDFs8QD3o7NahzyGYDZypXIF7ECJXZ57wdoQx95hifBZXu5hClS_SLtYby3gVD)
---
That’s the spine of steel America needs to start WINNING again. Thank God President Trump has put a true patriot in charge of securing the border and making America safe again.
---
**_Tom Homan isn’t backing down. Instead, he’s DOUBLING down!_**
---
_That’s why – until every last illegal is deported, Homan wants to be sure that absolutely _NONE_ of them are counted in the next United States Census._
---
**_“I think [the Biden] administration thought these millions of people were going to be future Democratic voters. But one of the things Biden also did, in addition to destroying all the programs we put in place to give us the most secure border, he overturned the Trump Census rule, which means _millions of people they release in sanctuary cities will be counted in the next Census_ , which is going to result in what? More seats in the House for the Dems.”_**
---
Simply put, this is a dire moment for our country...
---
**Because of the Democrats' schemes to infiltrate the next Census – _and our elections_ – now more than ever, we need to _VERIFY_ every last voter profile!**
---
_And that’s where _YOU_ come in._
---
[**Please take a moment to privately complete (don’t let anyone view your screen) your official and secure 2025 TRUMP-VOTER CENSUS to verify your voter profile. >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=96a73070d7cd4594bb8aea1c68c5a519&_e=wDFym-_gsozdLv477N4BLcLcIeLT9OVeUg42WsEILXuu-rDTto2LRpM7AZUmYE_BvV5deHgZwILPTn_xhgA49JC9GdIA6thlwnbPmvlVRGiAoGVXwrry0eEFJSSx4c_DKMW1kd2IbIuxY5nVeq4bgBtP95W-BDee_Gfa_p4YflCeCfcxHei6zRu-C9IJwmb_dA9Nfr6fSQTiNQWogcjCNeWAbOjcGFSdZTilFKglFxN_d0oCT0hci_dmBmhmq4J86ZfK8wwkK1gv9mKcFynQJ2uYj0NG2m4PeRGcFGS72cj-3G6aj8FgBWWz6jbjtOnWzq1sxAwAybZnMW5jyEwFOiIo2dJfVj2qbWK10-5lOwqZDgIAMW2zm_05cxrewdwGDsfrq7w47TvtLBIS3qv6Kz79QmBys1c56-iTHKv_2sjRhm7uFoxwByQi0IQAEULcTQIgFBuYx3Wb0XgibFdIdkytKhEpJphO9ete-oXssKv24j8z9n5U-nzAX1cs_PJUuAO8MQU0ECkq1bdl2MFooqDAqy02CIBkuJ-5kdDCbFjC18WzNyLs-yBUSYbehhQ0dAU_by_lUdTQm10xGgGajkJYchfhUQKm2n5dili9tlt3wdL_7cd0gZpe-pXmMVKQ)

body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4880%2E35263%2EojV18P)
Peter, Farmers grow the food we put on our tables. In Wisconsin, our dairy farmers work hard on tight margins to make world-class products. Our farmers feed America, and **Trump just pulled the rug right out from underneath them.** Trump claims to be a champion for farmers, but his reckless and unnecessary trade wars have farmers bracing for higher costs on everything from fertilizer to equipment. _I’ve even heard from some farmers that the chaos is its own tariff._ This is just one of a long line of Trump’s broken promises. Farmers deserve better. Small businesses deserve better. Working people deserve better. As this administration continues to shortchange the American people, I will continue to fight back to protect Wisconsinites and their livelihoods. **[Will you chip in $10 to power this fight? clean_body: | Peter, Farmers grow the food we put on our tables. In Wisconsin, our dairy farmers work hard on tight margins to make world-class products. Our farmers feed America, and Trump just pulled the rug right out from underneath them. Trump claims to be a champion for farmers, but his reckless and unnecessary trade wars have farmers bracing for higher costs on everything from fertilizer to equipment. I’ve even heard from some farmers that the chaos is its own tariff. This is just one of a long line of Trump’s broken promises. Farmers deserve better. Small businesses deserve better. Working people deserve better. As this administration continues to shortchange the American people, I will continue to fight back to protect Wisconsinites and their livelihoods. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Requesting a NEW verification from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I promise, I’ll explain why...
| **_AN OFFICIAL REQUEST FROM DONALD TRUMP JR_**
---
Friend,
---
The key to winning modern elections is voter turnout.
---
**My father won back the White House last November because Americans like _YOU_ turned out to support him in record-breaking numbers! **
---
_But new data is setting off alarm bells ahead of the midterms..._
---
“Republicans just can’t count on Trump’s more peripherally-engaged voters to show up when Trump isn’t on the ballot.

So far in 2025, the _partisan intensity gap_ looks awfully similar to the one at this point in 2017.

...**across two House special elections**... Democrats have been averaging 63% of Harris’s 2024 vote totals while Republicans have been averaging just 45% of Trump’s.

If that pattern were extrapolated across all 435 districts next fall, Democrats would win a whopping 279 seats — 61 more than they need for a majority.”

[Source: _Cook Political Report_]
---
Due to this “partisan intensity gap,” we can no longer just assume those who voted for my father last November will also show up to vote for Republicans in the midterms.
---
Instead, we need to close the gap by verifying an entirely new subset of voters...
---
_**...Trump voters who show up in presidential years and will _ALSO_ show up in the midterms to save the House from radical far-Left Democrats!**_
---
That is why I’m requesting a new verification from you, Friend.
---
[**Please complete the NEW verification survey to show that you are among the most ACTIVE voters so that we can close the very troubling “partisan intensity gap” before the midterms.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6dfee40fa5d848cba9a0ece04d28b1bb&_e=c8fhpbO3HmoSbBp0j46kVjfClq8zyRvg8cvNc415Ai_7WamkVSqMOQhoElRwyFxaG-lLDKT6nWJn8XkpQ-W75htmXK-9EdezLLtfj5PL7qVPil5cp5aQiprJWCsCx8rkGM-urpxNYFuDvsHhhK0cxYxad6caZDrK4XfYIHKh3OQtJI2SJ8g5cmUnU4NiOFPenrz5YtRC2ZgEeznCY8Tdn0ZSSDw3A-C9JMaOmVQ-KtnpRmv-nAH7hp9-DyD24xcDzD2DtY6XcbmU9dmJkTBsKTi9KsGuc32Z5MbiyTQEy-B9oRIJFNVOP1p06X2u9lB_hCIzxlEDePLKFkgR61GK8exY5n0UKD_Y74PlyJS7VLM1FPGhNJPfcguQIK9yKutsu3lFfOW_rILju5fa0AOoBUFx7FZH8mOiikk-gtQNkXLJiYmdJZ3lUp6hDo0x0LB6UO9C3-pSNdoEiCmckKScGxLuM21aJBMusDDaMM2lOpfAxeY2A2wBDFZhJetLCMzFfXUYfEfYmMcphaevdffoxm9jdM0cy1NVRMaqC1YQvt3oKDa3lA8USVPKh7qaSq-6zHUZ4UWzq9euLDGPGvEKuMa5csrfGb1pVfZArLZVLuA%3D)

clean_body: I promise, I’ll explain why... | AN OFFICIAL REQUEST FROM DONALD TRUMP JR Friend, The key to winning modern elections is voter turnout. My father won back the White House last November because Americans like YOU turned out to support him in record-breaking numbers! But new data is setting off alarm bells ahead of the midterms... “Republicans just can’t count on Trump’s more peripherally-engaged voters to show up when Trump isn’t on the ballot. So far in 2025, the partisan intensity gap looks awfully similar to the one at this point in 2017. ...across two House special elections... Democrats have been averaging 63% of Harris’s 2024 vote totals while Republicans have been averaging just 45% of Trump’s. If that pattern were extrapolated across all 435 districts next fall, Democrats would win a whopping 279 seats — 61 more than they need for a majority.” [Source: Cook Political Report] Due to this “partisan intensity gap,” we can no longer just assume those who voted for my father last November will also show up to vote for Republicans in the midterms. Instead, we need to close the gap by verifying an entirely new subset of voters... ...Trump voters who show up in presidential years and will ALSO show up in the midterms to save the House from radical far-Left Democrats! That is why I’m requesting a new verification from you, Friend. Official 2025 GOP Voter Verification Survey Scope: Measuring Voter Intensity Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com Survey ID #: 175644-866 Likelihood to Vote: UNKNOWN Status: INCOMPLETE | Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Dear Peter,
---
Last week, we sent out an announcement that we would be gathering this Tuesday on the steps of the U.S. Capitol. That gathering is now **POSTPONED** due to Congressional scheduling issues. As soon as we have details about the rescheduled date and time, you’ll be the first to know! Tomorrow, we will be doing a** _LIVE_ _UPDATE _**from Camp Elah, where we will talk about all God is doing with us and through us! More details will follow, but be watching our social media and YouTube channels for updates! But God is still at work! This week, Camp Elah is going to be a hotspot in the political world. Please be praying for me as I meet with various Congressmen, Senators, and political leaders throughout the week. Camp Elah is a small place God is using in **MIGHTY WAYS!** He continues to open doors to the men and women shaping the direction of our government. Camp Elah continues to facilitate conversations and gatherings that are influencing the spiritual direction of both our government and nation. This space is already ministering to key faith leaders and government officials, serving as a place for praise, worship, Bible study, and fellowship—and the best is yet to come! If you believe in the work being done at Camp Elah, I ask that you prayerfully consider giving toward this need. Your donation will help sustain this sacred space, continue hosting powerful nights of praise, and equip the next generation of worshippers. Every gift—big or small—brings us closer to our goal and fuels our mission to bring **REVIVAL** to our nation’s Capitol. Thank you for standing with us in faith. We can’t wait to see how God moves through your generosity!
---
[ **SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=91efa7fc62464a9fac0e2ff218f19549&_e=haf66odKQQV29yyMhvX0boxCL9kymGIiAeAmLESxOGWluZQDaAQFa5m_NC-O8KU3IkME-DIRWbTShqlrX9fa8kP9P96sQycDiKJ690rQtqUDog3gR3ulFVfTPLV5tClr2aRsMHNbcq4KfNEGunl1pWSm1T7sUglJZ2i5EoH7_i_nyUiE-2qGpNtgp6lKBfs59bxek3x6XRzByenU9oJvEbc2xi4rle2KdNNnI278ro1y6gUX9FxlyNXBWKfNcLnQ-_C7Gx6snh1eWV91k_Iy0H1nD4HJQ3y6tAcWby6OWmrwEOEH_7CpmqkZgDaUzLH3mbu8dCHzh4wKojwSBCa5mpI0-kkOMTEq7eDsiLjhQhzKMpidwprmexzaa3BPdJuAz_Q4TjbOGR-55a29Ly8RgGRM_8-0vZmz1rubI50oiT3Si7OG-zkNv27l1OIoOFrK)

body:

Tonight, I will be on **Table Talk with/Joni** on **Daystar** at 8:30pm EST / 7:30pm CT! It was a fun experience to sit at the Table with all the ladies of Daystar and talk about literally EVERYTHING... **I tell one of my most embarrassing stories EVER on this show.** Watch it here:[https://daystar.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12131.1.44028a5ed9d3001995e76d7cb82b075b) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
## Tour Of Oklahoma
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12132.1.5c9930c4cf89a960752fb6f1fe86e4d9)
---
Last week, I began my **[Tour of Oklahoma](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12133.1.c2a13bdac3e529a03d2b812b90916dc8)** in Paul's Valley. It was AWESOME w/a FULL HOUSE!
Next, I will be in Grove for the **Delaware County GOP** on Thursday, July 24 at 6:30pm at the Grove Christian Center.
I will be traveling all throughout the State of Oklahoma for the remainder of 2025 and much of 2026.
You can view my [upcoming schedule](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12134.1.be3d64f766463454053cfe4ec2f1b816) here to see when I am coming to place near you: [https://www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/schedule](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12135.1.d6fc924e28623ceaf9bfee5d575f47ac)
I have a **presentation** that I will be sharing that I believe you will enjoy at these events plus **LIVE Q &A** afterwards which is always the BEST PART!
If you would like for me to come **speak at your event or church** please let me know by visiting: [https://www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/schedule](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12136.1.114aa1f3016dccb8b478cb01f50d9290)
My speaking fee is **$Free.99** and I cover my own travel expenses.
**I hope to see you at one of these upcoming events!**
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
|
---
Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12137.1.6e94fce0232669ed14cce1f5039afdfc) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12138.1.3fc304842cb24e1d8eed6bd72bd27c7c)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12139.1.5725d613deffda8ffc39425e99adda64)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12140.1.d37ac1989f97569048ff882b457a861a). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12141.1.266cfc0e4d00b519a2f987fccbaa0b01) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12142.1.75218db7f98e347b9f92b273fa69a061) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23209629.12143.1.b57b3b690ab6511b3c1d41307d6b107f) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

## **On Episode 180 of The Qasim Rashid Show:**
At a time of rising fascism and extremism, I'm proud to share two exciting profiles in courage of young people standing up against injustice. This is #Courage2025.
* Ryan Powers: As Big Law capitulates to Trump, Harvard trained lawyer Ryan Powers courageously stood up against this injustice--it's cost him his job
* Moataz Salim: As Israel continues its genocide on Palestinians, George Washington doctoral student Moataz courageously condemned it--he's been expelled from his program
* I speak with Ryan and Moataz about what gave them the courage to speak up against injustice, how we can support them, and how they will continue to fight

**The Qasim Rashid podcast has surpassed 125,000 downloads --all thanks to you. I invite you to join our efforts by subscribing below.**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The Real Story Behind Pam Bondi's Epstein Mess – It's Worse Than You Think
body:
Let me paint the picture for you, because this isn't just some headline – it's a pattern I've seen up close. Back when Bondi was Florida's Attorney General, Epstein was running his pedophile operation right under her nose, raping kids and getting away with it because no one held him accountable.
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/G3ThC8p892az62G7GniGQwtA)** to be removed.
* * *
---
| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/0yL48WwJ64qBvybOqLmYSQ/G3ThC8p892az62G7GniGQwtA)
[****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/0yL48WwJ64qBvybOqLmYSQ/G3ThC8p892az62G7GniGQwtA) Dear Patriot,

You know me - I've been through the wringer as an investigative reporter, digging deep into scandals that the powerful want buried.

And right now, the biggest betrayal is coming from inside our own camp with Pam Bondi and her mishandling of the whole Epstein fiasco.

**If you're ready to fight back,[**chip in here**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/0yL48WwJ64qBvybOqLmYSQ/G3ThC8p892az62G7GniGQwtA) to support my work.**

It's like she's playing games with the most explosive scandal of our time, and it's leaving victims in the dust while protecting the powerful. She has also created a media nightmare for the Trump administration.

Let me paint the picture for you, because this isn't just some headline - it's a pattern I've seen up close.

Back when Bondi was Florida's Attorney General, Epstein was running his pedophile operation right under her nose, raping kids and getting away with it because no one held him accountable.

Fast forward to now, she's our US Attorney General, promising on day one that she'd drop the bombshells - the client list she claimed was sitting on her desk, and tens of thousands of videos exposing pedophiles and traffickers.

She strutted around on Fox News more than she seemed to be doing her job, hyping it all up.

But, what do we get? A sneaky memo dropped over the 4th of July weekend on a Sunday evening saying there's no client list, Epstein killed himself, and there will be no more arrests or document dumps.

No signature from her on the memo either - why hide from your own work?

**This betrayal can't stand - [**donate now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/0yL48WwJ64qBvybOqLmYSQ/G3ThC8p892az62G7GniGQwtA) to help me expose it.**

It's heartbreaking, really, when you examine how much she has lied. I've talked to sources who are raging about this, including folks close to Kash Patel and Dan Bongino, who can't believe how she's botched the file release.

Remember "Binder Gate"? She handed out these so-called "exclusive" binders to social media influencers at the White House, full of old, redacted junk from years ago, and she acts like it's a big reveal.

People accused me of being jealous for not getting one, but come on - it was all scripted selfies and no substance.

This isn't about ego; it's about justice.

The Deep sSate loves this kind of distraction because it black-pills our base, making folks think the system's too rigged to fight, it suppresses voter turnout for the 2026 midterms, and it lets radicals win big.

**Don't let them win - [**chip in today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/0yL48WwJ64qBvybOqLmYSQ/G3ThC8p892az62G7GniGQwtA) and stand with me.**

But, here's where you come in, my friend - you're the reason I keep going.

Your support has let me dig into these stories, travel to speak with sources, and broadcast without fear, even as I've been summoned to Washington DC to share my findings on disloyal insiders.

If we don't push back, the enemies - RINOs embedded to sabotage - will bury more truths, from the illegal alien invasion's ties to trafficking networks, to Qatar-funded influencers poisoning our movement.

My reporting has led to the firing of disloyal and compromised admin officials before, like Mike Waltz, and with your help, we can keep the pressure on so we get full transparency.

If this resonates with you and you're as outraged as I am, consider chipping in a bit today. It keeps me independent and in the fight, exposing these betrayals so MAGA can truly drain the swamp.

**One more time - [**donate here**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/0yL48WwJ64qBvybOqLmYSQ/G3ThC8p892az62G7GniGQwtA) to keep the truth alive.**

Stay strong - we've got this together.

Stay vigilant,
Laura Loomer

clean_body: From school boards to Congress, Emerge women are standing up to extremism, defending our rights, and holding power accountable, even when it comes at a personal cost. | = Peter, We unlocked a 5X match for the 🔥 Bring the Heat Fund🔥 and that means your impact today will go five times further. = | = Every dollar you give will help us train and support Democratic women who are leading with courage in one of the most politically volatile moments we’ve faced. From school boards to Congress, Emerge women are standing up to extremism, defending our rights, and holding power accountable, even when it comes at a personal cost. They’re not backing down. Just look at Rep. LaMonica McIver. When she showed up to conduct a lawful oversight visit at a federal detention center, she was met with politically motivated charges. That’s not justice. That’s retaliation. But Rep. McIver is still showing up. Still speaking out. Still doing the work. =🔥=🔥= | = Let’s meet this moment with action. In solidarity, A’shanti F. Dear Friend,
---
The Radical Democrats think they’ve finally got me.
---
**You see, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being **JAILED** for the rest of my life, the most powerful force absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the _ONE_ _THING_ that can save me: _**the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU.**_
---
[**Please help me reach my life-saving goal (_truly!_) today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=cb00c3ad5d4d406891ddb5851faf56a9&_e=456aQ0tgUWS02ogNXA0BQ4Qq63Yn8qAOxiaD73bg22vhl8ILfoW4M79LJDRGESC25IfsBLxN-B-QEtsrKxMDgxjuhEt0CPmdg1jBUsUcHXlGFoCu0bVo2XrwMn4bgicty2pgsEFHjiW1gGV0UsH2HPs0Gc4mz-YHLY9ejZQpIj-y1zN0B3_xVUzVD4Hc__ZP2QJAcVqtZ21evhJpKmxNjqaGvD1yDTT6alxuvh4GTkM-SMuY-vUSw3TXD07XZhl9yYjBGm-NCLzwNp_sZ7GiFAD0S7NxXPlbiILvN36IYKpEWSiNA9Zijp7zWQ4FHfYJWMcc-yaB-0OF64Z3JpRHn5ANWDAjBp7DwQlYQ_MECLSfXIFXVO2QwpYl_z5YTFZwdS3eCpLfDOHW16CHf9EVWmZ1M8cSnZJavCLaeq0nKZXkc68u46pjGJ3_8t33ynR9sSkGPQmzHFxl8MSazLQmz0HaKmLgVlLZIeTx-u6TQLtjWc7_d_q9hH4eUzH1-lwm27gs0MMYv0N87k4tcT63G_VP8IfR6Rtk12wr2u5AE2DmrTtYr5qaWTMaE7P876uZGPLsvWnOAq7kjH6fouaL987itwwdBifds7OKiY7BO9gYXFWACwKupaCsZs_J3DlsNwDw_6-sJzo3FjAsPFB-oQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out.

I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today?

Hear me out.

I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender.

_**And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading.
**_
In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left.

The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota.

clean_body: My fight won’t be won with tweets or press releases. I need you on my side to get this done. | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out. I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today? Hear me out. I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender. And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading. In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left. The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota. As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I know how to be a part of a team and manage one. I am confident that much more can be accomplished when the unit works together. We’ve already built early momentum, and thousands of grassroots conservatives have joined our ranks. But now we’re entering a critical phase. We need grassroots strength to keep this mission alive — to fuel ads, organize events, and push back against the far-left machine. You don’t have to give anything, but if you believe America is still worth defending, For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Records on Trump’s Butler, PA, Would-Be Assassin Thomas Crooks
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding Thomas Matthew Crooks, who attempted to assassinate President Trump on July 13, 2024, (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-02216)).

The SIAs—identified by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) as foreign nationals originating from countries with possible or established links to terrorism—from Central Asia were being smuggled into the U.S. through Mexico in record numbers yet Border Patrol agents in San Diego did not have a process for identifying or vetting them like their counterparts in other southwest border sectors during an unprecedented illegal immigration crisis. His reputation as a relentless fighter against fraud, waste, and abuse was earned, having taken the agency’s Office of Inspector General from one that realized only $3 million in annual monetary impact to one realizing over $2 billion in 2024. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding Thomas Matthew Crooks, who attempted to assassinate President Trump on July 13, 2024, (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-02216)). | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 21, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding Thomas Matthew Crooks, who attempted to assassinate President Trump on July 13, 2024, (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-02216)). ---|--- | | | | | Federal agents at one of the nation’s busiest border crossings failed to screen illegal immigrants from a country that poses a security threat to the United States as record numbers of the Special Interest Aliens (SIAs) poured in through its California sector. The SIAs—identified by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) as foreign nationals originating from countries with possible or established links to terrorism—from Central Asia were being smuggled into the U.S. through Mexico in record numbers yet Border Patrol agents in San Diego did not have a process for identifying or vetting them like their counterparts in other southwest border sectors during an unprecedented illegal immigration crisis. ---|--- | | | | | O’Donnell was U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Inspector General from 2020 to 2025, where he was a lone voice in the EPA warning against “fast money” and careless spending. His reputation as a relentless fighter against fraud, waste, and abuse was earned, having taken the agency’s Office of Inspector General from one that realized only $3 million in annual monetary impact to one realizing over $2 billion in 2024. ---|--- | | | | | “The Hunter Biden pardon for undefined crimes going back a decade is invalid on its face. The Trump Justice Department should immediately release any and all records about the Biden pardon scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ---|--- | | | Just the News Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit against the Justice Department for records regarding former President Biden’s pardon for his son Hunter Biden. “The Hunter Biden pardon for undefined crimes going back a decade is invalid on its face. The Trump Justice Department should immediately release any and all records about the Biden pardon scandal,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said in a statement. USA Today The conservative group Judicial Watch sued the Department of Justiceover alleged Freedom of Information Act violations following the denial of its request for records related to the attempted assassination of President Donald Trump in July 2024. “No more delays and excuses, the FBI should release what it has on the man who tried to kill President Trump a full year ago in Butler,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said in a July 14 news release. “Attorney General Pam Bondi should direct a full and immediate records response to this Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit.” Judicial Watch Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "Gabbard knows what happened to Trump and these deep state intelligence agencies. I think she'll be darn good in her position>" | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

These kind folks really don't ask for much, but a hot cup of coffee keeps them going! This is where you come in: Fellow American - will you sponsor a single cup of coffee for a Winsome volunteer?

name: Rashida Tlaib via Local Democracy Project
subject: Join my letter to close Guantánamo Bay and end immigrant detention there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
Peter,
Trump and other Republicans are trying to spend billions of taxpayer dollars to expand mass incarceration, including proposing to deport and imprison thousands of immigrants in notorious overseas torture prisons.
Recently ICE has been racially profiling U.S. residents and targeting people with tattoos, kidnapping them and sending some to Guantánamo Bay, a facility infamous for human rights abuses.1
Just last month the corrupt far-right members of the Supreme Court ruled to permit deportations of asylum-seekers and undocumented immigrants who’ve committed no crimes—not to their home countries but to random third countries where they lack community and legal status. They ruled that presidents can deport people, without meaningful review, to wherever a president designates a “safe country.”
**I’m fighting back against these horrific governmental attacks on immigrants and on our constitutional rights.** I just led 15 of my colleagues in Congress in calling on the Trump administration to immediately end the use of Guantánamo Bay for migrant detention—and to permanently close the detention facilities there.
**[Will you sign on today to join our letter demanding the immediate, permanent closure of Guantánamo Bay?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9NcO5XPDx50DbF_L6A7b7rME-BP2JNuDHUjm_FUJYq7mFQelqY7D8aWQibp_1-_jHoU7t7HbLwQVVBlVKcZlSdQVXjqvGCGJ1j0LBFglwl6y1nGNfP-v4tM01KZ-zDeqI9ev7D0AN_enQGv1ykceTGeDYjtWa1r2LQCKJnHTRQ7PAf4m5kWJHxVIneRUFaHenEI1VISqYJzTEAVw28z4rVeJFTQj57Q6uuqfRl_lgIgsKaRPXlGRy-EvD3x7kkVco0psK7WjyJUVJkT-oAPSd13rbGQldVld4fsJN4yDTnKhw-l5O0wQvD7GBsbbODzJk9JDf7Z32aUOQBxT2SXrqn87O1MTrwYuwhEDATYroVzizqQud0H7NNEe4xsgcj4-AM2RbMvsPB3kSC4_VzFmdAYKz37_RWnmwmXO2V3EARKQcI3WP_IR_dnzCbPeGvpQlEpO5TTR0SZIe3YiLQvk1Oy8lBGnpT7abmO0tXAW-RzWms2FCy_XrkBXr5QSunBfRaUNwBPznVlVe7ftlLyv43sMuNvF8TM3LwaHah7F9CrUmtlshZbytEeJSDJ1ndDzihtf7YF_ZnAlVjUnWhgMp2n6Pxy1nBuMCGn8aGI7cgs8/4id/2w1EOPGNSzuLjLZs1cxz_w/h0/h001.DbZWy2Tud9bGfhBhlWITMkCc8B0t6qPxZTZxVYWTwck)
** [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9NcO5XPDx50DbF_L6A7b7rME-BP2JNuDHUjm_FUJYq7mFQelqY7D8aWQibp_1-_jHoU7t7HbLwQVVBlVKcZlSdQVXjqvGCGJ1j0LBFglwl6y1nGNfP-v4tM01KZ-zDeqI9ev7D0AN_enQGv1ykceTGeDYjtWa1r2LQCKJnHTRQ7PAf4m5kWJHxVIneRUFaHenEI1VISqYJzTEAVw28z4rVeJFTQj57Q6uuqfRl_lgIgsKaRPXlGRy-EvD3x7kkVco0psK7WjyJUVJkT-oAPSd13rbGQldVld4fsJN4yDTnKhw-l5O0wQvD7GBsbbODzJk9JDf7Z32aUOQBxT2SXrqn_m_Ur552nkbx8y5ZojgDOUs9q9XFwUzfRyCKVEMfgNWPa_o_AZmV0gVWo-WRUS05F3otwtGQu9tsRynvFnXozVL7uu61hXS2fe137zhL1Td_pfkiH_m3fwOXzIyFEWZb5_fEylUezPu7om1-XfzwQBBFaVdHRqBDjqFxQlgWSWgulspZ79Eh6SrlNsdCmOPO8BmgV8ZiN9YNJOzoF4vPeeX44gfvddFG2EUSMs-I6lNplcPOG6mNYi-_ynvprFq-IE8IjQzGsck0SBiorRbU9o/4id/2w1EOPGNSzuLjLZs1cxz_w/h1/h001.dhOoA9Em5RBjxq7l6i2Kg0lGgy05G7Hs8v2L0jS_ZrQ)
Fifty-five organizations endorsed our letter, which also demanded the administration “ensure that all detained individuals are treated with dignity, due process, and the protections guaranteed under both U.S. and international law.”
We must defend the rights of immigrants of all statuses and U.S. citizens, who are also swept up in ICE’s raids and sometimes illegally deported.2 During Trump’s last term, ICE unconstitutionally deported at least 70 U.S. citizens, and that number is sure to rise in this term—unless we do something about it.3
I’ve worked as an immigration attorney, I’m a daughter of immigrants, and I’ve been to inhumane immigration detention facilities, so I’ve seen our broken and dehumanizing immigration system up close. I’ve held the Department of Homeland Security accountable for its violations of our shared rights, and I’ve introduced policies to protect immigrants’ rights and free people from ICE facilities.
**It is my duty as a Congresswoman, and an American, to raise hell until immigrants seeking safety and a better life are treated with dignity and respect, and have real paths to citizenship.**
We have urgent work to do, and it includes fighting back against the fascist attacks on immigrants, including demanding the end of mass immigrant detention and deportations.
**Will you add your name as a grassroots co-signer to our congressional letter demanding the Trump administration immediately halt immigrant detention at Guantánamo Bay, and to permanently close the detention facilities there?** **
** [**Thank you for taking action. Together we’re demanding a government that invests in people’s needs rather than spending hundreds of billions of dollars on mass arrests, detentions, and deportations.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9NcO5XPDx50DbF_L6A7b7rME-BP2JNuDHUjm_FUJYq7mFQelqY7D8aWQibp_1-_jHoU7t7HbLwQVVBlVKcZlSdQVXjqvGCGJ1j0LBFglwl6y1nGNfP-v4tM01KZ-zDeqI9ev7D0AN_enQGv1ykceTGeDYjtWa1r2LQCKJnHTRQ7PAf4m5kWJHxVIneRUFaHenEI1VISqYJzTEAVw28z4rVeJFTQj57Q6uuqfRl_lgIgsKaRPXlGRy-EvD3x7kkVco0psK7WjyJUVJkT-oAPSd13rbGQldVld4fsJN4yDTnKhw-l5O0wQvD7GBsbbODzJk9JDf7Z32aUOQBxT2SXrqnzOfX9MZCOpy7K4JacHR5fRozrYjuDT4gSPp3aePD7gkTQgEHajYOSv6oNgvHq6SpQu5JzCAfVwuUTd9Un_dIL9jjGvKHa-u-Aoo_NUd_vGiKuieahGBymYAgtG9pVxN_2gB-CYJTJrpU4dFKO0DCXVjwzYCbyWW7ud70w10_PTs3x3J2H_eIgFdHmNhCIlhYfdiqRUePiDJ5YRMCtKFXN8J8Gji-RuUYK8Df098hu7pntfW9_pMsmdkHaCZijh7m2YKqwyydwn6kXIiM-2camA/4id/2w1EOPGNSzuLjLZs1cxz_w/h2/h001.rVQxGSqzOVJBWdFihUfBT7fMOeZVgN8vAa5OY1qvBIw)
With you in the fight against fascism,
Rashida

clean_body: | | | Peter, Trump and other Republicans are trying to spend billions of taxpayer dollars to expand mass incarceration, including proposing to deport and imprison thousands of immigrants in notorious overseas torture prisons. Recently ICE has been racially profiling U.S. residents and targeting people with tattoos, kidnapping them and sending some to Guantánamo Bay, a facility infamous for human rights abuses.1 Just last month the corrupt far-right members of the Supreme Court ruled to permit deportations of asylum-seekers and undocumented immigrants who’ve committed no crimes—not to their home countries but to random third countries where they lack community and legal status. They ruled that presidents can deport people, without meaningful review, to wherever a president designates a “safe country.” I’m fighting back against these horrific governmental attacks on immigrants and on our constitutional rights. I just led 15 of my colleagues in Congress in calling on the Trump administration to immediately end the use of Guantánamo Bay for migrant detention—and to permanently close the detention facilities there. Fifty-five organizations endorsed our letter, which also demanded the administration “ensure that all detained individuals are treated with dignity, due process, and the protections guaranteed under both U.S. and international law.” We must defend the rights of immigrants of all statuses and U.S. citizens, who are also swept up in ICE’s raids and sometimes illegally deported.2 During Trump’s last term, ICE unconstitutionally deported at least 70 U.S. citizens, and that number is sure to rise in this term—unless we do something about it.3 I’ve worked as an immigration attorney, I’m a daughter of immigrants, and I’ve been to inhumane immigration detention facilities, so I’ve seen our broken and dehumanizing immigration system up close. I’ve held the Department of Homeland Security accountable for its violations of our shared rights, and I’ve introduced policies to protect immigrants’ rights and free people from ICE facilities. It is my duty as a Congresswoman, and an American, to raise hell until immigrants seeking safety and a better life are treated with dignity and respect, and have real paths to citizenship. We have urgent work to do, and it includes fighting back against the fascist attacks on immigrants, including demanding the end of mass immigrant detention and deportations. Will you add your name as a grassroots co-signer to our congressional letter demanding the Trump administration immediately halt immigrant detention at Guantánamo Bay, and to permanently close the detention facilities there? With you in the fight against fascism, Rashida 1. 2\. 3\. supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Deb Haaland
subject: The places I’ve rocked my mocs (photos inside)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Wearing our moccasins helps us honor our ancestors, whose shoulders we stand on.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**make your first-ever $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for New Mexico.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250721_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-3304&refcode2=3304_400544_jVGoSe&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)
First, I hope you’ll let me show you some of the places where I’ve **rocked my mocs.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250721_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-3304&refcode2=3304_400544_jVGoSe&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)_My child Somáh was my biggest cheerleader on the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior._
On the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior, I decided to wear my white moccasins and a handmade ribbon skirt adorned with butterflies, stars, and corn. No matter where I go, I am a proud Pueblo woman first – including at the Department of the Interior.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250721_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-3304&refcode2=3304_400544_jVGoSe&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)_My moccasins and yellow ribbon skirt stood out in the sea of black suits at Pres. Biden’s inauguration in 2021._
When I wear my mocs, I'm reminded of how powerful our traditional clothing is to our shared heritage. On the first day of the White House Tribal Nations Summit in 2021, I wore my beaded moccasins in solidarity with our Indigenous people across the country. I am incredibly grateful that together, our Administration made extraordinary accomplishments for Indian Country – enduring progress that would make our ancestors proud.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250721_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-3304&refcode2=3304_400544_jVGoSe&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)_I even rocked my mocs at the White House Tribal Nations Summit._
From my ancestral homelands here in New Mexico to the halls of Congress and everywhere in between, I rock my mocs to honor the people whose shoulders I stand on. History has shown us there’s nothing we can’t accomplish when we work together, which is why I’m counting on the support of people like you as we fight for a New Mexico that works for everyone.
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor.[Will you chip in $5 so we can build a strong campaign capable of winning this race and making history again?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250721_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-3304&refcode2=3304_400544_jVGoSe&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250721_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-3304&refcode2=3304_400544_jVGoSe&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)**
I am so grateful for your support. Thank you for being by my side,
Deb 💙
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250721-1&t=2&refcode2=3304_400544_jVGoSe&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3304%2E400544%2EjVGoSe)
