name: Becca Balint
subject: I'm proud to lead a task force to end corporate greed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111880984/558689715/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250721_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I5MjliYy02YzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8uFNRAAOYIMYxUjk3GOu1Kz9nCcQDu2QJ8IDrfrvWc=)
---
Peter, greedy billionaires and corporations have run our lives and dictated our choices for long enough. We feel it at the pharmacy as pharmaceutical giants jack up prescription prices at a moment’s notice. We see it at the grocery store when massive retailers hike up the price of essentials that were affordable a year or two ago. And we feel it when corporations raise the rent to keep people living paycheck to paycheck. You name it, billionaires and big corporations are putting us in the back seat of our own lives. **It's time for us to take our control back.** That’s why I’m heading up a Congressional task force to give people more control over their lives and protect working people from giant corporations and predatory billionaires. **It’s past time we give people fairness and an even playing field. That’s not too much to ask for. ** Real reform is needed, and my task force is heading the effort to unrig the system. We are committed to fighting for a different future for all of us, one in which we feel a sense of control over our lives. We can and will do this, Peter. **But we can’t do it alone. ** **[Your support helps us fight back against corporate greed and ensure that we take control back. So if you can chip in even $5, I’d be extremely grateful for your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111880985/558689716/-1695230582?amount=5&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250721_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I5MjliYy02YzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8uFNRAAOYIMYxUjk3GOu1Kz9nCcQDu2QJ8IDrfrvWc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111880986/558689717/-1695230582?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250721_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I5MjliYy02YzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8uFNRAAOYIMYxUjk3GOu1Kz9nCcQDu2QJ8IDrfrvWc=)

clean_body: | = Peter, greedy billionaires and corporations have run our lives and dictated our choices for long enough. We feel it at the pharmacy as pharmaceutical giants jack up prescription prices at a moment’s notice. We see it at the grocery store when massive retailers hike up the price of essentials that were affordable a year or two ago. And we feel it when corporations raise the rent to keep people living paycheck to paycheck. You name it, billionaires and big corporations are putting us in the back seat of our own lives. It's time for us to take our control back. That’s why I’m heading up a Congressional task force to give people more control over their lives and protect working people from giant corporations and predatory billionaires. It’s past time we give people fairness and an even playing field. That’s not too much to ask for. Real reform is needed, and my task force is heading the effort to unrig the system. We are committed to fighting for a different future for all of us, one in which we feel a sense of control over our lives. We can and will do this, Peter. But we can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support. — Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

- FROM THE DESK OF - Majority Leader Steve Scalise

Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats. Don't forget: Our Majority is the FIRST LINE OF DEFENSE standing in the way of House Democrats having complete power to:

* Impeach President Trump
* Investigate Conservatives

There are three upcoming Special Elections THIS YEAR and one more on the horizon. Democrats are favored to win all of them. If Republicans fail to overperform here, we'll be closer than ever to surrendering control to the Democrats.
So here's what we need:

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I’m fed up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Despite all of Trump’s promises to lower costs, inflation actually went up in June as a result of his tariff chaos.
#
Despite all of Trump’s promises to lower costs, inflation actually went _up_ in June as a result of his tariff chaos.
The Trump economy is chaotic, unstable, and it’s working exactly as designed — for the billionaires at the top.
Meanwhile, families in Delaware and across the country are struggling to juggle sky-high grocery bills. Child care costs that rival rent, and prescription prices that are out of this world.
That’s why no matter how much chaos Trump stirs up, I’m focused on building an economy that actually works for regular people like us — not the wealthiest guy in the boardroom wondering where to park his yacht.
[**If you’re as fed up as I am with the kind of corrupt politics that protect the profits of the powerful over regular people, chip in a few bucks to keep me in Congress fighting like hell for you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250721-1?refcode=em20250721-2199&amount=5&refcode2=2199_21716_OVRqt7&akid=2199%2E21716%2EOVRqt7)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250721-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-2199&refcode2=2199_21716_OVRqt7&akid=2199%2E21716%2EOVRqt7)**
Thank you,
Sarah

name: NDRC HQ
subject: All 👀 on Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Here’s where things stand in Texas:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111881775/558692451/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllYTJiMzA2LTZlNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hFzkCzzGDveOeXn2rboy59IPZA6tSk7aVhUC3eElbo=&emci=2279e108-4966-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9ea2b306-6e66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, **First,** following the 2020 Census, Texas was the only state to gain two congressional seats due to significant population growth. The census data also showed that 95% of the state’s population growth came from communities of color. Despite this, in 2021, the state of Texas enacted a congressional map that reduced the number of districts where voters of color have a fair chance to elect candidates of their choice and increased the number of majority-white districts — blatantly ignoring concerned community members voicing their opposition. **Then,** immediately after this map was enacted, a lawsuit was filed challenging the map for violating Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. **Now,** amidst the ongoing case, Donald Trump has entered the fray, with his administration pushing Texas Republicans to once again look into redrawing the maps, going as far as to urging a “ruthless” gerrymander in the process. And, Gov. Greg Abbott called a special session of the Texas Legislature to get these shady maps approved as soon as possible. All the while, Texas’s congressional map is already being sued for violating the Voting Rights Act because it diminishes the voting power of the state’s fast-growing Latino population. When Republican extremists, let alone the President of the United States, try to gerrymander maps, we have to be prepared to fight back. **That’s why the NDRC is building up our[emergency response efforts](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111881776/558692452/1768578618?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXGerryFTN_email_20250721-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerryFTN_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250721-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerryFTN_&utm_campaign=TXGerryFTN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllYTJiMzA2LTZlNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hFzkCzzGDveOeXn2rboy59IPZA6tSk7aVhUC3eElbo=), to plan for rapid response and mobilization against late-breaking gerrymanders and attacks on free and fair elections.** [**Peter, will you donate to fuel the NDRC’s emergency response efforts and help us be prepared to defend our democracy in Texas and beyond? **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111881777/558692453/1768578618?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXGerryFTN_email_20250721-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerryFTN_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250721-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerryFTN_&utm_campaign=TXGerryFTN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllYTJiMzA2LTZlNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hFzkCzzGDveOeXn2rboy59IPZA6tSk7aVhUC3eElbo=) [**And if you make it a monthly gift and become a monthly donor to the NDRC, you’ll be automatically entered for a chance to receive a call from our Chair, A.G. Holder.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111881778/558692454/1768578618?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXGerryFTN_email_20250721-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerryFTN_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250721-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerryFTN_&utm_campaign=TXGerryFTN&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllYTJiMzA2LTZlNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hFzkCzzGDveOeXn2rboy59IPZA6tSk7aVhUC3eElbo=) Texas voters deserve more. Voters across the entire country deserve more. **Every single American deserves fair maps that truly represent us and our beliefs.** What we don’t deserve is radical Republicans attempting to dilute our voting power as people just because they can’t win without cheating. Their playbook relies on far-right extremism and anti-democracy tactics to “make America great.” But ours relies on mobilizing the people and strengthening our democracy — actions that _**actually**_ make our country great. **Our fair maps movement has helped to expose and dismantle decades of gerrymandering efforts by Republicans in several states, directly holding Republicans accountable for their attempts to undermine the voting rights of the people.** [**These efforts are only possible thanks to supporters like you. In order to advance this work and be prepared for future attempts to manipulate maps, we need to build up our Emergency Response Efforts so we have the resources to fight back. clean_body: Here’s where things stand in Texas: | Peter, First, following the 2020 Census, Texas was the only state to gain two congressional seats due to significant population growth. The census data also showed that 95% of the state’s population growth came from communities of color. Despite this, in 2021, the state of Texas enacted a congressional map that reduced the number of districts where voters of color have a fair chance to elect candidates of their choice and increased the number of majority-white districts — blatantly ignoring concerned community members voicing their opposition. Then, immediately after this map was enacted, a lawsuit was filed challenging the map for violating Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. Now, amidst the ongoing case, Donald Trump has entered the fray, with his administration pushing Texas Republicans to once again look into redrawing the maps, going as far as to urging a “ruthless” gerrymander in the process. And, Gov. Greg Abbott called a special session of the Texas Legislature to get these shady maps approved as soon as possible. All the while, Texas’s congressional map is already being sued for violating the Voting Rights Act because it diminishes the voting power of the state’s fast-growing Latino population. When Republican extremists, let alone the President of the United States, try to gerrymander maps, we have to be prepared to fight back. That’s why the NDRC is building up our=, to plan for rapid response and mobilization against late-breaking gerrymanders and attacks on free and fair elections. = = Texas voters deserve more. Voters across the entire country deserve more. Every single American deserves fair maps that truly represent us and our beliefs. What we don’t deserve is radical Republicans attempting to dilute our voting power as people just because they can’t win without cheating. Their playbook relies on far-right extremism and anti-democracy tactics to “make America great.” But ours relies on mobilizing the people and strengthening our democracy — actions that actually make our country great. Our fair maps movement has helped to expose and dismantle decades of gerrymandering efforts by Republicans in several states, directly holding Republicans accountable for their attempts to undermine the voting rights of the people. = | = = Thanks for being a part of this critical work, Peter. — NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: President Trump needs your help
body:

Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Right to Work Committee.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
Dear Fellow Taxpayer,

I am going to share with you Washington DC's dirtiest secret.

Federal union bosses have seized control of the federal workforce and declared President Trump and Elon Musk ENEMY #1 and #2 for fighting to "Drain the Swamp" and save hundreds of billions of tax dollars by downsizing and reforming the bloated DC bureaucracy!

You see, union control of government is a CANCER killing the U.S. taxpayer -- impoverishing America's workers and entrepreneurs with red tape, wasteful spending and soaring inflation.

Using tens of millions of dollars seized from workers' paychecks, Big Labor's federal union bosses are orchestrating virtually every howl of outrage, protest and lawsuit against Donald Trump's and Elon Musk's cutbacks and reforms. . .

. . .paying for the lawyers, the plaintiffs, the lawsuits and the activists you see on TV marching and screaming into bullhorns. That's why I hope you will _STAND UP TODAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRUSADE to slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon guarding "the Swamp" in Washington_.

Please agree to sign your PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT to President Trump, Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency and your U.S. Senators and Congressman. I'll give you a link to your petition in a moment, but I want to be sure you understand how serious this is.

_President Trump is fighting valiantly to tame the out-of-control federal bureaucracy. And he needs to know he has YOUR FULL SUPPORT to stand firm_ when the Swamp Rats in Washington lash out.

And perhaps even more importantly, please _sign your petitions DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman support President Trump's crusade_ with every vote they cast!

The fact is government union bosses are the real puppet-masters pulling the strings behind the curtain in the "DC Swamp."

That's why you and I must PROVE to President Trump (and my colleagues here in the Senate and House) that _the American people OVERWHELMINGLY support his reforms and will not tolerate any more obstructionism, excuses or gridlock_!

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (popularly known as DOGE) are exposing the scandals and corruption government union officials have been hiding for decades:
---
$$$ Did you know that _only 6% of federal bureaucrats show up_ in person for a full work week? (And that figure drops to 1% if you take out janitors, security guards, and maintenance personnel!)
$$$ Can you believe that _government union big shots are PAID with YOUR tax dollars to conduct so-called "official union business" -- COSTING TAXPAYERS NEARLY A QUARTER OF A BILLION TAX DOLLARS A YEAR_?
$$$ Were you aware that federal office buildings cost $15.7 BILLION annually just to keep the doors open? And that _only 12% of federal office space is even occupied_?
$$$ Are you outraged to learn federal law effectively bars open shop, non-union contractors from bidding on federal public works projects -- _soaking American taxpayers for an estimated $21.7 billion a year in inflated construction costs_?
$$$ Did you know that if a conscientious public servant does a good job and their supervisor awards them a merit-pay bonus (or tries to fire or discipline an incompetent bureaucrat) without "going through the union" that would be a VIOLATION OF FEDERAL LABOR RULES?!?
$$$ Are you angry that in 2021, JOE BIDEN BESTOWED $130 BILLION UPON TEACHER UNION RADICALS who are brainwashing our kids!
The fact is _government union czars are the single biggest obstacle President Trump must overcome_ to cut out-of-control government spending and flagrant waste, fraud and abuse.

**[That's why I hope you will CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT TODAY](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=pty32nuvlxo4swpkld20bazt694onepj068zot95at0167fd10chw3dyndjb4r6atb1nvije2ffll45k55ngf5mxy75ywnu4517na4m4y97rjatsa6z4mhg75l74cpdkwvfl2mj74z74t2f5vkaclcnvuhvp2pu0ld8cvyuls6dbgca7k4i7mfww49umz1ry0yn9pqhwjidcn3d24p1v9nyil1b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrmrd&__onlt=h)**!

As soon as their handpicked political cronies lost the elections, GOVERNMENT UNION OFFICIALS IMMEDIATELY VOWED TO BLOCK TRUMP'S REFORMS.

You see, President Trump is not only standing up to the liberal media and the radical Democrats, he's taking on the _unelected czars who secretly rule our government from within_.

Union officials I bet you've never even heard of -- like Everett Kelly.

He's not a Member of Congress. Not a Governor nor a Senator. No voter has ever cast a ballot for him.

And yet he rules Washington DC with an iron fist from his throne atop the largest government union, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE).

_The AFGE chieftain rules an empire of nearly a million government workers paid an average of $118,260 per year, costing taxpayers an estimated $97.4 BILLION ANNUALLY_.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency are exposing outrage after outrage committed by federal union bosses like AFGE President Everett Kelly:
\--- AFGE Council 220 President Witold Skwierczynski _COLLECTED A PAYCHECK FROM THE SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION FOR 34 YEARS WITHOUT WORKING A SINGLE HOUR_!

He couldn't have gone to work if he'd tried because _he was banned from Social Security offices nationwide after sending A PHOTO OF HIS PENIS_ to a fellow employee at 2 o'clock in the morning! He only quit because Trump's executive order required him and other union officials to (in his words) go "back to our desks to process claims."

Now, he's collecting a full pension "close to equal to my salary."
\--- The Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service played "the heavy" to force workers and employers to knuckle under to union-boss demands. The agency reportedly was "_RIFE WITH CORRUPTION" whose staffers "LIVED LIKE KINGS_." Despite having only 60 employees (many of whose offices had ENSUITE BATHROOMS WITH PRIVATE SHOWERS!), the FMCS occupied a _nine-story office tower_ on DC's posh K Street.
According to the Daily Wire, for years the agency's Director _billed the taxpayer for his meals and living expenses, claiming to be on a "years-long business trip" to DC_.
\--- Corrupt union officials are notorious for treating worker pension funds like their own lavish piggybanks. MANY union pension plans are teetering on the verge of insolvency. So JOE BIDEN BILKED THE TAXPAYER FOR $32 BILLION TO BAIL-OUT A SINGLE TEAMSTER UNION PENSION FUND.

That's bad enough. But instead of placing the pension into receivership under government oversight, _he left the foxes in charge of the henhouse_!
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=pty32nuvlxo4swpkld20bazt694onepj068zot95at0167fd10chw3dyndjb4r6atb1nvije2ffll45k55ngf5mxy75ywnu4517na4m4y97rjatsa6z4mhg75l74cpdkwvfl2mj74z74t2f5vkaclcnvuhvp2pu0ld8cvyuls6dbgca7k4i7mfww49umz1ry0yn9pqhwjidcn3d24p1v9nyil1b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrmrd&__onlt=h)**.

How did Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats let it come to this? Well, they were well compensated. . .

Organized Labor poured an estimated $25 BILLION into the last elections to defeat Donald Trump and elect Kamala Harris -- and other radical Democrats like her!

You see, federal workers are REQUIRED BY LAW to submit to the so-called "representation" of well-heeled union bigwigs _whether they like it or not_. Federal law gives union officials power over workers WHO AREN'T EVEN UNION MEMBERS!

_Most government bureaucrats figured out long ago that THEY DON'T REALLY WORK FOR THE TAXPAYER, NOR EVEN THE PRESIDENT... THEY WORK FOR THE UNION BOSSES_. Plain and simple.

President Trump knows he can't "Drain the Swamp" until we support his efforts to "Slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon."

The Union-Boss Dragon should be stripped bare:
\--- NO Monopoly Bargaining power over any federal employee.
\--- NO money deducted from any federal worker's or contractor's paycheck.
\--- NO authority to negotiate salaries, wages, job rules, promotion, firing or hiring.
\--- NO privileged status in winning multiple-billion dollar federal contracts.
\--- NO payment for work except for the US taxpayer, not a union.
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=pty32nuvlxo4swpkld20bazt694onepj068zot95at0167fd10chw3dyndjb4r6atb1nvije2ffll45k55ngf5mxy75ywnu4517na4m4y97rjatsa6z4mhg75l74cpdkwvfl2mj74z74t2f5vkaclcnvuhvp2pu0ld8cvyuls6dbgca7k4i7mfww49umz1ry0yn9pqhwjidcn3d24p1v9nyil1b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrmrd&__onlt=h)**.

But government union chiefs are so powerful and so entrenched, _I will need more than your petitions to slay the union bigwigs' DC Dragon_.

That's why I've joined forces with the National Right to Work Committee. When it comes to fighting AND BEATING corrupt union officials, they are the experts.

And that's why I hope you'll not only sign your petition but also make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 today to help the National Right to Work Committee EXPAND their nationwide campaign to prove to my colleagues in Washington, DC that politicians should fear "We, The People" more than "inside the Beltway" union politicos.

After you sign your petition, I ask you to be as generous as you can.

4\. And funds permitting, air costly hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads (especially on Fox News and Fox Radio, and local conservative talk!) to generate MILLIONS of letters, phone calls and texts to Capitol Hill demanding Big Labor's monopoly bargaining powers over the federal workforce be repealed.

FOR LIBERTY,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul

clean_body: Virginia’s future depends on a strong Assembly—stand with us to safeguard our core values. | Dear Derek, This November, Virginians can reaffirm our Commonwealth as a beacon for progress and democracy. Strengthening our General Assembly protects us from extremism and preserves our rights. Electing new Democratic leaders depends on partnership in the Assembly to defend crucial rights and advance education. Our Assembly is the firewall between national extremism and Virginia’s future. Without a strong Assembly, even committed leaders face an uphill battle. Every election is a chance to block extremist policies. Every contribution and conversation helps secure Virginia’s future. Grassroots support protects our hard-won gains.** = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = With heart, hustle, and hope, Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . name: The New York Sun
subject: Times v. Sun l David v. Goliath
body:
The Times has betrayed its readers

| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=309816f6cb474a6490b0c408a7a8a8bc&_e=OtC-Nh-j4IQg_o85Gi2urZwKviM8xdVTOeW5Lk1Ve94k9OqTSU-Jt19knOa_IDdtQ1Tgr3ZbFOhpXf1-mMlQpkRSuIjrPtIPXrtqxJ1o_LhPviAMZPRsTiNArvZHRmqEYTt_ppM-JEE-uahO73ILZSQvoZQbZJAxX5gdqf5wCswNEm0826mqTx5qhclyltUbz7UL4PjKDgpJPl-LuA3vYddo5MCLeitGFFy3UVKh0rJSuul1CBzbr2EYrT6VdBQrqUOK-C06XoQ2bgjNJzHjToP4rDvf0S1mfuighBjE5kAwDfs1EwcmSHuZjBGBHdr6_msiDZD617SatPYVUIwACrnLmTO_WfFxMiRvkWcpaP0vIzB9mzpS8zzQhIeaJla9iZq_ZUCTW29x6ra7pZmw_gysl0fBbPGMOVNq54CjIxmjo8uGzfTHZLroWCXwTYmMAalLnoP8FYh_EyN0nYLCJTHLeAI2Esj4yMAZGeyE5tqHNkqDGo8I36P8chyFNQ9TbrUfW7vd_MoVBkWvdvarNw8i4wia3kg9gZQ5cZTIWG9kfmCy6GValpI0CA4ZWokd6peZfQR9IhLVxy4PfkuRrQ%3D%3D)

| | Reader,It wasn't so long ago that The New York Times was upheld as the gold standard in journalism. Today, many Americans feel the paper has betrayed its readers.

Now, enthusiasm is growing over The New York Sun returning to its historic role as a counterweight to the Times. We've heard a lot of frustration over the widening gulf between what the Times claims to be and what it is in reality.
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=309816f6cb474a6490b0c408a7a8a8bc&_e=OtC-Nh-j4IQg_o85Gi2urZwKviM8xdVTOeW5Lk1Ve94k9OqTSU-Jt19knOa_IDdtQ1Tgr3ZbFOhpXf1-mMlQpkRSuIjrPtIPXrtqxJ1o_LhPviAMZPRsTiNArvZHRmqEYTt_ppM-JEE-uahO73ILZSQvoZQbZJAxX5gdqf5wCswNEm0826mqTx5qhclyltUbiSZjdGtiUv8tWxMVOScI49Ktzlb24rOz09XbxjyHB5Kd6aExad6nr7IESIiWoAA0NtrPJ9ot7-IesDZSBGF5tKfoV2K9w5awDqgkruuJA0qnNCRRC-RGNh4UXLK07h4r8b_WCmsnnrLqhGxzUMsFtE8NTzJACfl9SjFL8cDu_4PL2Df2ralRIKLZcKRfastl7psVoZzvhfikEKi2SUYlY4hutno-58BfSNW9N1XL6C3J4jhiinWEBPw-Bw17Y9ZSbK_cRoS86pH8j8sXqkiQEkCudZ_TF8FX3CREaN0skwhxNCy5cCex4WeWZlUUknWpMD_ojhWozzkoJlziFVRgd748_9b9HYiAbb6SylEa2W4-tezGM9aFEljmK9wEtaWyb6QYnMpRem4jvKym-wyIFw%3D%3D)
---
| | Like the Times, we're an almost 200 years old, Pulitzer-winning broadsheet with robust coverage of politics and the arts, and now focused on a digital-first strategy. **But we have a very different approach to journalism than the Times.** One that's in higher demand now than ever. It won't be easy. The Times is large and established. It's a modern David vs. Goliath media battle.Ultimately, a membership with the Sun doesn't just give you full access to the finest American journalism, **it also sends a message to the Times and other newsrooms that have lost their way. Will you join us?**
---

Peter,

Thanks to MAGA Republican Ryan Mackenzie’s vote for the Big, Terrible Bill, rural hospitals in Pennsylvania will receive even less funding, putting them at risk of reducing services or even closing.

[_**Help us fight back by electing a leader who will fight for ALL Pennsylvanians in Congress, no matter their zip code >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111882227/558694237/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-07-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFhNzk0NzktNzA2Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SzDb1AdYQnK17l0rZ-jArT4IIMRIIW9bai5Vxjx2AXY=)

These cuts affect everyone, not just the 17,519 people in PA-07 who could lose their healthcare coverage because of this bill. Every community around these rural hospitals could lose access to critical services and be forced to drive hours in order to access care.

**Ryan Mackenzie knew this, and he didn’t care. He still voted to rip healthcare coverage from thousands of Pennsylvanians and cut funding for rural hospitals across the Commonwealth.**

We need a leader for our district who knows how important it is for everyone to have access to healthcare – someone like Carol Obando-Derstine who is ready to stand up for rural Pennsylvanians in Congress.

body:

Lauren Boebert is marching right behind him, rubber-stamping his every word — and she’s doing it in our district. And yet... the response from Democratic leadership has been cautious, careful, and completely inadequate. We don’t need more polished press releases or strongly-worded letters. We need a new wave of Democrats who are ready to fight like hell for our future. **That’s why I’m running for Congress.** I’m a manufacturing engineer, not a party insider — and I’m stepping up because I believe this moment demands more urgency, more fire, and more fight than we’ve seen so far. I’m not afraid to call out extremism. I’m not afraid to push our party to do more. And I’m not afraid to go head-to-head with Boebert and the MAGA movement to protect Colorado’s 4th District and our democracy. **[But I need your help to do it. We’re building this campaign from the ground up — no corporate PACs, no establishment handouts. Just people like you who believe it’s time to shake things up. clean_body: | | | Friend, Let’s be honest: the people running the Democratic Party right now don’t appear ready for what we’re up against. Donald Trump is openly threatening revenge, promising mass deportations, and pushing the most dangerous agenda in modern American history. Lauren Boebert is marching right behind him, rubber-stamping his every word — and she’s doing it in our district. And yet... the response from Democratic leadership has been cautious, careful, and completely inadequate. We don’t need more polished press releases or strongly-worded letters. We need a new wave of Democrats who are ready to fight like hell for our future. That’s why I’m running for Congress. I’m a manufacturing engineer, not a party insider — and I’m stepping up because I believe this moment demands more urgency, more fire, and more fight than we’ve seen so far. I’m not afraid to call out extremism. I’m not afraid to push our party to do more. And I’m not afraid to go head-to-head with Boebert and the MAGA movement to protect Colorado’s 4th District and our democracy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: The old playbook isn’t working. So we’re writing a new one — and it starts with us. Thanks for believing in something better, John Padora Candidate for Congress, CO-04 John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

body:
Washington Republicans are still pushing their scheme to sell off our public lands through Congress.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111882325/558694598/1435897075?refcode=email_072125_lands&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ2NjRlZC03MDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YmvnV6HkHxvpOe-0gjSceYL8HaDGZKDbLXLttVOFZhI=&emci=e7ddb7cf-4c63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d64664ed-7066-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715) Folks, Washington Republicans are still trying to push their underhanded scheme to sell off our public lands through Congress. **FIRST:** Trump and Republicans in Congress cooked up a scheme to auction off vast swathes of public land — including MILLIONS of acres here in Colorado — to offset the cost of their massive tax handouts to the ultra-wealthy. **THEN:** John and his Democratic colleagues in the Senate fought hard — and succeeded — in stripping provisions to sell off public lands from the GOP budget before Republicans greenlit the bill for Trump’s signature. **NOW: GOP Senator Mike Lee said he’ll resurrect this failed scheme, and try to ram a bill to privatize our public lands through the Senate AGAIN.** _We can’t let that happen._ Look, we’ve defeated GOP proposals like this and defended our public lands before, and if we work together, _we can do it again._ John is committed to doing everything in his power to ensure this measure dies in the Senate. **That includes calling on this grassroots team to dial up the pressure on Republicans to drop this plan once again.[Please, if you’re with us, rush a donation today and help us send a message to Washington He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Since Donald Trump took office, we’ve seen an endless barrage of chaos and controversy. And now, Trump and his Republican allies are doubling down — not to govern, but to cling to power by any means necessary. = | | = FIRST: Donald Trump and Republicans passed a cruel bill that strips away healthcare and food assistance from millions of Americans — all so they could hand tax breaks to Trump and his wealthy friends. THEN: The NRCC started flooding races like ours with dark money, trying to shield themselves from the backlash of their own harmful legislation — and protect Trump at any cost. NOW: Republicans in Texas are now trying to rig the next election by redrawing congressional maps to lock in their majority and shut out millions of voters. Republicans know they can’t win on their ideas. So they cheat. They gerrymander, suppress votes, and rely on billionaires and super PACs to drown out the voices of everyday Americans. We can’t let them get away with it. We’ve won this seat twice before — against the odds — and with your help, we’ll win it again. name: TRUMP JOB OFFER
subject: This would be my greatest victory of all!
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205gwia2ge5k5itp7ige7danc92fdy5x567qnjz32ld8anstggj6uh5xu36juhj7av1cfg015rappa7mljn&__stmp=szrnna&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrnna&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol038hranmudb6vf2ubgql4xr5teq0zauomfumj0j0x8se5i62bp5c1vbncgz0ehrjw7qvwnukw3yct19mozzntmitl7qoitl33onc8yb3idlcvodlwij9q3scny42r789edkoskgxbx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrnna&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrnna&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrnna&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrnna&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol038hranmudb6vf2ubgql4xr5teq0zauomfumj0j0x8se5i62bp5c1vbncgz0ehrjw7qvwnukw3yct19mozzntmitl7qoitl33onc8yb3idlcvodlwij9q3scny42r789edkoskgxbx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrnna&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szrnna&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: New Dems
subject: The USPS is still under threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Speak out before it’s too late >>

| Team – the fight to protect the USPS isn’t over, in fact, it’s heating up.

Donald Trump is trying to privatize the USPS, putting a critical public institution at risk. **And if we don’t speak out now, those plans could gain momentum.**

The Postal Service isn’t just a delivery system, **it’s a lifeline for millions of Americans.**

The moment we treat the USPS like a business instead of a public service, we jeopardize access, equality, and trust.

**New Dems are committed to stopping privatization,** but we need to show that Americans everywhere are ready to stand up for the Postal Service.

In a powerful letter to President Trump, they called it “a betrayal to the more than 640,000 postal employees who work tirelessly every day to ensure mail is delivered to every corner of the country.”

The effort to privatize the USPS would **raise costs on everyday Americans, undermine mail-in voting, and weaken essential services for rural communities.**

Their inexcusable lies and accusations of “assault” on ICE officers are obviously false. However, Republicans are continuing their attacks on me and pushing to strip me of my committee assignments and even officially censure me. I refuse to be bullied by the Trump administration, House Republicans, or their abuse of power. That’s why I need your help to make sure I’m ready for whatever comes at us next. [Can you split $10 between myself and Blue Amp Action in the next 24 hours to help us ensure we have the resources to counter the dictator-like tactics and ridiculous lies of the Trump Administration? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bd39d5b-91b6-415e-8759-c1831b31d1c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

They are throwing everything at me and my New Jersey colleagues to try to distract from their inability to govern and their immoral cuts to Medicaid, food assistance programs and more all to give a trillion dollars in tax cuts to the top 1%. They will do anything they can to instill fear into people who fight for justice and human rights and hide from the truth. But I won’t let them intimidate or silence me. Are you with me, Peter? [Please, if you’re standing with me and ready to help fight back against this abuse of power, split $10 or any other amount between myself and Blue Amp Action in the next 24 hours.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0b919db-d8a4-4c6f-90f1-6a9cbb448f76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77b1fb8e-1b25-4fb5-a7c4-505b856ef2a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Blue Dog Coalition
subject: Marie gets it
body:
We need to listen and talk about real issues.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111882842/558696241/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiZjFkNzUwLTcyNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_vsfMKI7VtmGbzOpkGJc6G0_Kb5C8WnvODfjphDoDG4=) | Peter, If Democrats want to win back rural America, they’ve got to stop talking like Washington insiders — and start sounding like someone’s neighbor. People are tired of being talked down to, ignored, and told what to care about. Voters want leaders who listen to what they care about: the cost of living, the price of farm equipment, and why it feels like hard work no longer pays off. **That’s exactly why Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is breaking through.** She flipped a Trump district by doing something rare: listening. She focused on real issues like small businesses, infrastructure, and supporting the trades. And she brought Blue Dog values to Washington: common sense, bipartisanship, and place-based politics. [_**Marie proves that when Democrats respect local communities, we can win anywhere. But we need more leaders like her. clean_body: We need to listen and talk about real issues. | = | Peter, If Democrats want to win back rural America, they’ve got to stop talking like Washington insiders — and start sounding like someone’s neighbor. People are tired of being talked down to, ignored, and told what to care about. Voters want leaders who listen to what they care about: the cost of living, the price of farm equipment, and why it feels like hard work no longer pays off. That’s exactly why Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is breaking through. She flipped a Trump district by doing something rare: listening. She focused on real issues like small businesses, infrastructure, and supporting the trades. And she brought Blue Dog values to Washington: common sense, bipartisanship, and place-based politics. = = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for standing with us, Blue Dog Coalition Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sht done. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: ALERT: Stop Trump’s judicial nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump’s henchman is one step away from a lifetime judicial appointment. | |
---
Peter, **They’re not even trying to hide their corruption anymore.** Republicans on the Senate Judiciary Committee just voted to confirm Emil Bove—Trump’s personal lawyer and DOJ henchman—to a lifetime appointment on one of the most powerful courts in the country. Bove oversaw the illegal mass firings of federal employees and the dismissal of bribery charges against Mayor Eric Adams. He fired prosecutors who worked on January 6 cases. A DOJ whistleblower says he pressured government lawyers to ignore court orders. **Bove is the ultimate Trump loyalist. That’s exactly the kind of person right-wing extremists want in the highest courts in the land.** **[Bove’s nomination is now headed for a vote before the full Senate. But this isn’t a done deal. Bove’s history is so dangerous and corrupt that even Republicans are thinking twice about rubber stamping his appointment. Write to your Senators now, demanding they vote no on Bove’s nomination.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRxvilxbKzn0vCm0O7XBln41gOqs9TVQzYpdARL1jErU6gaF8VXVfikCFPSQvyBin_meUuURurdbCydMJ7jQTjsqQYS8aj6ENgqYHku9Cs8wo2A9VxATQc7za2YI5KmYKRsfy9HrkXI0f0Oc5S-RtiNB6GF5uEZUuXeTV7BT14CJovttjBoMT2Gz5z1ORdcHgitWReEmCNnf2bbu8jTZxTaYtXMw2NRbXjJrlf9UmFb2lJcqvWShQsZ-fDtsNXgewDJB4EXh7YS6rmYEf1ZKN_Bw/4id/Yskrw37hQaSRmE6bYW4OjA/h0/h001.otHT8agqwZKeAPPpOVCTPdkfd4kb7aMr2-M_3ii21P8)** [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRxvilxbKzn0vCm0O7XBln41gOqs9TVQzYpdARL1jErU6gaF8VXVfikCFPSQvyBin_meUuURurdbCydMJ7jQTjsg6Z9ij6Bmw1zsMcwAWzom150oXieyGD4ZS893Bm1POAwvJYWDKpzqzcT9J1aXpb7i_sDmjybKklXThF89lkZSGBpgDYNCF-JyToiavU-6SlxzPNUWHowxmnDtYZRA5JG_ST5Dgem5TofvUe_25Um8jeOz2kEoFjQ6Gf4akzgdhuLTXL2X4iaIAVdHuXmxfwSQ/4id/Yskrw37hQaSRmE6bYW4OjA/h1/h001.tOJ9pp5BR8mKcd9ekHGbqqcogMzcl8-OVUMKK-G5TgE) **Experts say the nomination likely sets Bove up for a future Supreme Court appointment.** Trump has said that Bove will “do anything necessary” to support MAGA. He’s even refused to rule out a third term for Trump. Bove is the final key to allowing Trump to take whatever illegal actions he wants, whether that means consolidating unprecedented executive power, building gulags for American citizens, or stripping even more of our most vulnerable communities of their rights and livelihoods. **Bove is perhaps Trump’s most chilling nomination yet.** It’s a shameless and unabashed power play. Trump isn’t playing chicken anymore—he’s actively attempting to dismantle our democracy. **[Bove is now just one vote away from a lifetime post as a federal judge. Even Republican senators should be ashamed to vote for his appointment, and they need to hear from us right now. Demand the Senate reject Bove’s nomination once and for all.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRxvilxbKzn0vCm0O7XBln41gOqs9TVQzYpdARL1jErU6gaF8VXVfikCFPSQvyBin_meUuURurdbCydMJ7jQTjsmRN3Bj5cGpNFFZ_ZSb-FAbVa7Akf51L3O8B5BWMtZyot63utXV038z9I5l4VwGQKPgQqx8w4RYXCWDvt_sCyV08V__B1kmhPcFCAzHOqtgU0F-Y7IpOqQKiAG5N-9cFoSygrcIPf0rLV8y-WEgTfNpkOoG1xBGWSFL9ExGQhcuZci021c7pmaMZ5l7LoCkIUw/4id/Yskrw37hQaSRmE6bYW4OjA/h2/h001.UVc4WzRUOVOuxu-Xqqrq8tNAIWSt2z38s5fViiE4JGQ) ** Thank you for siding with justice and democracy, Morgan Stahr

subject: Remember “Liberation Day?” It’s back.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
He’s re-implemented his massive tariffs with America’s largest trading partners, Canada and Mexico

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111883028/558696836/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGQ3NTZlNC03MjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDlTElcD50tt_mvkueiO2hnTb5a0vyGtBZFmwFmZNnU=) Remember Donald Trump’s “Liberation Day?” In April, he announced a series of reckless, devastating tariffs on nearly every country across the globe... before quietly backing down a few days later. He postponed the tariffs for three months, promising to make 90 “deals” before the tariffs went into effect. Well, it’s been three months. And he’s nowhere close to 90 deals. Instead, he’s re-implemented his massive tariffs with America’s largest trading partners, Canada and Mexico. **Now, the average American household will pay $2,300 more in taxes every year.** It’s a joke. So many Kansas families are already feeling the squeeze under Trump’s economy. But Trump refuses to admit he was wrong. He refuses to admit that his tariffs are a disaster for working people across the country. But we can’t say we’re surprised. For years, Donald Trump has done nothing but pay lip service to the working class, all while delivering handout after handout to his rich friends — and this tariff chaos is no different. [_**Here’s the good news: Congress has the power to reverse these tariffs permanently, but ONLY if we elect a Democratic majority next year. So please, can you chip in to help Sharice defend this seat and do her part to flip the House blue? clean_body: He’s re-implemented his massive tariffs with America’s largest trading partners, Canada and Mexico = Remember Donald Trump’s “Liberation Day?” In April, he announced a series of reckless, devastating tariffs on nearly every country across the globe... before quietly backing down a few days later. He postponed the tariffs for three months, promising to make 90 “deals” before the tariffs went into effect. Well, it’s been three months. And he’s nowhere close to 90 deals. Instead, he’s re-implemented his massive tariffs with America’s largest trading partners, Canada and Mexico. Now, the average American household will pay $2,300 more in taxes every year. It’s a joke. So many Kansas families are already feeling the squeeze under Trump’s economy. But Trump refuses to admit he was wrong. He refuses to admit that his tariffs are a disaster for working people across the country. But we can’t say we’re surprised. # [Put ICE officers who break the law in jail -- no matter how long it takes](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d5fb95b-cbdf-4301-be1d-963ee2829cf3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7bb1705-0f6f-44e8-a39f-a6d47bff81cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The [evidence](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5061597b-82f9-45d9-a5eb-a0467176244c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) is all around us -- ICE officers are knowingly and callously breaking the law. They are beating people. They are putting them in horrible conditions. They are even violating the basic rights of American citizens. Yes, there are many who are not breaking the law, and doing their jobs appropriately. But the bad ones need to know that they will be prosecuted and punished, even if it means waiting until the lawless Trump administration is out of power. They need to know NOW that their actions will have consequences, and they will not get to say they were "just following orders." We must do this to push back against current abuses, and also to keep them from going much further down a dark and dangerous road. [**Add your name: Put ICE officers who break the law in jail -- no matter how long it takes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b7679c2-2629-492f-8b8a-7aa8546a2d23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Marty O'Donnell
subject: While you struggle, Susie Lee’s cashing in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS**
body:
It’s time to fire the elites who profit off your pain. |
---
Friend,

While working and middle-class American families struggle to pay for gas, groceries, and rent, Democrat Susie Lee just made nearly **$180,000 in a single month** —not from serving the public, _**but from playing the stock market from inside Congress.**_

[](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=4220659e1c5b483f8779f60cc84dc9a7&_e=FJHmTrnnFqH4sYH7_1EwFTHQDQZDpfQLCX-ZeG5NohS0fRUi8mgEc_KmMjmzgRBrW9vy6pq0iZ9Fqh2S1UNif9-j-DjU62xmp_eREGeHgPQZtVxLRZjbcLbXs9vy9rizGlsktStH9wl6JriotLywRg9XkUihSgIZ1qQg7W2BCSO2Ah3ExwlxiiZ5H_jgwudtzRkZfEnrLgjJDGZI5whqg7wEXL6s9f6wcZX-89Pgax42E-_wE4GtSXY7ZSZ2mshPjqLZrve0qiJ9UvUIgIyovt2qwMLDpZFBHsXuv221NIkJUujo3tzPNdxMuFtK4bDGvgtBx1-yPwNopQgMrzRJLvpuFyZY9uV27luu4Lmlk_FAt0Kqtl1Py-eR91IeKoga0kpzJlsK-Ff5qK_kbsDFZBabhHnocSXRcbCXRo7khxE4UkDJnk6gboGJg9nBJszb6XeJgAwQi1YcCom4C_dUNXtVVdPg-DOneDEDhG_FtQNpNKkW5OQ-yzffmt_O1MXSmU0HF9o1i1hZ8v-IOWEBRe2BbTVjG-7_tjE8MGR1F2u3kc1-mdrzXj7-jn-8wc-a08QfPBSZdDVgTVYDIMdyfApy8aCLq188C72untGERLjPiDVlvCBKTdeFRAYHo3WH5XeCpFWQKh2kKJnOyEAAlDlfVZDu6d3kwVUHg_xwB6JVSyREoiaq2KjkdekyUXse6M1qZxWQ4N_fCcJ6WSot8JC0orWE3gIdRUrNCxzbawoKMWML-aOuEwzcwoMX_Pbm89lTeHI3uWo76UE5-gLkCseEmvGBGcGn6pG456gla5EII1MHjgWA-GP9IkYvJP2c)
That’s right. According to this new report, **Democrat Congresswoman Susie Lee raked in an estimated $179,700** from stock trades in just 30 days. For many families, that’s more than three years of pay—for her, it’s just another month of cashing in while in office.

This isn’t a one-time slip-up. **Susie Lee has a long history of unethical trading.** She’s repeatedly failed to properly report her stock transactions, violating the STOCK Act—a law meant to prevent exactly this kind of abuse.

See her shady record for yourself:

[](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=4220659e1c5b483f8779f60cc84dc9a7&_e=FJHmTrnnFqH4sYH7_1EwFTHQDQZDpfQLCX-ZeG5NohS0fRUi8mgEc_KmMjmzgRBrW9vy6pq0iZ9Fqh2S1UNif9-j-DjU62xmp_eREGeHgPQZtVxLRZjbcLbXs9vy9rizGlsktStH9wl6JriotLywRg9XkUihSgIZ1qQg7W2BCSO2Ah3ExwlxiiZ5H_jgwudtzRkZfEnrLgjJDGZI5whqg7wEXL6s9f6wcZX-89Pgax42E-_wE4GtSXY7ZSZ2mshPjqLZrve0qiJ9UvUIgIyovt2qwMLDpZFBHsXuv221NImSajL7Rw73bwvmkJq0NjY6pK15CEdxBzk-_rj_kesP9xjvAMoBFucKblP4hLgdPaKhBzx5rXTavTVMOFk4XgpyDNPmC9OjgzvTuiQ9tE-LOM8tWU7Ir3Vvf8jh9kkYFY9Hs8SfHEHZbMccXSEPnHRUS-0LHMGouYQyRHyPOCqIm4mcBa8OIn52Rlum9qUoNDNYdQtt6pa6o-A-z1qPn3CqCcJSi_Vk8DZDNnvcCEvhavFeAWOwZH8OuojishmCsaDddwf2MnlkMl5B9h2Mt4KoZpCp9KOd3wdARn0H9QEBMbpTRjw5AALrRT_Djl4hTZzbmt-ml2OMuUWbmkSsH230EEBGbi-0zDQ6cTh25o62VSlz1BLB24QLzFC9Zrmswx7i8XfxdfsLpbFW210iytFdj6NYOgIGYU2gbCSyfBBkN2xP7x-_iZtgTU1aHbn9TQnOYfuC0ushyrrHuGe0wsvS4EhnYeeG5n6nDcc5u_vK5Gk0MjM2Ka8baB38vymuW7u9CDAmnIFz5SxIciScwaDg)
Let’s be clear: Susie Lee is part of the **out-of-touch elite** who use their public office to get rich while families across America fall behind. And to make matters worse, **she votes for the same reckless policies** that drive up inflation and make everyday necessities harder to afford.

I’m not a politician – _I’m a composer!_ I’m not running for Congress in NV-03 for stock tips or personal gain. And I’m certainly not trying to get to Washington to play politics. I’m running against Susie Lee to **stand up for working-class Americans** and to clean up Washington— _two things Susie will never do._

**But I need your help.** The elites are pouring money into this race to protect Susie Lee and her corrupt cash machine. [**Will you chip in now to help me fight back and expose her unethical practices?**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=4220659e1c5b483f8779f60cc84dc9a7&_e=FJHmTrnnFqH4sYH7_1EwFTHQDQZDpfQLCX-ZeG5NohS0fRUi8mgEc_KmMjmzgRBrW9vy6pq0iZ9Fqh2S1UNif9-j-DjU62xmp_eREGeHgPQZtVxLRZjbcLbXs9vy9rizGlsktStH9wl6JriotLywRg9XkUihSgIZ1qQg7W2BCSO2Ah3ExwlxiiZ5H_jgwudtzRkZfEnrLgjJDGZI5whqg7wEXL6s9f6wcZX-89Pgax42E-_wE4GtSXY7ZSZ2mshPjqLZrve0qiJ9UvUIgIyovt2qwMLDpZFBHsXuv221NInPhcAfhpqFYoPFkdNDK7QKQGR4cF5rQcrnNrUK49icpxzNiUwGfqkXQBuuaTbz5tHVYEau-u4reE9BKLptyHADFe6tCbGtu4Wv86uKrGgM5O3onlCivZfKcW1azWnuE9S96hUEmltDeCh19coyttc9wqfxGFQGl_sZw6F7XfvEo-r8r62UmvXFYEAkbbHJ4lGayLEzFjLSceIHJidRmjCV7CfCBZGtZ_weus1t3DKFH0un0944wM4s_FIzEMjxRno0DNgB7lpJSf1qjssHvxFGp-jKk-I00ZhU6KqG-_vipHOs9sMEnx7Ap9PevO_9oJeQeww0yELSkq21S_waUuiBfOwbnKt9EKEcGpxEHd0bJ0mk5cQuZd_lyiBCh-KmQeI6YaAviQUjkI6ew9jtJjDaXrjzJoe8CckUeLDk9T_AWKJYzUwynnh6en5GWs_g5eExN-gZk3uJ8vwg924_B4qAdHhbhw1zuAEPaYqmqOvcPCemd8dHyw4tGotmCTd5KJfD61gWtW2b1L6kEP5m6O89)

clean_body: It’s time to fire the elites who profit off your pain. | Friend, While working and middle-class American families struggle to pay for gas, groceries, and rent, Democrat Susie Lee just made nearly $180,000 in a single month —not from serving the public, but from playing the stock market from inside Congress. That’s right. According to this new report, Democrat Congresswoman Susie Lee raked in an estimated $179,700 from stock trades in just 30 days. For many families, that’s more than three years of pay—for her, it’s just another month of cashing in while in office. This isn’t a one-time slip-up. Susie Lee has a long history of unethical trading. She’s repeatedly failed to properly report her stock transactions, violating the STOCK Act—a law meant to prevent exactly this kind of abuse. See her shady record for yourself: Let’s be clear: Susie Lee is part of the out-of-touch elite who use their public office to get rich while families across America fall behind. And to make matters worse, she votes for the same reckless policies that drive up inflation and make everyday necessities harder to afford. I’m not a politician – I’m a composer! I’m not running for Congress in NV-03 for stock tips or personal gain. And I’m certainly not trying to get to Washington to play politics. I’m running against Susie Lee to stand up for working-class Americans and to clean up Washington— two things Susie will never do. But I need your help. The elites are pouring money into this race to protect Susie Lee and her corrupt cash machine. Rush a donation now and help me fire “Stock Market Susie”: Unlike Susie Lee, I’m not taking a dime in campaign contributions from corporate PACs. name: Schrier HQ
subject: 1 in 9 Washingtonians could lose food assistance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Hunger is a policy choice. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111883355/558698008/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2MwNzY4ZC03NDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fF-i2LVtyNR4I1t0zjvw6a0wd-Hi8bLRa4CBo13GPDk=&emci=de43b04b-df63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=77c0768d-7466-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

Last week, Kim stood shoulder to shoulder with local food bank workers and hunger relief advocates at Food Lifeline in Washington to speak out against the GOP's cruel and heartless “Big, Ugly Bill."

This harmful bill has already slashed funding for SNAP—the vital program that helps families put food on the table. In Washington State alone, **1 in 9 residents (888,300 people) rely on these benefits to afford groceries.**

Right here in Washington's 8th, these cuts mean more kids will be going to bed hungry, more families will turn to overstretched food banks, and fewer of our neighbors will be able to meet their most basic needs. _And all of this—every painful cut—was made to make room for even more tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations._

As a pediatrician, a mom, and as your Congresswoman, Kim was proud to stand up and vote NO on this devastating bill. She has seen firsthand how harmful it is when self-serving politicians put their own interests and those of their wealthy allies ahead of America’s children, families, and seniors. But Kim knows the fight doesn’t stop here. She’s doubling down on her commitment to protect SNAP, defend funding for food banks, and restore programs that bring fresh, local produce from Washington farms to our communities.

Kim knows hunger is a policy choice, and she refuses to accept it. But when Republicans push cruel cuts like this, we need to show them that people are paying attention and that we won’t stand by while our children suffer. Let's be very clear: **No child should go to school hungry, no parent should have to skip meals so their kids can eat, and no family should be abandoned by the government when they need help the most.**

**[Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help Kim flip the House in 2026? We need to replace the GOP members who voted for these harmful cuts and protect food access for every family in Washington and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111883356/558698009/-2027950711?refcode=em25_250721_snap_fndd_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250721_snap_fndd_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=77c0768d-7466-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode2=77c0768d-7466-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2MwNzY4ZC03NDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fF-i2LVtyNR4I1t0zjvw6a0wd-Hi8bLRa4CBo13GPDk=)**

clean_body: Hunger is a policy choice. Peter, Last week, Kim stood shoulder to shoulder with local food bank workers and hunger relief advocates at Food Lifeline in Washington to speak out against the GOP's cruel and heartless “Big, Ugly Bill." This harmful bill has already slashed funding for SNAP—the vital program that helps families put food on the table. In Washington State alone, 1 in 9 residents (888,300 people) rely on these benefits to afford groceries. Right here in Washington's 8th, these cuts mean more kids will be going to bed hungry, more families will turn to overstretched food banks, and fewer of our neighbors will be able to meet their most basic needs. And all of this—every painful cut—was made to make room for even more tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations. As a pediatrician, a mom, and as your Congresswoman, Kim was proud to stand up and vote NO on this devastating bill. She has seen firsthand how harmful it is when self-serving politicians put their own interests and those of their wealthy allies ahead of America’s children, families, and seniors. But Kim knows the fight doesn’t stop here. She’s doubling down on her commitment to protect SNAP, defend funding for food banks, and restore programs that bring fresh, local produce from Washington farms to our communities. Kim knows hunger is a policy choice, and she refuses to accept it. But when Republicans push cruel cuts like this, we need to show them that people are paying attention and that we won’t stand by while our children suffer. Let's be very clear: No child should go to school hungry, no parent should have to skip meals so their kids can eat, and no family should be abandoned by the government when they need help the most. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Schrier HQ Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Crow HQ
subject: The Trump agenda is hurting Colorado.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

The Trump administration and Republicans in Congress aren’t looking out for Colorado’s farmers. Or students. Or patients. Or working families struggling to make ends meet.

They just voted to hand the top 0.1% of earners an average tax break of $309,000 in 2027 — while making life harder for the rest of us.

So, who are they working for? Not you. Not us. Not Colorado.

While Trump and Republicans are serving the wealthiest 0.01%, Jason Crow is working for you.

Jason grew up in a working-class family. He knows what it’s like to struggle, to worry about keeping the lights on or putting food on the table. It wasn’t easy at times, but it taught him what really matters: never giving up, and always standing up for the people who need it most. And that’s exactly what he’s doing in Congress.

Jason is fighting for what matters most to his constituents: delivering lower costs on health care and prescriptions, investing in our public schools and student support, secure protections for small family farms, and building a fair economy where everyone has a shot — not just the ultra-rich.

This fight is personal for Jason. But he can’t do it alone. If you’re with him, will you pitch in today to support his campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for being part of this team. Together, we can build something better.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Gaza is being starved. Deliberately.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Two headlines from the last 24 hours.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-gaza/?source=em250721-1-180&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-gaza/?source=em250721-1-180&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)
Friend — These are two headlines out of Gaza over just the last 24 hours.
**Israel’s genocide continues, and the situation only gets worse.**
The inhumanity on display is two-fold.
On one hand, Netanyahu's government is deliberately starving the population of Gaza by blocking almost all food and aid from entering the strip, including aid from the United Nations and other international humanitarian organizations. Millions are now experiencing a man-made famine.
On the other hand, Israel has allowed a singular fake “humanitarian foundation” controlled by Israel and the US to establish aid distribution sites — sites that have become deadly for Palestinians. Thousands have already been killed by Israeli soldiers and US contractors who are opening fire on civilians who are simply waiting for food and medical aid.
**Even though the time has long passed for the world to take action to stop the bloodshed and suffering, I will not stop doing everything I can.**
A couple days ago I voted against any and all military funding and supplies being sent to Israel’s army as they carry out this genocide. And I am committed to pushing for Congress to take action to intervene and stop this deliberate starvation and killing. But I need your help to turn up the pressure.
**[I am asking you today: Sign my petition calling on Congress to end the Gaza aid blockade and stop the forced starvation of Palestinians. Adding your name is a simple but powerful act of solidarity at a time when every ounce we can give is necessary.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-gaza/?source=em250721-1-180&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-gaza/?source=em250721-1-180&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)**
The genocide in Gaza will go down in history as one of the greatest crimes against humanity of the 21st century. We have a moral and human responsibility to take action and stop this nightmare, no matter how hard it may seem.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1724_791427_Ld4_rq&akid=1724%2E791427%2ELd4_rq)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re sure your inbox is full of emails from good candidates and causes that need your help (ours is, too).
#
Peter,
We’re sure your inbox is full of emails from good candidates and causes that need your help (ours is, too).
But today, we’re just asking you if there’s anything we can say to convince you to make a donation to VoteVets over those other guys emailing for your help.
We know you really care about your donation going to work. With all those emails in your inbox, it’s hard to tell where you can have the most impact.
So, what if we told you that VoteVets really does put every dollar we raise directly back into our campaigns, candidates, and programs?
Our ability to win back the House and Senate next year depends not only on the Veterans running for office, but on turning out both Veterans and Military Families that the Democratic Party has failed to reach.
So, what if we told you that VoteVets is the only organization with a direct line to that community? We are the largest group of Veterans on this side of the aisle, and we’re uniquely positioned to do outreach to our brothers and sisters who served.
A donation to VoteVets doesn’t sit around and wait for a rainy day. It’s a force multiplier.
[**And today, we’re humbly asking if you could chip in $5 or any amount to VoteVets and keep us on track to hit our goals this month.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250721-1-120&t=1&akid=34488%2E3013755%2EM5dBaM)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Defending a foundational, fundamental right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list. Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut: [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
U.S. Senator Michael Bennet speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=ulqkYYf_rBF2f4tDmKu2lpqb1e2J6kSgBBFN1RvKz6w=&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=ulqkYYf_rBF2f4tDmKu2lpqb1e2J6kSgBBFN1RvKz6w=&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=ulqkYYf_rBF2f4tDmKu2lpqb1e2J6kSgBBFN1RvKz6w=&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=ulqkYYf_rBF2f4tDmKu2lpqb1e2J6kSgBBFN1RvKz6w=&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=ulqkYYf_rBF2f4tDmKu2lpqb1e2J6kSgBBFN1RvKz6w=&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=V0ZjSHExVOrM6kYb2LKkuP7E51G8C7UIIaDJ2KAi+2QlgdDYNPUR2Pq1JonuLQ7OhfvxN3vOZb7uejAq/QOukxdduB8qUFxUTMfucUwfh3k=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
