Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet: U.S. Senator Michael Bennet speaking against the SAVE Act [] Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come. Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law. If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point. The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including: Registration by mail 3rd party voter registration drives Online voter registration in states that allow it Automatic voter registration Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. DLCC’s long-term strategy includes pinpointing the states where Democrats have a real opportunity of winning legislative majorities or making gains in purple and red districts. These include:
**_Alaska, Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin._**
_Here comes the hard part:_
Notching wins in these states will be no easy feat. State Republicans are already raising millions of dollars from their big money donors and investing heavily in negative digital ads to protect their vulnerable majorities and members.
We’re counting on grassroots supporters who believe in democracy and a fair economy for working people to power our mission.
**With less than four months until Virginia’s elections, we need your help to make the early investments that will strengthen our party’s position.**
[Will you make a $7 donation to help elect state Democrats across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDKJeVHT4NLPtW98T85btldyNVd5WMjZmAelToKY-nk0_DzEHf0GUCx0w6SHrvGuN8SSyDK54F9LQz76YYYhfdCe7Tv_-lBf96PA7ZyGn-VRkc_3vwee_i8L2ZPpmihDvYlygVryHuQt_RYyE83364WIuksWsLmKLRcQ0Cg5moKRLf-BRV7ek5FU2N2sM66ZfV0os8DSqDchUpm8TayJIM3z_AX2GoWnvWAXQfuiPJ-cbzp0d4GFWHtQB9PBr4jZIfen5rOYhkiYXnxr0fBemYlV0y3NKacUCD_e2YoQunNNhV-V2Ni67Ume5KbBWaGIlsuZZ6_FP3RMn1ipIYig-Ko5KCURDOs78duUSVocoiU4RaNMQjzqSeB0obogMWK8RkDWmGPKMzn_Vnnhf5E8WBKE9qtd71sEYGH0-05G0Eh9E/4id/rmSCAYktQUGK-mg5NPhdAQ/h7/h001.tzTdcOixX0OX4oF730qAdUr8Qqqdu08zec-8oB2AOe4)

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Our July Call is on Tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Approaching our 4th election season.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_july_call_reminder&n=1)
---
| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6P9-Hx0zs-QPm6VAaSuDh6Op_49yAgxC17idOtsnHUaaiaadxpr1aFNoDHVPxFBzw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_july_call_reminder&n=2) Join us Tonight, July 21st at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. We've had a busy month. We'll talking to candidates and finalizing endorsements which we look forward to sharing with everyone soon. There are a lot of great people stepping up to serve their communities this year, if you know someone we should be working with, please suggest they reach out for an endorsement. There's still a very short amount of time to get onto the ballot as an Forward Party Candidate. If you are interested in running for Judge of Elections or another hyper-local office, we'd love to talk to you. These races are fundamental to what we're doing. Helping get great local public servants elected helps everyone. Aligning with them helps our party make the relationships we'll rely on when we're building on this foundation. This is a great time to get involved and make a difference. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6P9-Hx0zs-QPm6VAaSuDh6Op_49yAgxC17idOtsnHUaaiaadxpr1aFNoDHVPxFBzw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_july_call_reminder&n=3)
* * *
And also join us in Celebrating The Forward Party's Birthday Bash on July 29th! [](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_july_call_reminder&n=4) **Click below to see more** [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6P9-Hx0zs-QPm6VAaSuDh7r6HzTIfNcrPOba51bS5TWtIq9SFI_ulZ3aspGl5wmhVrnL7Jisbxe12oKhXAeKYA61H2k791st_qQNAi6hJnS&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_july_call_reminder&n=5) And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OO1xB82Dwc0SwW5xslNAt5demYUjnvMsNObg_2SsnH4C04dQQgB9BZ02TA7y9H7t-4vbxkv79HHUmZ6qj3hodVNslc1j8BmCJ3lol1yOotH-UbK54WKgqDyUAWXEaQfXHk95ddnmDRn_oLR7jfB_Sg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_july_call_reminder&n=6) clean_body: Approaching our 4th election season. | | | Join us Tonight, July 21st at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. We've had a busy month. We'll talking to candidates and finalizing endorsements which we look forward to sharing with everyone soon. There are a lot of great people stepping up to serve their communities this year, if you know someone we should be working with, please suggest they reach out for an endorsement. There's still a very short amount of time to get onto the ballot as an Forward Party Candidate. If you are interested in running for Judge of Elections or another hyper-local office, we'd love to talk to you. These races are fundamental to what we're doing. Helping get great local public servants elected helps everyone. Aligning with them helps our party make the relationships we'll rely on when we're building on this foundation. This is a great time to get involved and make a difference. And also join us in Celebrating The Forward Party's Birthday Bash on July 29th! Click below to see more** And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: General John King
subject: We’re running low
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=012c0c7e22fd446aa26fd65ca6b1e8e8&_e=fTuuDDxmJRjiJRvQCYtfackbQTRCgLLyL78PmpVtoRGJJOnEiqCcxTUaECFSOWQD9LNf00Kk7kY2Be73_KW09lJ715kmLpqD2H7eC3NqH20l_7F7pDVZc5EmqesxFTA3Hc86JwByrw7YkuQaujcEbCqnVQIKmclM5rY513-7WZOfAYOUkGBKHlkhp6rFAiVdevD_cuRYKm4URAVOpWZjMWBXRcbe5lyoXsxWNXzftCzL8Sl1t-m3SyXxzPrHnOpuiC7grfCJIsps4rtQMUOwiIRloaxWDY4UxhLiCJel-Z2QTbvBj7Yb0kn7uvy0idYro5ahhq1Icz50Qeonjxfo7_IsElNKTUk_NXdC1YVZCHPVug5e4odw1CDFVfekQkoRIT0NqS5XXVWHFFYhWbP4L7OQEEULLfIBzDVIq7DNClW9IXQ2GRzk1zcLxf7swztVoiTUmDTPjSMWBb3roEBw08aHYZijU3E88TkEvCIh5ZOvc4gtEJHK7TaJB32KIwRqGNfOPpYWUjJ6jFjtssWbheoDm3gWwzbM0NwM8bX0r_dTA_7tJ2du1u6NXP9bD6WzwW1dpURbbCc71M87lKmQ4I_Kkt2ZPV_QlG0KCFZIqLQ0CpGqG6EtbJJ8jQITIh5BAJHzDpfbfTVLPZjJ0RAi0iF9Rbx6uJTUwpRy1s27sqsPYQjYYO5yGo9_gnDkWh_HgNqAOEtTnRxZYmmr9RelsQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat.

We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. _**Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense.**_

This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally.

The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. ---

GOP Senator Bernie Moreno **[shut down CNN's Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/fd04f0d7-911c-4b01-8d78-8aa0855ee235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a tense live interview for inflating the WSJ's "fake story" about President Donald Trump allegedly sending inappropriate materials to Jeffrey Epstein.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fd04f0d7-911c-4b01-8d78-8aa0855ee235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fd04f0d7-911c-4b01-8d78-8aa0855ee235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This story is a tabloid sensation!" Moreno said in reference to the WSJ's claims that Trump shared a lewd birthday card with Epstein, which Trump denied. "You've spent half your show already, talking about a fake story that the Wall Street Journal published. This isn't what journalism is intended to be."
"Hang on! You can't criticize our show!" Collins clapped back. "This show primarily covers what the president is doing and he just posted this tonight!"
**["We're winning on every account!"](https://substack.com/redirect/fd04f0d7-911c-4b01-8d78-8aa0855ee235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Moreno said. "The Democrats don't want to talk about this because they're wrong on every front!"
Moreno also took the opportunity to challenge CNN's narrative on the president, pushing back by citing the administration's success in tackling the deficit, creating higher-wages, immigration reform, crypto legislation, and the passing of the Big Beautiful Bill.
"This is what people voted for on November 5th, and this is what we're going to focus on: Helping the American people!"
Watch Moreno's debate with Collins here»
[Watch the Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fd04f0d7-911c-4b01-8d78-8aa0855ee235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**Together with Goldco**
# **[Could Elon Musk Be Eyeing Silver?](https://substack.com/redirect/ea1b5b69-56c8-4513-a659-170d475b368b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Musk knows how to spot opportunities. He sees the trends. The patterns. The moments others miss. And now, some experts suggest silver might be in his sights. Here's what's happening: Silver demand is surging, driven by trade wars, tech and clean energy innovation. Supply chains are tightening, creating scarcity that could reshape markets.
But if silver is the next big move, what does that mean for your savings? There's a story unfolding here. One you don't want to miss. So if you're interested in that? Get your free report **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/ea1b5b69-56c8-4513-a659-170d475b368b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ea1b5b69-56c8-4513-a659-170d475b368b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# Trump demands "Commanders" team immediately change their name back to "Redskins"
President Donald Trump on Sunday urged the **[Washington Commanders and Cleveland Guardians](https://substack.com/redirect/368499cf-0ff3-442a-8466-54155c10b284?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to revert to their previous names.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/368499cf-0ff3-442a-8466-54155c10b284?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The original names in question - Washington Redskins and Cleveland Indians -- Trump claimed had widespread Native American support.** In a "There is a big clamoring for this," Trump said in a Truth Social post and added that Native Americans' "heritage and prestige is systematically being taken away."
* **Both teams changed their names** in recent years amid public and corporate pressure to move away from terminology considered offensive to Native communities. Washington dropped "Redskins" in 2020, eventually becoming the Commanders in 2022, while Cleveland retired "Indians" in 2021 in favor of Guardians.
* **Trump pointed to a 2016 poll** showing that 90% of self-identified Native Americans were not offended by the Redskins name, arguing that times have changed since the rebranding decisions. "We are a Country of passion and common sense," Trump wrote, calling on team owners to reverse course.
* **Despite Trump 's push, **both franchises have shown no indication they plan to change direction. Commanders owner Josh Harris recently reaffirmed the team's identity, noting rising public support, but no franchises have responded to Trump's recent push.

* * *
# "F*** him!!!" Hunter Biden RAGES against Democrats in unhinged new interview
Hunter Biden released the**[verbal hounds on his fellow Democrat elites](https://substack.com/redirect/64a2f83d-7601-4a13-abe4-ea0c6ffdd673?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and President Trump in a recent aggressive interview with Youtuber Andrew Callaghan.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/49f51fd0-d027-49bd-9146-2f09d075d538?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Hunter Biden lashed out** at President Donald Trump's immigration policies, specifically criticizing the deportation of violent undocumented immigrants to El Salvador's notorious prisons.
**The former president 's son also blasted Democrats **for, in his view, pandering to white voters instead of standing firm on immigration. "F-- you. How do you think your hotel room gets cleaned?" he said, defending undocumented immigrants as essential to the U.S. economy and way of life.
* **Biden accused Democrats elites** of turning on his father in the 2024 election, saying the party failed his father. "F*** him and everybody around him!"Biden poetically said in reference to actor George Clooney and his scathing New York Times article backing his Biden support. "What do you have to do with f****ing anything?? Why do I have to f***ing listen to you??" He also retaliated against CNN anchor Jake Tapper's recent book that covers Biden's mental decline.
* **He even targeted Trump adviser Stephen Miller** , calling him "f***ed up," and emphasized the importance of immigration to American innovation and identity. "How do you think that we attract the smartest people in the world to the United States? Through immigration," Biden said, contrasting the U.S. with authoritarian countries like China and Russia.

* * *
# FBI turned blind-eye to Hillary Clinton essential evidence in email case, new report
The FBI allegedly ignored potentially essential evidence in the Hilary Clinton email scandal, **[according to a watchdog report released Monday.](https://substack.com/redirect/8a217802-658a-4625-8fc0-2211df14fcdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8a217802-658a-4625-8fc0-2211df14fcdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The FBI "declined to comprehensively analyze"** thumb drives containing potentially vital evidence in the Hillary Clinton email probe, according to a newly declassified appendix to a 2018 DOJ inspector general report. The drives, obtained from a confidential source, included hacked State Department data and emails from officials such as President Barack Obama, yet were largely ignored over concerns over classified information.
* **Internal memos had urged further analysis** to "assess the national security risks" tied to Clinton's private server use, but the FBI shelved the drives. "This document shows an extreme lack of effort and due diligence," said Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-Iowa), who released the appendix.
* **The document reveals former FBI Director James Comey** did not inform then-Attorney General Loretta Lynch before publicly clearing Clinton in July 2016 -- a move that came _before_ key witness interviews. Grassley argued that "perhaps intentional lack of effort in the Clinton investigation is a stark contrast to its full-throated investigation of the Trump-Russia collusion hoax, which was based on the uncorroborated and now discredited Steele dossier."
* **The appendix also includes Russian-language** intelligence alleging Lynch and Comey interfered in the Clinton probe to benefit both parties' candidates. The intelligence also cited Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz, who allegedly claimed Clinton's team removed server data "just in time" and therefore the FBI had no evidence of foul play. While some FBI officials, including Peter Strzok, investigated the documents via keyword searches, they concluded the intel was "verifiably false" and likely the result of a cyber intrusion.

* * *
# House GOP member comes for Fed Chair Jerome Powell, cries perjury
**[Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is facing a criminal referral](https://substack.com/redirect/890d08e1-ccac-41f8-924e-ff4608fdc199?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, R-Fla., who is accusing him of lying under oath about the scope and cost of renovations to the Fed's Washington headquarters.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a059419-7e29-481d-83c6-ba302229d60c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Luna alleges Powell committed perjury** during June 2025 Senate testimony and in a letter to the Office of Management and Budget, falsely downplaying the scale and cost of renovations to the Federal Reserve's Eccles Building. She claimed Powell's public remarks were "materially false."
* **Documents reviewed by congressional investigators** reportedly contradict Powell's claim that the cost increase was due to minor changes aimed at simplifying construction. The revised plans allegedly include a VIP dining room, luxury finishes, and other upscale features that Powell denied existed. "While Powell presented the changes as simplifications, the actual project plans suggest the opposite," Luna said.
* **Luna 's letter argues Powell's explanation **is at odds with records from the National Capital Planning Commission and with statements from then-OMB Director Russell Vought. "The actual project plans suggest the opposite," Luna wrote, citing evidence that cost escalations were substantial.
* **Powell has denied the accusations** and has called for a formal internal review of the project's expenses. While Luna and other Trump allies have called for Powell's removal, Trump has said it is "highly unlikely" he would fire him before his term ends in 2026.

I want you to know personally how essential your support is to our effort to take back the House Majority.
When I think about our most important supporters, I don’t think about how much they gave – but how many loyal supporters showed up for Democrats when we needed them the most.
We’ve received more than 50,000 donations this year from supporters in every state across the country.
[**But my team asked me to reach out to folks like you who haven’t yet made their first donation of the year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111884255/558701367/1694059021?amount=5&refcode=20250721_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGUxNmZiMi02NzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I6dPWFr-yOuTJ0HkoPw1k4_nNfYO7_IyGfGGvhnz9fE=)
**[_After Trump targeted ActBlue to try to stop grassroots Democrats from contributing to help our Democrats win elections, I knew we had to ramp up our efforts. That’s why I just re-opened my 2025 Team Pelosi Membership Drive. I just took a look at our ActBlue and I can tell you that we need your support more than ever. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: 50,000 Signatures Needed [FFR]
subject: Social Security is on the chopping block! (OH NO!)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7) **Friend – The Trump administration’s attacks on Social Security have reached NEW HEIGHTS!** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64643?t=3&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7) Trump’s MAGA base is determined to GUT Social Security benefits, RAISE the retirement age, and now they want DOGE to access private and sensitive data to put their plans into motion!

[**PLEASE FRIEND: Social Security could be gone before we even know it. We need 5O,OOO Democrats to sign NOW to demand Congress SAVE Social Security today →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64643?t=4&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64643?t=5&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
---
Here’s the situation, friend:

1\. More than 73 million people – especially Senior Citizens – rely on Social Security to pay rent and put food on the table.

2\. But DOGE is already making it harder for elderly folks to file Social Security claims, **AND** thousands of workers have been cut.

3\. So now we’re racing to gather 50,000 signatures on our grassroots petition to prove there’s MASSIVE support to SAVE Social Security from right-wing attacks!

We can’t believe the GOP would stoop this low. And Elizabeth Warren agrees →
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64643?t=6&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
[**She’s SO RIGHT!!! So it’s crucial that we get 5O,OOO Democrats to sign NOW to save Social Security before it’s too late →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64643?t=7&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64643?t=8&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
---
Counting on you,

_Fight for Reform_
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=9&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=10&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
---
|
---

If you'd like to unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022/?t=12&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)**
Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court's 2010 _Citizens United v. FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=13&refcode2=23229_4449941_65ZkS7&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=14&refcode2=23229_4449941_65ZkS7&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
---
Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=15&refcode2=23229_4449941_65ZkS7&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)
---
We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022/?t=16&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)**
If you'd like to donate to support our efforts, please **[click here:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=17&refcode2=23229_4449941_65ZkS7&akid=23229%2E4449941%2E65ZkS7)**

| Jul 21

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168489927&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NDg5OTI3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzEzMzkxOCwiZXhwIjoxNzU1NzI1OTE4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0._sV4gEwClVrA45IYZ35YH7cgPOBtaX0BBW8elC0GwCY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168489927&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NDg5OTI3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxMzM5MTgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTcyNTkxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GHU4ON9dy3l4BueGR7OyYvjZBOCUrdrM6wy3Br6OfM8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168489927&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NDg5OTI3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxMzM5MTgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTcyNTkxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GHU4ON9dy3l4BueGR7OyYvjZBOCUrdrM6wy3Br6OfM8)
---
| | [](https://substack..b5qNDmy6ZcjMR5uGGwXZfiTEfJDFxLIoTAyLYs7fDiw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/turning-43-today?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-FEc9acAXC6ND00nqXSH3DRokhCvcMzAGFw_cC5VAUo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168489927)
Today I turn 43. A little more grey in my beard. A little more sorrow in my soul as this is my first birthday without my father. And a little more wisdom picked up along the way.
I'm writing to thank you all for your continued support of my advocacy for human rights and justice. As an immigrant, as someone who grew up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, and as someone who is often screamed at online to "_shut up and leave_ ," it's important to me to express just how much and how deeply I value you. Your trust, partnership, and support goes such a long way, and for that I'm just so grateful.
I often reflect on the journey I've experienced, the path that yet lies ahead, and the insurmountable work that remains. And as I contemplate how to best move forward to meet and overcome the crucibles we face, I start by asking myself, what I would tell my 23-year-old self if I could go back in time and speak with him? And how does that advice then apply to 2025? **Let 's Address ~~This~~ Me.**
**A birthday subscription is always welcome. Consider becoming a free or paid subscriber to Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-FEc9acAXC6ND00nqXSH3DRokhCvcMzAGFw_cC5VAUo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168489927)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17f8c32d-deae-4d28-a1df-5b185a61e575?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Me at 43
## 11 Life Lessons
I'm sure this list may change in the future with added wisdom. For now, I present the "_always do_ " and "_never do_ " things I would tell my younger self...and I hope you might find inspiration from it as well.
1. **Always** remember to cut yourself slack and lift yourself up. Plenty of folks will try to tear you down--don't join them. Be your own biggest champion because sometimes you're all you're gonna have, and you should know that you're enough.
2. **Always** cherish the moment, not the destination you're seeking. The destination may come, or it might not. But that moment is here and what you'll miss the most. A movie night. A laugh in class. A snowball fight. Cherish it.
3. **Always** say yes when a friend calls you for lunch or coffee. Always. The older you get the more you'll realize that "no" you gave was the last time you ever spoke.
4. **Always** pay for lunch. Don't make a big deal out of it. People remember when you do something kind that you don't have to do.
5. **Never** remind someone you did them a favor. No matter how small or large, do the favor because it was right to do, not because you expected some reward.
6. **Always** protect the privacy and dignity of your life partner. Find someone who complements you and compliments you. Someone you can be vulnerable to.
7. **Always** treat your children with impeccable respect, especially when they screw up. How you treat them is how they'll normalize the world treating them. If they feel respected, they'll respect others, and they'll command respect of others.
8. **Never** let your anger decide your decision making. Speak and act soberly. There's an old adage, "_Whenever you speak, speak sweetly, so if you have to eat your words, you have a tasty treat_."
9. **Always** act to change injustice with your actions. And if you can't, then speak out against it with your words. And if you can't, then steel yourself against its impact.
10. **Always** write down when you lend a friend or loved one money. Even your closest family. And even then, lend with the intent that if they can't repay you (because life happens), you'll forget about it. Cherish people more than money.
11. **Always** remember the difference between disappointment and regret. You can be disappointed you didn't achieve some goal despite your best efforts, but regret comes from not giving your best efforts. Live a life of conviction, committed to justice, compassion, and love--and you'll live a life of no regrets.

A shout out to my amazing wife Ayesha, without whom I cannot fathom how much of a failure I would have been. If there's anything I've written or said that you appreciate, [credit goes to her](https://substack.com/redirect/2c8bbb89-eb55-4bcc-9cee-e48928cf7fb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Much love to all y'all for your amazing and ongoing love and support as well!
Today I'll make my one birthday ask of you--that you find a charitable organization of your choice, preferably local or perhaps one serving the people of Gaza ([I donate to Humanity First](https://substack.com/redirect/2ee6634c-153b-44ff-8a72-dc394922f84f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))--and contribute whatever is in your budget.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168489927&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NDg5OTI3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxMzM5MTgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTcyNTkxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GHU4ON9dy3l4BueGR7OyYvjZBOCUrdrM6wy3Br6OfM8)

clean_body: Join us on July 24th for a webinar with Dr. Avery, M.D., Cara Jackson and Kimberly Fletcher If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] Once Upon a Time... There Was a Tired Mom. * She gave everything. Kisses for boo-boos. Midnight rocking chair cuddles. Grocery runs. Soccer games. But something was missing. Until she discovered... The Hidden Hero for a Healthy Motherhood ... and her story changed. Join us on July 24 [] for storytime like no other, where real science meets real-life solutions. You’ll meet Dr. Avery Jackson, a renowned neurosurgeon who has helped thousands heal - this time, not with scalpels, but with truth. Alongside his wife and dietician Caramarie Jackson, and Kimberly Fletcher of Moms for America, you’ll uncover the role of THE miracle molecule – your body’s unsung champion. It’s the spark of life in the cell... and it may be the hero you didn’t know you needed. According to the American Psychological Association, “mommy brain” is very real: mental fog, forgetfulness, and fatigue driven by biology and burden. But nitric oxide can restore clarity, boost brain flow, and bring energy back to the weary heroine of the home – you. This is your fairy tale moment. And it’s real. Click here to RSVP for your next chapter → [] * Tuesday, July 24 2pm PT | 3pm MT | 4pm CT | 5pm ET Because every mom deserves a happy (and healthy) story. subject: Stooped even lower

After everything we’ve been through recently, it’s hard to believe House Republicans could stoop even lower, but here we are.

Just a few weeks after passing his Big Beautiful Bill, Donald Trump is now demanding Congress slash over**$9 billion from programs our communities rely on — including eliminating all funding for public media.**

**[Will you stand against these devastating cuts by chipping in whatever you can to our mid-month goal of $4,891? These funds support my team as we speak out and fight for the programs our district relies on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111885173/558704762/-1223924300?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250721_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjY1ZTJhOC03YjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXJCmFoR0ioOxExyX03Q8Lqedo0WmLZ0FAKXUP4zk2E=)** House Republicans are rubber-stamping these dangerous cuts that weaken national security, defund emergency alert systems, and even take educational TV away from kids.

I’m speaking up for the families who depend on local broadcasts for storm warnings and city hall updates, for the kids who learn from public television, and for the communities being targeted and torn apart by ICE’s unchecked power.

I refuse to stay quiet. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Israel has killed 900 starving people seeking aid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Day after day, week after week, we continue to see headlines like this
one:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250721-arms-embargo/?source=em20250721-36862&akid=36862%2E1203867%2E3FUlbK ]CNN World: At least 73 people seeking aid in Gaza killed by Israeli
gunfire on Sunday, health ministry says

The Israeli government is continuing to carry out a man-made famine in
Gaza while shooting and killing starving men, women, and children
desperately seeking food and other supplies.

Just yesterday, Israeli forces murdered at least 73 people waiting for
aid. The UN estimates that around 900 Palestinians have been killed in the
last few weeks while trying to access food for themselves and their
families.

Until the United States steps up and issues consequences for Israel’s war
crimes, this genocide and ethnic cleansing of Palestinians will only grow
worse.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250721-arms-embargo/?source=em20250721-36862&akid=36862%2E1203867%2E3FUlbK ]Congress must stop aiding and abetting genocide: sign our petition
demanding they issue an arms embargo against Israel NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250721-arms-embargo/?source=em20250721-36862&akid=36862%2E1203867%2E3FUlbK ]Sign On

The situation in Gaza is growing more dire by the day. Humanitarian groups
like World Central Kitchen keep running out of food supplies to provide
meals to hungry Palestinians and hospital workers, because the Israeli
government refuses to lift its blockade of food, water, baby formula, and
medical aid.

As a result, Palestinians are increasingly facing illness and death due to
hunger and malnutrition; a UN agency recently reported that 1 in 10
children in Gaza is now malnourished.

Justice Democrats in Congress are leading the call for an arms embargo to
stop this violence and starvation, but we need every Democrat in Congress
to stand up against genocide.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250721-arms-embargo/?source=em20250721-36862&akid=36862%2E1203867%2E3FUlbK ]Add your name now to keep up the pressure on Congress and strengthen
our call for an arms embargo against Israel →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250721-arms-embargo/?source=em20250721-36862&akid=36862%2E1203867%2E3FUlbK ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/JEM0ccTwraInV2D7d56WyISldm_eKNzz3mZvJMkBicz2sCkMhMBTq8agdZwvlQIhJCbBxT6-_WmtaqVCdyxySTupCsntrsB0N7iud_rIecLaYzkYT8aBqwggkkdD2deojkF5LTmjlMMbDVPHPPZqiWhzQD1ttbm83eN3PihNoP2eB_l-P9CHb2vMtCWl_qyV09STAQjerJVjGNfC5QGV5DoletRrUx9ikYrw2Z5aKPJINW-uKp0J6Mp_BNlqvL6H4Ixf2_k0yrntH6OEcf_6iKbIQ886N5XhilxG6H9xrH4TDdcpDKnaIYequxeOEWRgpaPPKFgGd3rGt1pAsxi1f-Ln1sGGOQCgX4w8k4GCtiW5ZYN1B1AoCR18ZSVkZBReZShENxvpX3WZDOyA0eiWFrVvonuiyWtVPf_EdAMNYOE2xCxyT5P-Huk_g0fsbjpbzKU40tkbJy34R1EoUhoPyu_mYuBzb4w21U52OU0kqPJydvSpo6WGliDxnq8-s8JMZ0UxeIPj5H03qMUFFnW2SzsDpux2tDSVMjdnEQy6MkIwOQCkYjCNK1Mhsvz0Nln5mAPUeGtHsuuhjR9sKQzleLZT8jPJvGsh7pHl8r43528J4EYe9_zfdFiHBa47DG0YVGwwhpBaexqbrmpZafld9DA-rmHtxawWKytehYi0XGwwf2eMU4U6jjtBrPpye22YphXwv-hfHIf8_inCZlmqI1uE_DV0n2hi0flSgw0aKpIgKWe94Zuxqt5ssDP5Ht6Qu-E09tkRD26pcl0/j1oKC3v_Sp7OJDrbkiSTOVN5Y1dkReKv/11) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/
President Trump celebrated his first 6 months in office with a historic success list, highlighting all the accomplishments thus far. Even CNN and Jake Tapper were forced to acknowledge all that has happened in just 6 months. Tulsi Gabbard, the Director of National Intelligence confirmed the "Russia hoax" was exactly that, a hoax. There was no evidence that Russia was trying to hack the election. The question is, what now? We want to see people pay for crimes they commit, we want accountability, we want justice. Sean O'Brien is the General President for the International Brotherhood of Teamsters. It was unprecedented to see the head of the Teamsters speak at the RNC but Sean O'Brien is having diverse conversations with diverse people every day. O'Brien is happy to see the progress President Trump's tariffs have made in multiple industries including Hollywood. O'Brien represents 1.3 million members and wants to see more workers get the opportunity to unionize. A $92 billion investment in the big, beautiful bill moves towards AI development, O'Brien is fighting for state sovereignty, and for human workers not to be replaced by machines. As the Epstein storm continues Penny Nance is the President & CEO of Concerned Women For America shines a light on a much bigger problem of people that abuse children for money. This week CWA will also release new data on how many gold medals were stolen by boys and men competing in women's sports.

**Sean O'Brien**
General President | International Brotherhood of Teamsters
https://teamster.org/
**Penny Nance**
CEO & President | Concerned Women For America

name: Katie Porter
subject: let’s talk about NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39913%2E3422442%2EDChYKc)
Peter,
_**[Governors are one of our best lines of defense against Trump and his Administration. This email is about Trump’s recent cuts to PBS and NPR, but before you read more, can you chip in just $3 to my campaign for Governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250721_1_ak?refcode=em20250721-39913&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&refcode2=39913_3422442_DChYKc&akid=39913%2E3422442%2EDChYKc)**_
President Trump and Congressional Republicans have slashed a billion dollars in federal funding from public radio and TV. Most affected will be rural communities who rely on public broadcasting not just for news, but for natural disaster warnings. But whether you listen to NPR every morning or not, every single one of us should be concerned about this.
Cutting funding for journalism is going to make it even harder for people to get answers about their local governments—bodies that are making important decisions about housing, education, and more.
Journalism bridges the gap between elected officials and the people they’re supposed to represent. This is something every single American should support, regardless of political party.
In Congress, I was a champion for a free and independent press, and I’ll bring that same energy as California Governor.
Thanks for being engaged,
Katie
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250721_1_ak?refcode=em20250721-39913&refcode2=39913_3422442_DChYKc&akid=39913%2E3422442%2EDChYKc)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250721-39913&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39913_3422442_DChYKc&akid=39913%2E3422442%2EDChYKc)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39913&t=5&akid=39913%2E3422442%2EDChYKc)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

There Was a Tired Mom.

She gave everything.

Kisses for boo-boos.

Midnight rocking chair cuddles.

Grocery runs. Soccer games.

But something was missing.

Until she discovered...

The Hidden Hero
for a Healthy Motherhood

... and her story changed.

clean_body: Join us on July 24th for a webinar with Dr. Avery, M.D., Cara Jackson and Kimberly Fletcher If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] Once Upon a Time... There Was a Tired Mom. * She gave everything. Kisses for boo-boos. Midnight rocking chair cuddles. Grocery runs. Soccer games. But something was missing. Until she discovered... The Hidden Hero for a Healthy Motherhood ... and her story changed. Join us on July 24 [] for storytime like no other, where real science meets real-life solutions. You’ll meet Dr. Avery Jackson, a renowned neurosurgeon who has helped thousands heal - this time, not with scalpels, but with truth. Alongside his wife and dietician Caramarie Jackson, and Kimberly Fletcher of Moms for America, you’ll uncover the role of THE miracle molecule – your body’s unsung champion. It’s the spark of life in the cell... and it may be the hero you didn’t know you needed. According to the American Psychological Association, “mommy brain” is very real: mental fog, forgetfulness, and fatigue driven by biology and burden. But nitric oxide can restore clarity, boost brain flow, and bring energy back to the weary heroine of the home – you. This is your fairy tale moment. And it’s real. Click here to RSVP for your next chapter → [] * Thursday, July 24 2pm PT | 3pm MT | 4pm CT | 5pm ET Because every mom deserves a happy (and healthy) story. name: Kathryn Gonzalez
subject: The late night call I dreaded
disclaimer_text: paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate
body:
| | |
---
Dear Patriot,Planning a wedding is supposed to be an exciting time. But instead of buying a dress and booking our honeymoon, I’ve hired an attorney to fight for my fiancé’s life.Please, let me explain...I am engaged to marry Deputy Jacob Diaz of the Otero County Sheriff’s Department in New Mexico. Jacob is a good man. Kind, loyal, and hard working. He’s the kind of officer you hope shows up in your time of need.But everything changed on June 25, 2024, when Jacob responded to a late-night report of a possibly intoxicated man walking along the median of a busy highway. Upon his arrival, Jacob found a young man with his shirt draped over his left arm, hiding whatever was in his waistband. Following protocol, Jacob ordered the man to stay back and show his hands.
---
_“Stop right there, bro.” “Are you alright?” “Let me see your other hand, bro.”_
---
The young man refused to comply. And in the next few seconds, both their lives changed forever.The man quickly walked toward my fiancé and drew what appeared to be a firearm.Jacob’s training kicked in. He fired his service weapon.The man fell to the ground, but he continued to reach for his weapon– ignoring Jacob’s commands to show his hands and stop reaching for the gun.Jacob fired additional shots, killing the armed man.We later learned that the man’s weapon was an airsoft gun.My heart broke for the young man’s family. But I also thanked God for protecting my fiancé that night. It easily could have been his life lost on that median. The New Mexico State Police launched an in-depth investigation into Jacob’s actions.I knew without a doubt the shooting was justified. After all, the suspect drew a firearm on an officer and would not back down.So, we were relieved – but not surprised – when the State Police cleared Jacob of any wrongdoing and reinstated him on the force in September. That should have been the end of this story...But out of nowhere, an anti-police prosecutor filed First-Degree Murder charges against Jacob.Now my fiancé faces life in prison for doing his job and defending himself in the line of duty. **[And I’m swallowing my pride and reaching out to you, a perfect stranger, for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=815aef1a955541e7a5fe0590abc5e8a6&_e=19DjvlAmrs9tBxUtek-1NOq_-hSleoCI7z337eLn8M3FNZxI7jrXZq0rNh58LK0D2-YHLrN9JiGEmuO36F-j1p5N2dkKP48DK_Cwm7bXRjBCH0dxibXptHyF7dgCKFfjyrTxYqKa8LW02gotDicg--jSZqatlt9SfyLT_73RfewSBlOBYU761JFXgKTTihkCsO_IC4Rf02h5hDoq5nvD-IS-ZJ00XMjqKNd9aph3LfGF_HzRlTrIBGHd7ggg18EAd4UeXm7sjmovOdJnXnhgU0-zSDGjQMSMpEZCfXqPk1WORLOlkPw0zsBl3yMhfozs7o9lV5ZtQ-xdaXY5BemWDPHeZrM0lV9yDB2q9UerGMczv6HnmBmi7M-XIlAB3jHcdrlysLAqKky0_8KcBqSCHZ83NbZi4K9RIDjDf5f9c4LcHCW1hbSRYllMy2nT6r32Su3cFdYbuaXg4J2JjGmoaGWLJI3wKVdefk_MaQE7IHoVGa3uipg5AvFmewHnrfBFUhTqbzPtiU-CxlVM97iCjVGsnfXEoA9A5yvzJQ8DsTIRFt7VvVsnl3oxR8er6nAmU5Kgx8tdFtX7x3GuxIk4nO-eWTL44KC0U3cNf4o-tXYrWTTVsDvc9j9GK9R2xlQnnfWfA3RImL9zAlU1AaxfBxn06e8reQT-7bJKn3W91yO5FaWME30MwlHzQKUOKl2b)** You see, this has long been one of my biggest fears. Political prosecutions of police officers is at an all-time high right now and New Mexico is not a police-friendly state.But I still can’t believe this is happening to _my_ fiancé.We’re in our 20s. We have our entire lives ahead of us. Now all our hopes and dreams may be destroyed by an anti-cop prosecutor with an ax to grind against law enforcement.So, instead of saving for a wedding and our future together, Jacob and I scraped together enough money to hire an attorney.But fighting First-Degree Murder charges will cost upwards of $200,000.That’s money we just don’t have.Every day I prayed. I asked God to make this nightmare go away... for the prosecutor to drop the charges... or to show us a way to pay for Jacob’s defense. My desperate prayers were answered when we received a phone call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).The LELDF Board of Directors reviewed the facts of the case and they are confident that Jacob is innocent – so they’ve offered to fund his defense.God heard my prayers. For the first time in months, I am hopeful for our future – that Jacob may not spend the rest of his life behind bars after all.Not just because LELDF is making sure Jacob gets the defense he deserves, but because LELDF’s Directors are the leading experts on policing and “use of force” in the nation – folks like Ronald Reagan’s Attorney General Ed Meese and former Assistant Director of the FBI Ron Hosko. With over 30 years of helping wrongly accused officers clear their names, LELDF’s support carries weight. (And the prosecution knows this!)But we still have a lot of work to do. LELDF doesn’t receive taxpayer funding and grants and large gifts are few and far between. Instead, LELDF relies on kind-hearted strangers who respect our men and women in blue and want to help cops like Jacob who are being railroaded by progressive prosecutors.Folks, I hope, like you.This isn’t easy for me so I’m just going to come out and ask... **[Will you help LELDF fight for my fiancé by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or more today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=815aef1a955541e7a5fe0590abc5e8a6&_e=19DjvlAmrs9tBxUtek-1NOq_-hSleoCI7z337eLn8M3FNZxI7jrXZq0rNh58LK0D2-YHLrN9JiGEmuO36F-j1p5N2dkKP48DK_Cwm7bXRjBCH0dxibXptHyF7dgCKFfjyrTxYqKa8LW02gotDicg--jSZqatlt9SfyLT_73RfewSBlOBYU761JFXgKTTihkCsO_IC4Rf02h5hDoq5nvD-IS-ZJ00XMjqKNd9aph3LfEv3R5As3JAAbnexofqkkYMpLUidp8zrDFgB-QgMriBluHfb4N9-nrPbvcmO218qUMHSjFsZ0bkyT59StGDwMcY3Ws-6Od88k56BogvOONqboRGlaoIek7EMMRpTGZ6x89-TSo2L6L2I5oWtp2WsoZtxiX_nYV_0Ud2kKrB74GdAqzO-0m9c2acibfmVu17DjHksNBa8g3JW8V1F729Kas__Y1EiwnRINEx3tTyF1VbUZ4HQe5k2xanoyxQPNC69UfkEL9VNNl7fS9gZet47U3QYByGCc-_t91Ozh_ZC_K1GasLIAS-qvKD9KB8DfiyHn2wa4cQarPHfW0qucPrXGDO8G6ycJ9ZmTx3gavnqtNm2da7dQI_Xc48gAi9p0fHeGp2yCZIGR5H_7tp9OYU-fSyYgdrJyBeS6JtJ6aGG81EJHq2Bay7SwZZ5AlMpYGEs3E33g5VB_7BN0u3omO6NN7V) **No matter how much you’re able to help, your donation will be put to immediate use helping LELDF support wrongly accused officers like Jacob.I don’t think I have to tell you it’s a terrible time to be a cop in America. It’s all over the news.Not only are ambush attacks up, but anti-police prosecutors – often bought and paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate. Even when the facts clearly show the cop did his job by the book and a previous investigation cleared him!Still, officers like Jacob show up every day – put on the badge and put their lives in danger to protect their communities. **[That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me today and help LELDF support my fiancé.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=815aef1a955541e7a5fe0590abc5e8a6&_e=19DjvlAmrs9tBxUtek-1NOq_-hSleoCI7z337eLn8M3FNZxI7jrXZq0rNh58LK0D2-YHLrN9JiGEmuO36F-j1p5N2dkKP48DK_Cwm7bXRjBCH0dxibXptHyF7dgCKFfjyrTxYqKa8LW02gotDicg--jSZqatlt9SfyLT_73RfewSBlOBYU761JFXgKTTihkCsO_IC4Rf02h5hDoq5nvD-IS-ZJ00XMjqKNd9aph3LfEUHU2i99VEq_bPqL5oKJ3sdGOTErvTboFKtFqW60NhwmsN_1vmnd0cY24qhM3F5eQA8gVeI6Ha6yQE0YluPoooDLopQ6liqXTwsj-kNYGD95UI5Q1qKoodm2RScsmPQmSfGz0Au3bAcnVXN_bQy2yYqE4YdbSsyKKq1enps_pjyRsNEHdmF81nx2JzLsshalBxkjscDGLcQ35Wd8giYfzgwl_Mpp7fgN9qvINsrTEyPU1KJ_2WzGd6CrPtgRFzN9Dw8KBpjtt4gLcLh3zVth-jN2o3YVazZZsUJjj_lleNm-N24cHxp4HiybdUVJhlypcaFG_C1ufkC1YWYvMBXWdus-D5Jxi-nLrV9sWdr8Yn32ilGSWNSkFqBu6GhavXmGFbjoF1qF6lSo4HD574tCDts2PMjy_nLmCi-_rjaU5OCjb5zq-cuTDAc-4lpDjqLuU8Yob8dvLRlxCkMSji1uni)** Your generous donation will make a difference when it comes to the bills. And if you’re a God-fearing person like me, will you please pray for Jacob and our family? Just knowing we aren’t alone means the world to us as we face down this nightmare.Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
---
Gratefully,
---
Kathryn Gonzalez

clean_body: | | | Dear Patriot,Planning a wedding is supposed to be an exciting time. But instead of buying a dress and booking our honeymoon, I’ve hired an attorney to fight for my fiancé’s life.Please, let me explain...I am engaged to marry Deputy Jacob Diaz of the Otero County Sheriff’s Department in New Mexico. Jacob is a good man. Kind, loyal, and hard working. He’s the kind of officer you hope shows up in your time of need.But everything changed on June 25, 2024, when Jacob responded to a late-night report of a possibly intoxicated man walking along the median of a busy highway. Upon his arrival, Jacob found a young man with his shirt draped over his left arm, hiding whatever was in his waistband. Following protocol, Jacob ordered the man to stay back and show his hands. “Stop right there, bro.” “Are you alright?” “Let me see your other hand, bro.” The young man refused to comply. And in the next few seconds, both their lives changed forever.The man quickly walked toward my fiancé and drew what appeared to be a firearm.Jacob’s training kicked in. He fired his service weapon.The man fell to the ground, but he continued to reach for his weapon– ignoring Jacob’s commands to show his hands and stop reaching for the gun.Jacob fired additional shots, killing the armed man.We later learned that the man’s weapon was an airsoft gun.My heart broke for the young man’s family. But I also thanked God for protecting my fiancé that night. It easily could have been his life lost on that median. The New Mexico State Police launched an in-depth investigation into Jacob’s actions.I knew without a doubt the shooting was justified. After all, the suspect drew a firearm on an officer and would not back down.So, we were relieved – but not surprised – when the State Police cleared Jacob of any wrongdoing and reinstated him on the force in September. That should have been the end of this story...But out of nowhere, an anti-police prosecutor filed First-Degree Murder charges against Jacob.Now my fiancé faces life in prison for doing his job and defending himself in the line of duty. You see, this has long been one of my biggest fears. Political prosecutions of police officers is at an all-time high right now and New Mexico is not a police-friendly state.But I still can’t believe this is happening to my fiancé.We’re in our 20s. We have our entire lives ahead of us. Now all our hopes and dreams may be destroyed by an anti-cop prosecutor with an ax to grind against law enforcement.So, instead of saving for a wedding and our future together, Jacob and I scraped together enough money to hire an attorney.But fighting First-Degree Murder charges will cost upwards of $200,000.That’s money we just don’t have.Every day I prayed. I asked God to make this nightmare go away... for the prosecutor to drop the charges... or to show us a way to pay for Jacob’s defense. My desperate prayers were answered when we received a phone call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).The LELDF Board of Directors reviewed the facts of the case and they are confident that Jacob is innocent – so they’ve offered to fund his defense.God heard my prayers. For the first time in months, I am hopeful for our future – that Jacob may not spend the rest of his life behind bars after all.Not just because LELDF is making sure Jacob gets the defense he deserves, but because LELDF’s Directors are the leading experts on policing and “use of force” in the nation – folks like Ronald Reagan’s Attorney General Ed Meese and former Assistant Director of the FBI Ron Hosko. With over 30 years of helping wrongly accused officers clear their names, LELDF’s support carries weight. (And the prosecution knows this!)But we still have a lot of work to do. LELDF doesn’t receive taxpayer funding and grants and large gifts are few and far between. Instead, LELDF relies on kind-hearted strangers who respect our men and women in blue and want to help cops like Jacob who are being railroaded by progressive prosecutors.Folks, I hope, like you.This isn’t easy for me so I’m just going to come out and ask... No matter how much you’re able to help, your donation will be put to immediate use helping LELDF support wrongly accused officers like Jacob.I don’t think I have to tell you it’s a terrible time to be a cop in America. It’s all over the news.Not only are ambush attacks up, but anti-police prosecutors – often bought and paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate. Even when the facts clearly show the cop did his job by the book and a previous investigation cleared him!Still, officers like Jacob show up every day – put on the badge and put their lives in danger to protect their communities. Your generous donation will make a difference when it comes to the bills. And if you’re a God-fearing person like me, will you please pray for Jacob and our family? Just knowing we aren’t alone means the world to us as we face down this nightmare.Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Gratefully, Kathryn Gonzalez | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 -

subject: Bumping this up from my team

body:
Did you see this? |
---

### **THE BLUE LETTER**
# `Independent Media For.26/day!`
#### _**Benefits For You & Democracy for those who upgrade to paid:**_
_**Support for our Soundcheck Fund --through which we deliver grants and promotion to other creators, building an ecosystem of independent media to fight for democracy**_
_**A Substack AMA each week w/ Cliff & David Shuster--video posted for paid subscribers**_
_**Insider stories we 've never before shared, live shout-outs to paid subs, pics/video behind the scenes, a lottery for a few paid subscribers to join us for a coffee & more!**_
_**Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs (we are setting this set up)**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.AuyLwfi6Nr_BmWM621DMMCaVwQ8NoUBrThEVlFMAlzk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163860538)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f95109b3-ab73-4f51-8d09-1f336741ddae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let me share some thoughts in the most polite, professional and deeply considered fashion I can muster:
**Tulsi Gabbard can go to hell.** Sorry, not sorry.
The ex-Democrat-turned-Assad-apologist, Fox-flunky and Putin-parrot just popped up on...where else, [the worst corporate media channel, Fox News](https://substack.com/redirect/ee22db78-1d51-4cfe-9ebe-f1d46549d190?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to accuse _Barack Obama_ --yes,**former President** -- of "treason" for... reasons unknown, unsupported, and un-cited. Which, btw, I hear is also the name of Gabbard's autobiography.
But this isn't about Obama. And _Tulsi --who maybe would prefer that we call her by her Kremlin name, Tulski--_knows it.
It's a desperate, demonic and deflective Hail Mary by a compromised DNI that Republicans thought worthy of access to our entire intel infrastructure. For that alone, congressional Republicans should be forced to watch JD Vance order donuts with their original families until Marjorie Taylor Greene can correctly spell martial law.
But back to Tulsi, whose attack on President Obama is designed to turn your attention away from **Donald Trump 's ongoing nightmare of being correctly linked to Jeffrey Epstein, pedophile guy**. Ya know Epstein, sex trafficker of underage women who was Trump's BFF, in whose files Trump appears, as we know from lawsuits and articles--like a lawsuit, later dropped, by a 13-yr old girl accusing Trump of rape.
Yes, I'm f*king furious and sick to my stomach too.
Trump openly admired Epstein for being a "terrific guy. **It is even said that he likes beautiful women as much as I do,** **and many of them are on the younger side**."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4ecf43eb-1043-4fc9-8e5e-bdfaafbee46a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**So we have two issues:**
**1)** Tulski, while serving Trump in an administration staffed by Pete Hegseth, accusing anyone else of "treason" based on "intelligence" is laughable.
**Here 's some context Tulski just may be leaving out:**
* Trump **shared classified Israeli intel** about an anti-ISIS op... with **Russian spies in the goddamn Oval Office**.
* Trump **refused to use secure lines** while President, it was known that all sorts of classified conversations could be picked up by those making any effort.
* A Chinese spy and "Russian-speaking fake heiress" (see spy) were caught on Mar-a-Lago grounds. Quelle securite! And they were likely there, because...
* Trump **stole truckloads of classified material** , stored them in his _Golden Crapper TM_, and showed 'em off like baseball cards to campaign donors.
* Trump's son-in-law, Jared Kushner, was **denied a security clearance** more times than Lauren Boebert failed her GED due to shady dealings with foreign governments--and he still got one _because Trump waved his tiny orange hand_.

But yeah, Tulsi's got thoughts on _Obama_ 's loyalty? Uh-huh (and, btw, that list could be 3x as long, but I'm hungry and dinner is almost ready!).
This is the same woman Hillary Clinton **correctly said in 2020** was being "groomed" by the Russians. Fox News cried foul, Tulski sued, and The Right rushed to her defense. But it turns out, Hillary had receipts (she always does).
A **GOP-led Senate Intel Committee** confirmed it: Tulsi **was a favored figure in Russian propaganda networks** for repeating their TPs like she had Russian disinformation Tourette's.
> "The Senate Intelligence Committee said in its bipartisan 2020 report on Russian interference that **RT, Sputnik, and other Kremlin-backed networks promoted Gabbard more than any other U.S. politician. "**
So, nice try Tulsi. Maybe stick to what you're good at...which is, well, that information hasn't been declassified yet.
2) Tulski is trying to make you forget an "adjudicated rapist" accused of sexual assault by nearly 30 women, who bragged about sneaking into beauty-pageant changing rooms to leer at 15-&-16 yr olds, called his daughter "a piece of ass," had to pay off a porn star and bragged about "grabbing women by the p*ssy" is in the Epstein files.
Yet, being the worst person alive isn't the actual problem for Trump, as [MAGA's ethical compass is about at the level of joining Harvey Weinstein for private viewings of ](https://substack.com/redirect/98550d9e-49a7-4401-a648-bd3df60c6440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Long Dong Silver](https://substack.com/redirect/98550d9e-49a7-4401-a648-bd3df60c6440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ with Clarence Thomas](https://substack.com/redirect/98550d9e-49a7-4401-a648-bd3df60c6440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). No, the problem's that The Trump Cult based their appeal the past decade on a Q conspiracy theory about Democratic pedophiles, and their heroic plan to clear them out of government **with Epstein 's files **
**(**[This also plays into centuries of anti-Semitism](https://substack.com/redirect/063d2c2d-0630-447e-87e2-228a09926486?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--Jews drinking the blood of Christian children--and the name "Epstein" only makes that hard-wiring more potent).
Many MAGAs believed Trump, and [many right-wing entertainers](https://substack.com/redirect/03e47766-5c26-4f45-b107-28f3f8577383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) built audiences based on saving children. So the Pandora's Box ain't closing on this one, and Trump's many lies for why he won't now release the files has right-wing elites and the grassroots feeling betrayed ([there's also Putin's fingerprints](https://substack.com/redirect/8ed4a339-2bce-419e-a22a-5f27438ed421?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the boys are fighting). So Trump finds himself in new territory. He can't walk back the years of manipulation.
This is the first time we've seen something not adhere to Cliff's (yes, I referred to myself in the third person, please forgive me) _Walking Dead Theory of MAGA._
On the show Rick, Maggie or Darryl can easily turn the attention of the walkers away from something they wanna protect by playing loud music or setting a fire in a different direction, so they change course. This is what Trump has always done with MAGA. But it isn't working now, because MAGA walkers have it so ingrained in brain stems that they must attack Alexandria (town in the show) to stop child assault.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9275118b-2c64-430d-b0ed-d3fa4ceb5d31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**A Walking Dead MAGA herd being re-directed**_
Any attempt to redirect makes them more ferociously angry at whoever's trying--including Trump! It turns out Trump could shoot someone on 5th avenue, [but couldn't say on 5th Avenue he won't stop stop child rape after building a movement based on this lie](https://substack.com/redirect/b2f5ce6a-d84c-4f22-90cb-40327720d47c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And that's where we get to Obama. the ultimate Hail Mary. You see, so many MAGA walking dead have a hostile reflex to a Black President, they think this just might work. But they're not getting what I wrote above. This one is out, there's no walking it back. [Even our crappy, corporate-press smells ratings](https://substack.com/redirect/ee22db78-1d51-4cfe-9ebe-f1d46549d190?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
So now Trump will try to remove his name from the 8,113 places it likely exists in the files and release them. I don't think it will work, far too much damage has already been done.
But let's end this by just acknowledging the sickness we're dealing with here. Why did it take reaching this level of depravity? Criminal, adjudicated rapist, lifetime con-man, evil d*k-in-a-box who destroyed businesses of contractors by not paying them, treated workers like he did young women and I honestly can't go through the whole list it would take hours. You were good with all this. Aren't you proud.
And Tulsi is defaming President Obama, a man so morally superior to Trump that Trump would need a SpaceX that didn't crash just to reach Obama's orbit, to protect child rape. If the Epstein files come out, there are a lot of other men who should rot in a cell and be glad they're not in a different age when they would've gotten the knee breaker, Spanish donkey or Cradle of Judas (you can look those up).
Either way, Tulski should eventually sit in front of a Truth & Reconciliation Committee. And also it won't work, guys. We'll keep the spotlight, if you will, where it belongs: **On the crimes against children. On the lies. On Trump Administration cover-ups.**

subject: Add your name: Demand ICE stop targeting US citizens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Since Donald Trump came back into the White House, there have been multiple reports of ICE detaining and even deporting US citizens.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250721-5264-footer&t=1&akid=5264%2E420207%2Ep0nvox)
Peter,
Since Donald Trump came back into the White House, there have been multiple reports of ICE detaining and even deporting US citizens. It’s racism, xenophobia, and cruelty at work.
**That’s why I just introduced the Stop ICE from Kidnapping US Citizens Act in Congress. This legislation prohibits ICE from detaining or deporting US citizens, and creates real accountability when they do.**
From a 19-year-old citizen who suffered a seizure and was taken to the hospital without his ID, to a 25-year-old disabled veteran who is a citizen and was held for three days without any access to legal representation or any charges against him, to two US citizen children who were deported to Honduras along with their non-citizen mother, these incidents are going to keep happening until we do something to stop them.
But I can’t do this alone. Congress needs to hear loud and clear that the American people won’t put up with this.
[**Will you sign on to my petition calling on ICE to immediately stop their illegal and unconstitutional targeting of US citizens?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250721-1-ice-petition?source=em20250721-5264&akid=5264%2E420207%2Ep0nvox)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250721-1-ice-petition?source=em20250721-5264&akid=5264%2E420207%2Ep0nvox)**
For everyone who believes in justice, dignity, and due process under the law, this is our moment to speak out and defend those values.
Thank you for standing with me,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250721-5264-footer&t=2&refcode2=5264_420207_p0nvox&akid=5264%2E420207%2Ep0nvox)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

subject: The greatest hits

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8805%2E5257348%2EhCfmLy ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, did you see
Trump’s latest post, calling for my prosecution?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250721_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8805%2E5257348%2EhCfmLy ]Adam Schiff is a THIEF! He should be prosecuted, just like they tried
to prosecute me, and everyone else — The only difference is, WE WERE
TOTALLY INNOCENT, IT WAS ALL A GIANT

There he goes again.

Playing the greatest hits. More baseless smears.

He really wants you to be talking about anything other than his cover-up
of the Epstein files. Or his floundering approval ratings. Or the economic
tailspin his tariffs are threatening. (He probably also didn’t appreciate
my appearance last week on Late Night with Stephen Colbert, when I told
the president to “piss off.”)

His behavior is reckless,
Derek. But when it’s coming from
the President of the United States, it’s also dangerous. And we have to
treat it seriously.

name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: It’s not just the message, it’s the messenger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Here’s an excerpt from David’s interview:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250721-1&t=1&akid=2415%2E587540%2EXrmf0e)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250721_1_teenvogue?refcode=em20250721-2415&amount=5&refcode2=2415_587540_Xrmf0e&akid=2415%2E587540%2EXrmf0e)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250721_1_teenvogue?refcode=em20250721-2415&amount=5&refcode2=2415_587540_Xrmf0e&akid=2415%2E587540%2EXrmf0e)
Peter, did you see the _Teen Vogue_ story about David Hogg and Leaders We Deserve?
Here’s an excerpt from David’s interview:
* * *
_We have two major problems in our party: We have a courage problem and we have a competition problem. Because we don't challenge the status quo or people who are in safer blue seats nearly enough, we [end up with certain] candidates who get really comfortable. And if there's anything that I've learned from activism and organizing, it's that comfortable people — especially politicians — do not change._
_They will tell you nice things. They will say that they care about your issue or whatever you're fighting for. They will give you as much lip service as possible, but ultimately, they are not necessarily going to fight for it. One of the only things across the board that will make a politician do the right thing, regardless of whether or not they support you, is by threatening the one thing all of them [seem to] care about, which is their job._
_Everybody in our party wants to do two things at the same time that are incompatible: They want to win and gain majorities, but they also want to do that with the same cast of characters that brought us here. The reason they talk so much about focusing on our messaging is because you can change the messaging without changing the messenger. But the reality is, given the fact that we've talked for about 15 years about how we have a messaging problem, it's gone beyond a messaging problem. It is a messenger problem._
* * *
**[Peter, Leaders We Deserve is working hard to not only change the message, but the messengers. Can you pitch in $5 to elect the next generation of Democrats?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250721_1_teenvogue?refcode=em20250721-2415&amount=5&refcode2=2415_587540_Xrmf0e&akid=2415%2E587540%2EXrmf0e)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250721_1_teenvogue?amount=5&refcode=em20250721-2415&refcode2=2415_587540_Xrmf0e&akid=2415%2E587540%2EXrmf0e)**
Thank you for reading,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250721-1&t=2&refcode2=2415_587540_Xrmf0e&akid=2415%2E587540%2EXrmf0e)**

Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: NEW: Our “Accountability Summer” tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
I’m talking to Arizonans across the state about how they’ll be impacted. |
---
Peter — Donald Trump and his Republican allies in Congress rammed through their Big _Ugly_ Bill, which is now officially law. Americans across the country will lose their health care. Jobs and food assistance that working families rely on will be cut. Even Arizona Republicans like Representatives Schweikert, Crane, and Ciscomani expressed their concerns — and then _voted to pass this legislation anyway._ We need to make sure Arizonans know which of their Representatives voted for Trump’s devastating budget. **That’s why today, I’m launching my "Accountability Summer” town hall tour.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887160/558711405/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250721_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDUwNGE2NS04MjY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yFRtVXZ9crHFvnRS_kOivET4UVxfd3UAnpTEl-4sXo=) In the upcoming weeks, I’ll be traveling across the state and making stops in Congressional Districts 1, 2, 3, and 6 to meet with Arizonans and discuss the real-life impacts they’re going to face as a result of Republicans’ budget law. That’s why today, I’m launching my "Accountability Summer” town hall tour. = In the upcoming weeks, I’ll be traveling across the state and making stops in Congressional Districts 1, 2, 3, and 6 to meet with Arizonans and discuss the real-life impacts they’re going to face as a result of Republicans’ budget law. Arizona Republicans have failed their constituents — we cannot let them go unchecked. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being a part of this, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.
