The USDA announced its plan to open up our national forests to increase logging in some of the most pristine public lands in America.

**This is a dangerous step backward.** These roadless protections exist to safeguard sensitive ecosystems, reduce human-caused wildfire risk, and preserve the beauty and biodiversity of our nation's forests.

I’m proud to be backing the **Roadless Area Conservation Act** , which would protect these areas, including Los Padres National Forest, under federal law. Californians know what’s at stake because we’ve lived through the fires, seen the destruction, and understand the importance of keeping these areas intact.

But to keep up the fight, we need the resources to push back, organize, communicate, and hold the line. That’s where you come in.

[**If you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that a Democrat can win this open seat and take back Texas's Attorney General's Office. Republican AG Ken Paxton has abused the Office of the Attorney General (OAG) for his own personal and political interests and – following orders – he's weaponized the office to light destructive partisan fires. Under his control, the OAG has been corrupted and abused and debased, while its powers to do good have been wasted. **I’m sick of it.**

Friend, I’m betting that the people of Texas are too.

The way power is held and used is undergoing dramatic changes in this country and in this state. The Office of the Attorney General operates at the center of it all. Friend, **I’m running to be Texas’s next Attorney General because our state needs an attorney general who can meet the moment** – with strength, independence, and a genuine commitment to serve the people of Texas instead of partisan ideology.

**I'm a three-term state Senator, a practicing lawyer, and the only Democrat in Texas who can win this open seat next November.**

[ ![Sen. Nathan Johnson announces his bid for Attorney General](https://links.nathanfortexas.com/ls/click?upn=u001.CcX34OeFxO2xn7eCjKRPZJak7BfKWfIWJ4Tntql4llXJ7XBkh5sS9Ln6mYAR7MvphOz1UUEAd7NzYSBfSsU3VNteCHwHclk86c21AWAavqY-3Db8el_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAcNGZtBz-2BaqgDADOnGh3eU4DqaleO-2FnYYy-2F4buvg7vR4Ffd7pQRHKNm6JBxgjYPFFAki9e-2BfI-2FVa4JP5VmA061TiWNI-2FL-2F2DvGSVFgslnzo-2BUGBZuWeHe8gzEGPAvsb59uzrYvGbNEnMpY6ARJ7acO6yZgwGeE6Sw9lKBwvU4-2F6Q-3D-3D with headshot.jpg "Sen. Nathan Johnson announces his bid for Attorney General") ](https://links.nathanfortexas.com/ls/click?upn=u001.CcX34OeFxO2xn7eCjKRPZAuIyNh4vAqCXaTvQk2FuUm3ohUtqH4o4WApz81tAKNhzVExrROomt4LCJ40Zj0dz8LQ4uKi8bp5-2FJcj65IUeQIm9ljKRp9Z7wrt9nuc173zxAvZnC5sNXwSKVYXvsQnDnYb-2BGqkED9Qc8TItNzKn9nU7d9f-2BUYT94eEyX-2FS5EQpJxYTVQZJhtgF8b8ypXR8OpyWZU29lPpZ2TJ9bLuA8LszdP4eFOdO1GMBsH9WqyrES4C8_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAcNGZtBz-2BaqgDADOnGh3eUpFq4fGsoj3sK36PBC7Wuknsxtmmdnh89JfzFHfDggjNyLH4AOwtAZVPBhcOdT36TsscEWtxQqP3IBlnL6A0sh9TgOAI62Y05-2B71So1Cb4MOrA-2FWV6Ltx-2FLCe2EhL8Zc-2F9lqSjbmPIruQKs-2FtXQjq3g-3D-3D Seven years ago, I ran for the Texas Senate and defeated a wealthy, right-wing, highly-favored Republican incumbent — by 8 points**.** **It marked the first Democratic victory in the district in more than 30 years.**

In the Texas Senate, I delivered on my promise of accountability and good governance, by following this guiding principle: go where you see the need for change**:**

- Seeing Texas’s worst-in-the-nation uninsured rate, I became the state’s leading voice on Medicaid expansion. When the Legislature wouldn’t act, I reformed the Texas health insurance marketplace so hundreds of thousands of Texans could buy private health insurance.
- After winter storm Uri, I played a central role in fortifying the Texas power grid, restructuring energy markets, and preserving our vital sources of renewable energy.
- When the Legislature revisited tax incentives, I made it harder for businesses to scam taxpayers, and promoted opportunity in overlooked communities. And much more...

I’ve been able to get important things done. **Sometimes by collaborating, sometimes fighting, sometimes both.**

Through all of it, **I stuck to my values.** I've never been driven by donors or party shot-callers or political ambition or expediency. I've always been driven by a commitment to serving the people of this state through good policy.

Now we see the critical need for change in the Attorney General’s Office, **and with the seat now wide open, we have the opportunity to make it happen.**

Texas needs and deserves an attorney general who won’t take orders from Washington DC or from mega-donors, but who will take on market abuse and political corruption; who isn’t driven by party shot-callers or political ambition, but by a commitment to serving the people of this state; who will uphold our freedoms and protect our rights, and who respects and understands the law.

[**Friend, I'm asking you to join us. Will you help us make a powerful statement at the launch of our campaign by donating any amount now? We’ve set some ambitious fundraising goals to start this campaign on the right foot, and I need your help to stay on track.**](https://links.nathanfortexas.com/ls/click?upn=u001.CcX34OeFxO2xn7eCjKRPZNQWgE4fU7ClGT037rZST4sCfPVlasGYAXxevowUiKQ94uqcTzeO089f4v-2BmSdxFS5uWCEVz9YpZMv9rbfLdYoD0BmaqmmqvAbyY8BSVWsB7i0-2BgUKYfRAdOmBU7UqCgzAPDNfgI6BcOfSwHbMjyw7e-2BS-2F8AoFLvS69aL-2Fxfbw3Ily2D_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAcNGZtBz-2BaqgDADOnGh3eUJpUTybDxSVlEGTVwXxuhWOVVNig27sTd-2BjMLmyTcL5ZL4IBl55drrESqIHlW1SmEWmp-2FRX7VPfqmhJL8iXaRtJcR6PQijoBryitV4S0O9zFQuI2cAqnrDAL6vaUlrDanN1A8HJqs-2F3Qvp34iCfs9Yg-3D-3D

Learn more about our campaign for AG, and sign-up to get involved with Team Johnson at **[NathanforTexas.com](https://links.nathanfortexas.com/ls/click?upn=u001.CcX34OeFxO2xn7eCjKRPZLHMF1AGokZIP-2B6KE014mpG1BjI3jpvZ3SC2-2FVTOQ-2BhEcf7hDKwRz9AYNwl5Jp2dIDrhVBk88dFqtM075tG4LAMOMi-2BOyn5-2BhD5XAoSvXi572hPh-2FkJgGZFk0XFc34H2Bw-3D-3DxATI_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAcNGZtBz-2BaqgDADOnGh3eUGuA0Rk19EA-2FkgDgYEtaSp6mZp7EmG4ifTnyANX24ZuNKYLwbtOPkhu0PH5F8pkDQHigQXeQrEURGlLSLqsF96MoFJxdo21SGF2xqi0XojPs3-2Bi71QPz2qsIfNhaaUbFinZq4knC6-2FR5pHWjB7xMbXw-3D-3D

Thank you.

clean_body: After 30 years, it's time for a Texas Democrat. [ ]( Friend, as a three-term Texas state senator, I know firsthand that Texas is one of the most important and powerful governments anywhere in the world. We ought to have a good lawyer. *But we don't. I’m running to be Texas’s next Attorney General in order to change that. [If you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that a Democrat can win this open seat and take back Texas's Attorney General's Office. Become a founding donor with a $5 donation to my campaign now.]( [ DONATE NOW ]( Republican AG Ken Paxton has abused the Office of the Attorney General (OAG for his own personal and political interests and – following orders – he's weaponized the office to light destructive partisan fires. Under his control, the OAG has been corrupted and abused and debased, while its powers to do good have been wasted. I’m sick of it. Friend, I’m betting that the people of Texas are too. The way power is held and used is undergoing dramatic changes in this country and in this state. The Office of the Attorney General operates at the center of it all. Friend, I’m running to be Texas’s next Attorney General because our state needs an attorney general who can meet the moment – with strength, independence, and a genuine commitment to serve the people of Texas instead of partisan ideology. I'm a three-term state Senator, a practicing lawyer, and the only Democrat in Texas who can win this open seat next November. Seven years ago, I ran for the Texas Senate and defeated a wealthy, right-wing, highly-favored Republican incumbent — by 8 points. It marked the first Democratic victory in the district in more than 30 years. In the Texas Senate, I delivered on my promise of accountability and good governance, by following this guiding principle: go where you see the need for change: - Seeing Texas’s worst-in-the-nation uninsured rate, I became the state’s leading voice on Medicaid expansion. When the Legislature wouldn’t act, I reformed the Texas health insurance marketplace so hundreds of thousands of Texans could buy private health insurance. - After winter storm Uri, I played a central role in fortifying the Texas power grid, restructuring energy markets, and preserving our vital sources of renewable energy. - When the Legislature revisited tax incentives, I made it harder for businesses to scam taxpayers, and promoted opportunity in overlooked communities. And much more... I’ve been able to get important things done. Sometimes by collaborating, sometimes fighting, sometimes both. Through all of it, I stuck to my values. I've never been driven by donors or party shot-callers or political ambition or expediency. I've always been driven by a commitment to serving the people of this state through good policy. Now we see the critical need for change in the Attorney General’s Office, and with the seat now wide open, we have the opportunity to make it happen. Texas needs and deserves an attorney general who won’t take orders from Washington DC or from mega-donors, but who will take on market abuse and political corruption; who isn’t driven by party shot-callers or political ambition, but by a commitment to serving the people of this state; who will uphold our freedoms and protect our rights, and who respects and understands the law. [Friend, I'm asking you to join us. Will you help us make a powerful statement at the launch of our campaign by donating any amount now? We’ve set some ambitious fundraising goals to start this campaign on the right foot, and I need your help to stay on track.]( Friend, this will be a campaign we build together. Learn more about our campaign for AG, and sign-up to get involved with Team Johnson at [NathanforTexas.com]( Thank you. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m calling for Kristi Noem’s resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
And I need you to have my back.

|
---
Friend, I’m leading the call for Kristi Noem’s resignation. As the **senior-most Democrat on the House Homeland Security Committee** , I’ve seen a lot — but what Noem is doing at the Department of Homeland Security is beyond the pale. She deported a _4-year-old child battling cancer_. She detained a U.S. Marshal. She lied to Congress about Trump’s doctored photo of Kilmar Abrego Garcia. And she’s arrested one member of Congress and detained another just for speaking out against MAGA’s authoritarian regime. **Under her leadership, ICE agents are running around this country terrorizing families, masking their identities, and abusing their power at Noem’s behest.** **I’m demanding accountability — and her resignation. But I need your help.** [**While I fight to ensure Kristi Noem answers for her disregard for the rule of law on the Homeland Security Committee, will you split a contribution between me and Ohio House Dems? I’m about to be in the middle of two high stakes investigations against Trump and his henchmen, so I need to be prepared to fight back no matter what they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887350/558711978/-1278949388?refcode=250721_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBhOGYxOS04MzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7CL8i5KDtE6A9dilC2YdBl4xYkqfrDFj9X1t9Rp27os=) | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887351/558711979/-1739619301?amount=15&refcode=250721_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBhOGYxOS04MzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7CL8i5KDtE6A9dilC2YdBl4xYkqfrDFj9X1t9Rp27os= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887340/558711966/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250721_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTBhOGYxOS04MzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LyrDHVoLemkp4JuPG5zYs-AXP3Rg9RFekqV_KOI7HI=&emci=e04d8113-8366-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c10a8f19-8366-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=252045)

Hey, We know times are tough, and we’re all feeling the pinch — especially when it comes to energy bills. The so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" will only make it worse. President Trump and Republicans’ cuts to clean energy investments and incentives, combined with attacks on clean energy projects across the country, will lead to _unprecedented_ hikes in energy bills that affect everyone from families to small businesses. Instead of focusing on solutions that work for everyone, some folks in the Senate are backing policies that favor billionaires and big energy giants over everyday people. But Senator Heinrich believes there’s a better way — _one where we can make life more affordable and sustainable together._ Martin is committed to fighting for New Mexico’s values and ensuring every person can thrive without being bogged down by runaway costs. But he can’t do it alone. We need your help to flip the Senate and make sure elected officials are working for you — not for Wall Street. **[Can you pitch in today? Your support will go a long way in helping us fight for clean energy, lower costs, and making sure the voices of working Americans are heard loud and clear.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887341/558711967/-1710431385?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250721_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTBhOGYxOS04MzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LyrDHVoLemkp4JuPG5zYs-AXP3Rg9RFekqV_KOI7HI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887342/558711968/-1710431385?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250721_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTBhOGYxOS04MzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LyrDHVoLemkp4JuPG5zYs-AXP3Rg9RFekqV_KOI7HI=)

clean_body: Hey, We know times are tough, and we’re all feeling the pinch — especially when it comes to energy bills. The so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" will only make it worse. President Trump and Republicans’ cuts to clean energy investments and incentives, combined with attacks on clean energy projects across the country, will lead to unprecedented hikes in energy bills that affect everyone from families to small businesses. Instead of focusing on solutions that work for everyone, some folks in the Senate are backing policies that favor billionaires and big energy giants over everyday people. But Senator Heinrich believes there’s a better way — one where we can make life more affordable and sustainable together. Martin is committed to fighting for New Mexico’s values and ensuring every person can thrive without being bogged down by runaway costs. But he can’t do it alone. We need your help to flip the Senate and make sure elected officials are working for you — not for Wall Street. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Martin will never expect you to chip in to every email. name: Wes Moore
subject: Birthday Surprise:
body:
I know there is one gift in particular Congressman Clyburn would like.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=339%2E1086043%2EqUKO7L)
Hey Peter,
Today is Congressman Jim Clyburn’s birthday. I can’t tell you a voice that has had more impact or driven more change for our country than Jim Clyburn. I spoke at his world-famous fish fry in South Carolina just a few months ago, and I’m lucky to consider him more than my guy, but also a friend.
I know there’s one gift in particular Congressman Clyburn would appreciate today:
**[A contribution from you to help Democrats win back the House majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250721-2?refcode=em-20250721-2&refcode2=339_1086043_qUKO7L&akid=339%2E1086043%2EqUKO7L)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250721-2?refcode=em-20250721-2&refcode2=339_1086043_qUKO7L&akid=339%2E1086043%2EqUKO7L)**
As Democrats, we work tirelessly to ensure every voice is heard at the decision-making table. I can’t think of many people who have done more to further those values than Congressman Clyburn.
Jim often says that we need to make America’s greatness accessible and affordable to all, and he has dedicated much of his life to doing just that. As a leading figure in our country’s Civil Rights Movement, Jim blazed a path for justice and equality for all.
As former House Majority Whip and Assistant Democratic Leader, Jim has been an indispensable advocate for voting rights, affordable health care, broadband expansion, and gun safety, and a valuable partner for Maryland’s priorities on Capitol Hill.
He’s continuing that work today -- fighting to protect our communities from the daily assaults from the Trump administration, offering ways we can all push back against the GOP’s reckless actions, and traveling around the country to elect Democrats nationwide.
**[I want to wish Congressman Clyburn a happy birthday and thank him for all he does for our country. One of the best ways we can do that is by helping Democrats win this year and in the midterms. Will you split a contribution between the Congressman and our campaign before his birthday is over, Peter?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250721-2?refcode=em-20250721-2&refcode2=339_1086043_qUKO7L&akid=339%2E1086043%2EqUKO7L)
Elevate,
Wes Moore

clean_body: I know there is one gift in particular Congressman Clyburn would like. Hey Peter, Today is Congressman Jim Clyburn’s birthday. I can’t tell you a voice that has had more impact or driven more change for our country than Jim Clyburn. I spoke at his world-famous fish fry in South Carolina just a few months ago, and I’m lucky to consider him more than my guy, but also a friend. I know there’s one gift in particular Congressman Clyburn would appreciate today: As Democrats, we work tirelessly to ensure every voice is heard at the decision-making table. I can’t think of many people who have done more to further those values than Congressman Clyburn. Jim often says that we need to make America’s greatness accessible and affordable to all, and he has dedicated much of his life to doing just that. As a leading figure in our country’s Civil Rights Movement, Jim blazed a path for justice and equality for all. As former House Majority Whip and Assistant Democratic Leader, Jim has been an indispensable advocate for voting rights, affordable health care, broadband expansion, and gun safety, and a valuable partner for Maryland’s priorities on Capitol Hill. He’s continuing that work today -- fighting to protect our communities from the daily assaults from the Trump administration, offering ways we can all push back against the GOP’s reckless actions, and traveling around the country to elect Democrats nationwide. Elevate, Wes Moore

name: Ami Bera
subject: support our fight, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

I knew voting against the “Big, Beautiful Bill” wouldn’t be easy.

I knew special interests would come after me. I knew they’d launch attack ads and pour money into this race.

But I also knew what was in that bill — and I knew it would **hurt the people I represent.** So I voted no.

**As a doctor, I could not stand for the billions of dollars in Medicare and Medicaid cuts that will harm families across California’s 6th district and the country.** I could not just sit back and watch reproductive care continue to be attacked and stripped away from the most vulnerable communities.

Even though this bill passed, _the fight is far from over._[**Join us today to help us reach our fundraising goal and fight back even harder against Trump’s attacks on our health care. We can’t do this without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887781/558713495/-1775192550?amount=8&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250721_FR_EOM_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQxZGZjYy04NDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wv_q7DYmgaiIzoUG_qVVc2NsEw5g1Iaa3TDZgMjtINU=) If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. **[DONATE $8 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111887782/558713496/1652568267?amount=8&express_lane=true&contactdata=1WZVv1k7ZsuSAnUR7vBisWIjODq5sO58PXFFe+kaYT9Fs2+GUQNEVtLfmX49KDjwjSqoL8UsDwFkq24GoA3nZlU9ajktUbYSfqhxK03qz+GrKT1gsSi81D8cm3+xLkulqyiSd7DVklRqwW6kixJhY1gHQky5k8KK/lbyPpDBwLlUhLUv4ayvudG18MfOZkRJ&refcode2=fc41dfcc-8466-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250721_FR_EOM_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQxZGZjYy04NDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wv_q7DYmgaiIzoUG_qVVc2NsEw5g1Iaa3TDZgMjtINU=)**

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: They’re afraid of us — so they’re trying to shut us down
body:
Trump’s latest move proves something we’ve always known:
They’re afraid of people power.
That’s why he signed an Executive Order directing the DOJ to investigate ActBlue — the secure, grassroots-driven platform used by millions of Democrats to support the candidates and causes we believe in.
If they can’t beat us on the issues, they’ll try to shut us down.
That’s why we launched an emergency $15,000 fund to defend ActBlue — and we’re still $5,000 short. 👉 Will you chip in $7 right now to protect the future of grassroots democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072125_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072125_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072125_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072125_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072125_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072125_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072125_3&amount=25]
This is the platform that helps school teachers, union workers, and retired nurses raise money for public office. It fuels campaigns fighting for reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ equality, climate justice, and voting rights.
And now Trump wants to dismantle it. Because he knows it works.
But here’s what he can’t do:
He can’t stop a movement that refuses to be defunded.
Let’s prove that. Let’s rise up. Let’s fight back — together.
Rush $7 now to stand your ground and power the resistance » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072125_3]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072125_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072125_3]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Mark Harris
subject: BREAKING NEWS: President Trump Endorses Mark Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Harris for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/markharrisforcongress.com/breaking-news-president-trump-endorses-mark-harris?e=4024c5123e)
---
| | [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=655344d885&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **Dear Friend,**
**I’m beyond honored to share that President Donald J. Trump has given me his COMPLETE and TOTAL ENDORSEMENT **for my re-election as your Congressman in North Carolina’s 8th Congressional District for the 2026 midterms!
---
| [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=c9ea9a8de2&e=4024c5123e)
---
|
This endorsement fuels my resolve to keep fighting for you—our farmers, families, and hardworking communities. With President Trump’s support, I’m doubling down on securing our border, lowering energy costs, cutting taxes, supporting our military, and defending our God-given freedoms.

But I can’t do this alone. The radical left is already targeting our seat, and I need YOUR help to ensure we keep NC-08 red in 2026. Will you stand with President Trump and me by making a contribution today?

**[Donate $25, $50, $100, or more to power our campaign!](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=d4ace1fe84&e=4024c5123e) **

Your support will help me continue to:
* **Secure the Border:** Stop the chaos and keep our communities safe.
* **Lower Costs:** Fight inflationary policies to ease the burden on your family.
* **Defend Our Values:** Uphold pro-life, pro-gun, and pro-freedom principles.

**Join President Trump today! Chip in now to keep NC-08 conservative!**

---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=d184154b2c&e=4024c5123e "DONATE NOW!")
---
| _Thank you for standing with us._

Sincerely,

Mark Harris

name: Haley Stevens
subject: SIGN NOW: Let's breathe new life into Michigan's manufacturing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I can't fight for Michigan’s workers without your help

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3976?t=2&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b)
---
Hi null, it’s Haley Stevens here.
**I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for Michigan workers and revitalizing Michigan’s manufacturing economy.** My work to lower costs, create jobs, and bolster our manufacturing economy will help revitalize Michigan's mineral production and manufacturing industries.
I have fought to loosen China's grip on this increasingly vital sector and ensure that hardworking Michiganders lead the world in responsible, clean, and competitive high-tech manufacturing.
**Help me take the fight for Michigan manufacturing jobs to the Senate – null,[will you please sign on now to help me win in Michigan and make a difference for working families in the U.S. Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3977?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b)**
Look: While Donald Trump's tough talk makes headlines, the policies that come out of it have only made prices higher, our manufacturing industries weaker, and our nation more dependent on China.
On the flip side, I’ve pushed for _real results_ – and not just more empty promises, let alone an agenda that puts our economy and national security at serious risk.
I’ve worked hand in hand with my congressional colleagues, but also with deep collaboration from other labor, industry, environmental, and trade organizations, including the United Steelworkers!
**My campaign is built on the idea that Michigan is the engine of innovation. But we won't get it across the finish line without the backing of 20,000 grassroots supporters like you before 11:59 p.m. tonight –[null, will you add your name now to help me fight for Michigan manufacturing? Together, we will make a tangible, positive impact on working families and revitalize Michigan's economy in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3977?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3977?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b)
---
It's an honor to work for Michiganders like you – thank you,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3978?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3976?t=7&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=402%2E49239%2ENtA05b)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Bryan
subject: July 21 Campaign Update
body:
Here Is An Update From Our Campaign

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d75069fdab&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **July 21, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | | Our elections should be free and fair, with results tallied on time. Sadly, that’s not always the case.
Last week, the Wisconsin Elections Commission found that the former Madison Clerk potentially violated five state laws in 2024.
This includes failing to count nearly 200 absentee ballots.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=4fde31276e&e=e907534017)
| Not only does the [**report allege**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=11ecac1f13&e=e907534017)**** that the clerk violated state law, it also states:
* Ballots sat uncounted while the clerk took a multi-week vacation.
* A brewery used as an election storage and staging facility, was repeatedly left unlocked.
* An “unauthorized person” was found sleeping in that facility.
* Multiple locations where City protocols or officials failed to count lawfully cast votes.

---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5a1ce9ed6d&e=e907534017)
| These actions, if true, are unacceptable and undermine faith in our elections. We must have accountability.
More on this story to come.

---
| **Bill Signing with President Trump**
On Friday, I joined President Trump at the White House for the signing of the GENIUS Act.
The GENIUS Act is the first law to implement federal consumer protections for stablecoins, a type of cryptocurrency.
It was great to join President Trump for this historic signing.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=bfa7a904e8&e=e907534017)
|
# The Race for WI-01
---
| We are still 15 months out from the 2026 Election, but [**Democrats**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ad0253bd0e&e=e907534017)**** are already looking for ways to take back control of the House. That includes targeting this seat.
But Democrats, like candidate Randy Bryce, are running on an extreme platform.
Bryce is [**standing**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f389129957&e=e907534017)**** with and [**fundraising**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7f8abc9e5d&e=e907534017)**** off of the extreme policies of Bernie Sanders, AOC, and NY socialist Zohran Mandami.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=acbbae651d&e=e907534017)
| [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=49deab38d8&e=e907534017)
| Their policies are wrong for Wisconsin families.
Instead, I am working to lower costs, secue our communities, and protect our seniors.
I look forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail.
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6150f6c336&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=e907534017&u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=550e068b1c)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=550e068b1c) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=550e068b1c)
---

subject: Our chance to defeat Ken Calvert, for good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Katherine Aleman is the Democrat who can flip CA-41

| Peter, we’re taking our youth organizing program to the next level!

This summer, we’ve hired our largest class of paid youth organizers EVER. This is truly a testament to the undeniable STRENGTH of our youth-powered grassroots movement.

**The math is simple: If we hire MORE student fellows, we can knock MORE doors, reach MORE young voters, and secure MORE progressive wins against fascism in Florida and beyond.**

So if you’re as fired up as I am, I have to ask: [**_Peter, will you donate $27 to support our largest class of summer organizing fellows yet? Every dollar goes directly towards growing our field program and developing the next generation of organizers!_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/V9YI0zYdAWjoQ3vItPb-zA~~/AAPPABA~/ax-jK6_byPFfMpk_CkzyENkCgZHydt1fgo9UqxQJYhuGJMqfLECOqB2il5NkeXrLsH6iWBQZBaRhm-K9koQTbgXSF6ycGgLfcJT06fqh01MEVGf6mls9-NKl7A_qXDWgpZzt2kCGr-0Z2ESeozQOztuZ98mayTWAykvWRc-rcGuCVq4Grtp6ayQA1w24K35TNIpxx0JEO0elC8gE2-eu_nk5iUk81dI7rYRahcvMEH4xapK0SyxChghxTIBGTp2-C5JlhOVTlvfS44xSE510OGurPlx6UrcLcYX5vaQMiN2_hUj0U4etpry_m6vccQYOEYazi7fzYwP4khcxDvthsh-8Z6maVb9hsj9MGvAxqE4~) Peter, for young people in Florida and across the country, the stakes are higher than ever.

Our youth are constantly being attacked by fascist policies. They’re seeing budget cuts for healthcare, education and other essential services. **And at the same time, they’re witnessing the largest transfer of wealth from young to old people in American history.**

It’s crucial that we bring as many of them as possible into our youth-powered movement. We need to connect with them, and show them a way _forward_ – before the far right indoctrinates them with lies.

Peter, that’s why our team of paid student fellows are organizing in the district, engaging with community members and fighting so that no young person is left behind.

**Our youth-powered organizing program is the best chance we have at defeating fascism, but we need your grassroots support to level up our program through the summer.** [**_We have a goal to raise $9,693 to boost our summer organizing program. If just 359 people stepped up and donated $27, we’d hit our goal by midnight. name: AOC
subject: “Proud to be an American”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I want to let you know the America that I’m proud of.
#
Yesterday, at our town hall in Elise Stefanik’s district, there was a little bus rolling around with a Trump sign on it, saying “Proud to be an American.”
I want to let you know the America that I’m proud of.
It’s an America that believes in freedom — not just in the freedoms outlined in the Constitution, but also **the economic freedom to live in dignity**.
The freedom that’s afforded to us when we are paid a living wage.
The freedom to put food on our table and send our kids to a safe school.
And the freedom to organize and make sure our voices are heard at the ballot box.
We are hosting these town halls because every town, every city, every neighborhood in this country matters. **Every corner matters**.
No one deserves to be ignored.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to power our fight on the road? Every dollar helps us host more town halls safely as we fight for working people in the places that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250721.PmjnB-&refcode=em20250721-9361-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9361%2E2526796%2EaLWZA9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250721.PmjnB-&refcode=em20250721-9361-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9361%2E2526796%2EaLWZA9)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250721?refcode=em20250721-9361-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9361_2526796_aLWZA9&akid=9361%2E2526796%2EaLWZA9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250721-9361-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9361%2E2526796%2EaLWZA9)**
---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Ron Wyden
subject: “Don’t eat carrot cake”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
I challenge him to look Oregonians in the eye and tell them this.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111888683/558716714/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzQ0ZjlkOC04NzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oDw5tVcusclORRIeJ5mA5HH6s7BK9FHOa9h3xaTWYys=&emci=0f7f47fb-6c66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0344f9d8-8766-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **In Oregon, Medicaid covers about 1.4 million people — roughly one-third of the state's population, including 57% of its children.** The Oregon Health Authority estimates that the GOP's recent budget bill could cost our state more than _$1 billion in federal funding_ and could result in _up to 200,000 people losing coverage._ _And what's the message that Dr. Mehmet Oz – the Trump administration's head of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services – has for everyone worried about losing health care? _**_"Don't eat carrot cake. Eat real food."_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111888684/558716719/-2044921950?refcode=2025-07-21-oz&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0344f9d8-8766-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzQ0ZjlkOC04NzY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oDw5tVcusclORRIeJ5mA5HH6s7BK9FHOa9h3xaTWYys=) **You've got to be kidding me.** I challenge Dr. Oz to look my constituents in the eye, hear their stories, answer their questions, and explain Republicans' harmful health care cuts. **I guarantee you, it has nothing to do with carrot cake.** Health care is already disappearing as a result of the disastrous Republican budget bill, and Dr. Oz's comments are an example of how completely out of touch the Trump administration and the GOP are. We can't let their disregard for human life stop our fight. clean_body: I challenge him to look Oregonians in the eye and tell them this. | | | | In Oregon, Medicaid covers about 1.4 million people — roughly one-third of the state's population, including 57% of its children. The Oregon Health Authority estimates that the GOP's recent budget bill could cost our state more than $1 billion in federal funding and could result in up to 200,000 people losing coverage. And what's the message that Dr. Mehmet Oz – the Trump administration's head of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services – has for everyone worried about losing health care? "Don't eat carrot cake. Eat real food." = You've got to be kidding me. I challenge Dr. Oz to look my constituents in the eye, hear their stories, answer their questions, and explain Republicans' harmful health care cuts. I guarantee you, it has nothing to do with carrot cake. Health care is already disappearing as a result of the disastrous Republican budget bill, and Dr. Oz's comments are an example of how completely out of touch the Trump administration and the GOP are. We can't let their disregard for human life stop our fight. = Onward, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: In This Together PAC
subject: Get to know Gov. Andy Beshear better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Vogue: “Democratic Governor Andy Beshear Has Won (and Won Again) in Trump Country. What’s Next?”

Peter –

Ever wonder what it’s like to live in the life of Gov. Andy Beshear?

It includes some running, taking his beloved dog Winnie for a walk, hanging out with his wife Britainy and two teenagers, Will and Lila, and getting to work every day for the people of Kentucky.

But you don’t have to take our word for it, _Vogue_ just published a profile of Andy, going into detail about not just his home and family, but how he approaches his work for the Commonwealth, how he maintains his status as the most popular Democratic governor in America, and how he continues to win elections as a Democratic governor in deep-red Kentucky.

The secret? He works hard to meet people where they are, to listen to the Kentuckians he represents and respond to meet their needs, and to govern the state by leading with his values—or, in his words, explaining the “why” behind his decisions.

**[If you'd like to learn more about how he does it, see an excerpt and read the profile at the link below!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111888737/558717033/937044655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTY5YzQ5ZDMtODg2Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6JQ8HGOIu6pYXheJTin2XxkVBj4DsGS3nyEseN7QZLU=&emci=34b9cfed-7d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=969c49d3-8866-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17458827)**
* * *

**Vogue:** _“Democratic Governor Andy Beshear Has Won (and Won Again) in Trump Country. What’s Next?”_

Beshear’s elections have all been close, but in each the margin has widened: In 2015 he was elected attorney general by 0.2 percentage points, and then in 2019, he won the governorship by about 5,000 votes—Kentucky’s closest gubernatorial contest in more than a century. Four years later, in 2023, with Democrats 12 months from a national wipeout, Beshear was reelected by five points. “A landslide,” he jokes.

And he accomplished this without turning away from the values and priorities of the left. When Kentucky Republicans recently put forward bills dismantling DEI programs at public universities and setting medical guidelines around emergency abortions (Kentucky has a near-total abortion ban), Beshear took out his veto pen. “He hasn’t been shy about standing up for the things that he believes in,” says Jaime Harrison, the former chairman of the Democratic National Committee. “And to do that in, you know, Mitch McConnell’s red Kentucky? And still get reelected? It shows that he has some real political skill.”
[READ MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111888738/558717034/937044655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTY5YzQ5ZDMtODg2Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6JQ8HGOIu6pYXheJTin2XxkVBj4DsGS3nyEseN7QZLU=&emci=34b9cfed-7d66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=969c49d3-8866-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17458827)

If you'd like to donate, please = | = | = | | | | ---|---|--- | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We know you probably receive a lot of emails, but we wouldn’t reach out if it weren’t important. Your support is crucial to helping elect Democrats in Georgia, but if you’d like to unsubscribe, . From all of us with the Georgia Democratic Party, thank you for your support! | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Our biggest updates this week
body:
---
Derek,

This is a longer email, but we hope you stick around for every word — we have some very important updates for you. **If you’re crunched for time and can’t read all the way through right now, here’s the short version: Here at the DNC, we’re scaling up our work against Trump and his allies to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year and beyond.**[**If electing folks who will fight for working families and disenfranchised communities in their cities, districts, and states matters to you, please consider donating $3 to the DNC today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250721_4025_fr&refcode2=4025_22930333_1Bjwcg&akid=4025%2E22930333%2E1Bjwcg) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=em_20250721_4025_fr&refcode2=4025_22930333_1Bjwcg&akid=4025%2E22930333%2E1Bjwcg)** Here’s everything you need to know right now: **_THE DNC HAS ANNOUNCED AN INITIAL $1.5 MILLION INVESTMENT IN VIRGINIA_** Virginia is one of two states with major off-year statewide elections this November, and **we will be investing an initial $1.5 million into the Virginia Democratic Coordinated Campaign to win up and down the ballot this year and beyond.** This investment will help the VA Coordinated Campaign continue to hire organizers and campaign staff in order to reach as many voters as possible, fund early persuasion programs to ensure that voters have a full picture of the stakes this November, test new outreach tactics to ensure their message is resonating with voters, and expand their reach to critical constituencies they will need to win. **_SCOTUS HAS ALLOWED TRUMP’S DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION TO RESUME MASS LAYOFFS_** Earlier this year, Trump ordered mass layoffs at the Department of Education which would have cut its workforce in half — and in a ruling just last week, the Supreme Court cleared the way for him to do just that. This ruling represents another major blow (in a long line of many others) to working-class voters, families, and communities who rely on public services — education in this case — and another example of how **Trump’s allies continue to side with his agenda over the people they pledged to protect.** Trump has made it clear that dismantling the department is his end goal, _but we will fight to stop that from happening._ **_THE DNC HAS HIT OUR GOAL OF HOSTING A TOWN HALL IN ALL 50 STATES_** We have officially hosted a town hall in every state in the country — sending a message that **if Republicans won’t show up for their constituents,_we will_.** In March, we announced our goal to host town halls in every state — red, blue, or purple — to reach folks who want to have meaningful conversations about their frustrations and give them effective solutions. This month, we reached our 50th state in Utah. And over the course of four months, we have hosted over 130 town hall meetings, showing up for people when Republicans aren’t. [**Derek, we’re proud of our work and we’ll keep showing up for people nationwide to fight for working families and communities when Trump and his Republican allies won’t, but we need your help to keep the momentum going. If this work matters to you, please use this link to donate $3 to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250721_4025_fr&refcode2=4025_22930333_1Bjwcg&akid=4025%2E22930333%2E1Bjwcg) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250721_4025_fr&refcode2=4025_22930333_1Bjwcg&akid=4025%2E22930333%2E1Bjwcg)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250721_4025_fr&refcode2=4025_22930333_1Bjwcg&akid=4025%2E22930333%2E1Bjwcg)**

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, an OLCV member wants to share this with you
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Z5fjuWB1RUz+xlh+KoLtRctCUOrSBDQxFNDbj+TNdZgYWh71HH6ns54p3l6cu2T3SUM2xkmG9FBLTOaKaDzNlkHQf8SUaKaF7/ih2AFmvB9GgBbS4Zk25ge1DR1pS/Xv [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Z5fjuWB1RUz+xlh+KoLtRctCUOrSBDQxFNDbj+TNdZgYWh71HH6ns54p3l6cu2T3SUM2xkmG9FBLTOaKaDzNlkHQf8SUaKaF7/ih2AFmvB9GgBbS4Zk25ge1DR1pS/Xv]
Dear Peter,
This summer we’ve been all hands on deck to fight for our public lands. We’ve learned that public pressure is exactly what we need to win and protect our public lands from the unprecedented attacks we’ve recently seen on them: from staff layoffs, to proposed sell offs, and even threats to open them up to extraction. In our efforts, we asked our members to share stories about their connection to our treasured public lands and the support we received was vast.
We’re doing all that we can to stop the attack on public lands, but we need your support. Will you make a donation now on behalf of this fight? [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2]
Donate now [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Z5fjuWB1RUz+xlh+KoLtRctCUOrSBDQxFNDbj+TNdZgYWh71HH6ns54p3l6cu2T3SUM2xkmG9FBLTOaKaDzNlkHQf8SUaKaF7/ih2AFmvB9GgBbS4Zk25ge1DR1pS/Xv]
I’d like to share one of our member stories with you. This story was submitted by Dave Arnold from Bend, Oregon:
My grandfather was a park ranger in Yellowstone and so was my grandmother. She was the first female ranger in the world. My dad was raised in Yellowstone and passed the love for outdoors to me and my brother and sister. We moved to Alaska where we lived the outdoor dreams with way too many stories to tell over my 30 years there. Trapped on the wrong side of the Talkeetna river, lost in the harding ice field, swam all night to get back to shore in resurrection bay, chased by a polar bear etc. Now we live in Bend and it's my turn to share outdoor experiences with my children. I love how they both love the outdoors and will pass this legacy on to the next generation.
If Dave’s story reminds you of your own connection to these incredible places, will you donate now and help us protect them for generations to come? [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2]
Donate now [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Z5fjuWB1RUz+xlh+KoLtRctCUOrSBDQxFNDbj+TNdZgYWh71HH6ns54p3l6cu2T3SUM2xkmG9FBLTOaKaDzNlkHQf8SUaKaF7/ih2AFmvB9GgBbS4Zk25ge1DR1pS/Xv]
Our public lands are so much more than just essential for our ecosystem and for our personal well-being. They provide a place for us to connect with nature and ancestral ties to the land. Public lands have shaped generations and generations. The fact that so many of our members were willing and able to take the time to tell their public lands story speaks volumes of just how special these places are. We can’t lose them.
Give now so we can keep going in this fight to ensure our public lands are untouched for our environment and future generations! [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: If you’d no longer like to receive fundraising emails, please use this link here [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/24dczWT--Uqtcu_3MxYYog2] to log-in and update your email preferences.
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

They’re doing it because they’ve decided that if something helps everyday people — if it’s not lining the pockets of billionaires — it’s not worth funding. **We’re not going to let that slide.** We’re collecting signatures to show just how many people stand with public media and against this nonstop campaign to tear down the things that actually support working Americans. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: Republicans just voted to slash funding for NPR and PBS. Sign now to speak out. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | First they gutted Medicaid and SNAP to pay for tax cuts for the rich. Now they’re coming after public media. And just like with Medicaid and SNAP, the people who’ll feel it the most are working families — especially in the more rural parts of CA-25 — folks who rely on public media to stay informed, help their kids keep learning, and get the kind of local reporting national outlets ignore. They’re not doing this because it saves money. They’re doing it because they’ve decided that if something helps everyday people — if it’s not lining the pockets of billionaires — it’s not worth funding. We’re not going to let that slide. We’re collecting signatures to show just how many people stand with public media and against this nonstop campaign to tear down the things that actually support working Americans. | | — Team Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump just called for my prosecution — here’s why I won’t back down
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111889124/558718377/224932327?refcode=250721em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzNlMDQwMy04ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Txcd0H7Q2qelrXkNRS8BYAnfEhxEn0Wr8u96b3ns9_g=)
---
Hi there, this is Adam Schiff. Tobias Read said I could reach out with this urgent message: **Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.** Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111889125/558718378/224932327?refcode=250721em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzNlMDQwMy04ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Txcd0H7Q2qelrXkNRS8BYAnfEhxEn0Wr8u96b3ns9_g=)
---
Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot. I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem. [**Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and****Tobias Read****to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111889126/558718379/224932327?refcode=250721em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzNlMDQwMy04ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Txcd0H7Q2qelrXkNRS8BYAnfEhxEn0Wr8u96b3ns9_g=)
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111889127/558718380/224932327?refcode=250721em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzNlMDQwMy04ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Txcd0H7Q2qelrXkNRS8BYAnfEhxEn0Wr8u96b3ns9_g=)
---
Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat. But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever. Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth. He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will. [**Please, rush a split donation to help me and****Tobias Read****fight back today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111889128/558718381/224932327?refcode=250721em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzNlMDQwMy04ZDY2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Txcd0H7Q2qelrXkNRS8BYAnfEhxEn0Wr8u96b3ns9_g=) Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator. Thank you for standing with me, Adam
---

BREAKING: Mike Johnson breaks Republican fundraising record

We’ll keep this brief.

Mike Johnson just raised over $60 MILLION to defeat us – the most a Republican Speaker has EVER raised in a single quarter!
